tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CCS的覆盖优先的核集选择方法，旨在高剪枝率下保持模型训练精度。
motivation: 现有核集选择方法在高剪枝率时因忽视数据覆盖性导致精度骤降，甚至不如随机采样。
method: 通过扩展几何集覆盖问题为分布覆盖问题，提出覆盖度量指标，并设计联合考虑覆盖性与样本重要性的CCS算法。
result: 在CIFAR10等数据集上，CCS在90%剪枝率下精度比SOTA方法高19.56%，比随机采样高7.04%。
conclusion: CCS通过兼顾数据分布覆盖与样本重要性，在高剪枝率场景下显著优于现有方法。
search_text: Coverage-centric Coreset Selection for High Pruning Rates 以覆盖为中心的核心集选择以实现高剪枝率 One-shot coreset selection aims to select a representative subset of the training data, given a pruning rate, that can later be used to train future models while retaining high accuracy. State-of-the-art coreset selection methods pick the highest importance examples based on an importance metric and are found to perform well at low pruning rates. However, at high pruning rates, they suffer from a catastrophic accuracy drop, performing worse than even random sampling. This paper explores the reasons behind this accuracy drop both theoretically and empirically. We first propose a novel metric to measure the coverage of a dataset on a specific distribution by extending the classical geometric set cover problem to a distribution cover problem. This metric helps explain why coresets selected by SOTA methods at high pruning rates perform poorly compared to random sampling because of worse data coverage. We then propose a novel one-shot coreset selection method, Coverage-centric Coreset Selection (CCS), that jointly considers overall data coverage upon a distribution as well as the importance of each example. We evaluate CCS on five datasets and show that, at high pruning rates (e.g., 90%), it achieves significantly better accuracy than previous SOTA methods (e.g., at least 19.56% higher on CIFAR10) as well as random selection (e.g., 7.04% higher on CIFAR10) and comparable accuracy at low pruning rates. We make our code publicly available at https://github.com/haizhongzheng/Coverage-centric-coreset-selection. 一次性核心集选择的目的是在给定修剪率的情况下选择训练数据的代表性子集，该子集稍后可用于训练未来的模型，同时保持高精度。最先进的核心集选择方法根据重要性度量选择最重要的示例，并且发现在低剪枝率下表现良好。然而，在高剪枝率下，它们会遭受灾难性的准确性下降，表现甚至比随机采样还要差。本文从理论上和实证上探讨了精度下降背后的原因。我们首先提出了一种新的度量方法，通过将经典的几何集覆盖问题扩展到分布覆盖问题来测量数据集在特定分布上的覆盖范围。该指标有助于解释为什么在高剪枝率下通过 SOTA 方法选择的核心集由于数据覆盖范围更差而与随机采样相比表现不佳。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的一次性核心集选择方法，即以覆盖为中心的核心集选择（CCS），该方法共同考虑分布上的整体数据覆盖范围以及每个示例的重要性。我们在五个数据集上评估 CCS，结果表明，在高剪枝率（例如 90%）下，它比以前的 SOTA 方法（例如，在 CIFAR10 上至少高出 19.56%）以及随机选择（例如，在 CIFAR10 上高出 7.04%）和低剪枝率下的准确度相当。我们在 https://github.com/haizhongzheng/Coverage-centric-coreset-selection 公开提供我们的代码。 本文提出了一种名为CCS的覆盖优先的核集选择方法，旨在高剪枝率下保持模型训练精度。 Haizhong Zheng,Rui Liu,Fan Lai,Atul Prakash cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Lei Bi,Michael Fulham,Shaoli Song,David Dagan Feng,Jinman Kim
title: Hyper-Connected Transformer Network for Multi-Modality PET-CT Segmentation
title_zh: 用于多模态 PET-CT 分割的超连接变压器网络
abstract: [18F]-Fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) positron emission tomography - computed tomography (PET-CT) has become the imaging modality of choice for diagnosing many cancers. Co-learning complementary PET-CT imaging features is a fundamental requirement for automatic tumor segmentation and for developing computer aided cancer diagnosis systems. In this study, we propose a hyper-connected transformer (HCT) network that integrates a transformer network (TN) with a hyper connected fusion for multi-modality PET-CT images. The TN was leveraged for its ability to provide global dependencies in image feature learning, which was achieved by using image patch embeddings with a self-attention mechanism to capture image-wide contextual information. We extended the single-modality definition of TN with multiple TN based branches to separately extract image features. We also introduced a hyper connected fusion to fuse the contextual and complementary image features across multiple transformers in an iterative manner. Our results with two clinical datasets show that HCT achieved better performance in segmentation accuracy when compared to the existing methods.
summary: [18F]-Fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) positron emission tomography - computed tomography (PET-CT) has become the imaging modality of choice for diagnosing many cancers. Co-learning complementary PET-CT imaging features is a fundamental requirement for automatic tumor segmentation and for developing computer aided cancer diagnosis systems. In this study, we propose a hyper-connected transformer (HCT) network that integrates a transformer network (TN) with a hyper connected fusion for multi-modality PET-CT images. The TN was leveraged for its ability to provide global dependencies in image feature learning, which was achieved by using image patch embeddings with a self-attention mechanism to capture image-wide contextual information. We extended the single-modality definition of TN with multiple TN based branches to separately extract image features. We also introduced a hyper connected fusion to fuse the contextual and complementary image features across multiple transformers in an iterative manner. Our results with two clinical datasets show that HCT achieved better performance in segmentation accuracy when compared to the existing methods.
abstract_zh: [18F]-氟脱氧葡萄糖 (FDG) 正电子发射断层扫描 - 计算机断层扫描 (PET-CT) 已成为诊断许多癌症的首选成像方式。共同学习互补的 PET-CT 成像特征是自动肿瘤分割和开发计算机辅助癌症诊断系统的基本要求。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种超连接变压器（HCT）网络，它将变压器网络（TN）与多模态 PET-CT 图像的超连接融合相集成。 TN 因其在图像特征学习中提供全局依赖性的能力而被利用，这是通过使用具有自注意力机制的图像补丁嵌入来捕获图像范围的上下文信息来实现的。我们使用多个基于 TN 的分支来扩展 TN 的单模态定义，以分别提取图像特征。我们还引入了超连接融合，以迭代方式融合多个变压器的上下文和互补图像特征。我们对两个临床数据集的结果表明，与现有方法相比，HCT 在分割准确性方面取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种超连接Transformer网络（HCT），用于多模态PET-CT图像的肿瘤分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效融合PET和CT的互补信息，导致肿瘤分割精度不足，需开发更高效的多模态特征学习框架。
AI.method: 设计多分支Transformer网络分别提取PET和CT特征，并通过超连接融合机制迭代整合跨模态的上下文信息。
AI.result: 在两个临床数据集上，HCT在分割精度上优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 超连接Transformer网络通过全局依赖建模和多模态特征融合，显著提升了PET-CT肿瘤分割的性能。

authors_text: Bhawesh Kumar,Anil Palepu,Rudraksh Tuwani,Andrew Beam
title: Towards Reliable Zero Shot Classification in Self-Supervised Models with Conformal Prediction
title_zh: 通过保形预测在自监督模型中实现可靠的零样本分类
abstract: Self-supervised models trained with a contrastive loss such as CLIP have shown to be very powerful in zero-shot classification settings. However, to be used as a zero-shot classifier these models require the user to provide new captions over a fixed set of labels at test time. In many settings, it is hard or impossible to know if a new query caption is compatible with the source captions used to train the model. We address these limitations by framing the zero-shot classification task as an outlier detection problem and develop a conformal prediction procedure to assess when a given test caption may be reliably used. On a real-world medical example, we show that our proposed conformal procedure improves the reliability of CLIP-style models in the zero-shot classification setting, and we provide an empirical analysis of the factors that may affect its performance.
summary: Self-supervised models trained with a contrastive loss such as CLIP have shown to be very powerful in zero-shot classification settings. However, to be used as a zero-shot classifier these models require the user to provide new captions over a fixed set of labels at test time. In many settings, it is hard or impossible to know if a new query caption is compatible with the source captions used to train the model. We address these limitations by framing the zero-shot classification task as an outlier detection problem and develop a conformal prediction procedure to assess when a given test caption may be reliably used. On a real-world medical example, we show that our proposed conformal procedure improves the reliability of CLIP-style models in the zero-shot classification setting, and we provide an empirical analysis of the factors that may affect its performance.
abstract_zh: 使用对比损失（例如 CLIP）训练的自监督模型已证明在零样本分类设置中非常强大。然而，要用作零样本分类器，这些模型要求用户在测试时在一组固定标签上提供新的标题。在许多设置中，很难或不可能知道新的查询标题是否与用于训练模型的源标题兼容。我们通过将零样本分类任务视为异常值检测问题来解决这些限制，并开发一个保形预测程序来评估何时可以可靠地使用给定的测试标题。在现实世界的医学示例中，我们表明我们提出的保形程序提高了零样本分类设置中 CLIP 式模型的可靠性，并且我们对可能影响其性能的因素进行了实证分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用符合预测方法提升自监督模型在零样本分类任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本分类方法依赖用户提供的测试时标签描述，但难以判断这些描述是否与训练数据兼容，导致结果不可靠。
AI.method: 将零样本分类转化为异常检测问题，通过符合预测框架评估测试描述的可靠性。
AI.result: 在医疗案例中验证了方法有效性，分析了影响符合预测性能的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 符合预测方法可提升CLIP类模型零样本分类可靠性，未来需进一步研究影响因素以优化性能。

authors_text: Sreejith Sasidharan,Pranav Prabha,Devasena Pasupuleti,Anand M Das,Chaitanya Kapoor,Gayathri Manikutty,Praveen Pankajakshan,Bhavani Rao
title: Handwashing Action Detection System for an Autonomous Social Robot
title_zh: 自主社交机器人洗手动作检测系统
abstract: Young children are at an increased risk of contracting contagious diseases such as COVID-19 due to improper hand hygiene. An autonomous social agent that observes children while handwashing and encourages good hand washing practices could provide an opportunity for handwashing behavior to become a habit. In this article, we present a human action recognition system, which is part of the vision system of a social robot platform, to assist children in developing a correct handwashing technique. A modified convolution neural network (CNN) architecture with Channel Spatial Attention Bilinear Pooling (CSAB) frame, with a VGG-16 architecture as the backbone is trained and validated on an augmented dataset. The modified architecture generalizes well with an accuracy of 90% for the WHO-prescribed handwashing steps even in an unseen environment. Our findings indicate that the approach can recognize even subtle hand movements in the video and can be used for gesture detection and classification in social robotics.
summary: Young children are at an increased risk of contracting contagious diseases such as COVID-19 due to improper hand hygiene. An autonomous social agent that observes children while handwashing and encourages good hand washing practices could provide an opportunity for handwashing behavior to become a habit. In this article, we present a human action recognition system, which is part of the vision system of a social robot platform, to assist children in developing a correct handwashing technique. A modified convolution neural network (CNN) architecture with Channel Spatial Attention Bilinear Pooling (CSAB) frame, with a VGG-16 architecture as the backbone is trained and validated on an augmented dataset. The modified architecture generalizes well with an accuracy of 90% for the WHO-prescribed handwashing steps even in an unseen environment. Our findings indicate that the approach can recognize even subtle hand movements in the video and can be used for gesture detection and classification in social robotics.
abstract_zh: 由于手部卫生不当，幼儿感染 COVID-19 等传染病的风险增加。一个自主的社会代理人在洗手时观察儿童并鼓励良好的洗手习惯，可以为洗手行为成为一种习惯提供机会。在本文中，我们提出了一种人类动作识别系统，它是社交机器人平台视觉系统的一部分，旨在帮助儿童养成正确的洗手技术。采用通道空间注意力双线性池 (CSAB) 框架的改进卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构，以 VGG-16 架构作为主干，在增强数据集上进行训练和验证。即使在看不见的环境中，修改后的架构也能很好地概括 WHO 规定的洗手步骤，准确率达到 90%。我们的研究结果表明，该方法甚至可以识别视频中细微的手部动作，并且可用于社交机器人中的手势检测和分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自主社交机器人的手部清洁动作检测系统，旨在帮助儿童养成正确的洗手习惯。
AI.motivation: 儿童因手部卫生不当容易感染传染病（如COVID-19），需通过社交机器人实时观察和引导以培养良好洗手习惯。
AI.method: 基于改进的卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，结合通道空间注意力双线性池化（CSAB）框架，以VGG-16为骨干网络，并在增强数据集上训练验证。
AI.result: 在未见过的环境中，系统对WHO规定的洗手步骤识别准确率达90%，可有效检测视频中的细微手部动作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于社交机器人中的手势检测与分类，能有效提升儿童洗手行为的规范性。

search_text: Handwashing Action Detection System for an Autonomous Social Robot 自主社交机器人洗手动作检测系统 Young children are at an increased risk of contracting contagious diseases such as COVID-19 due to improper hand hygiene. An autonomous social agent that observes children while handwashing and encourages good hand washing practices could provide an opportunity for handwashing behavior to become a habit. In this article, we present a human action recognition system, which is part of the vision system of a social robot platform, to assist children in developing a correct handwashing technique. A modified convolution neural network (CNN) architecture with Channel Spatial Attention Bilinear Pooling (CSAB) frame, with a VGG-16 architecture as the backbone is trained and validated on an augmented dataset. The modified architecture generalizes well with an accuracy of 90% for the WHO-prescribed handwashing steps even in an unseen environment. Our findings indicate that the approach can recognize even subtle hand movements in the video and can be used for gesture detection and classification in social robotics. 由于手部卫生不当，幼儿感染 COVID-19 等传染病的风险增加。一个自主的社会代理人在洗手时观察儿童并鼓励良好的洗手习惯，可以为洗手行为成为一种习惯提供机会。在本文中，我们提出了一种人类动作识别系统，它是社交机器人平台视觉系统的一部分，旨在帮助儿童养成正确的洗手技术。采用通道空间注意力双线性池 (CSAB) 框架的改进卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构，以 VGG-16 架构作为主干，在增强数据集上进行训练和验证。即使在看不见的环境中，修改后的架构也能很好地概括 WHO 规定的洗手步骤，准确率达到 90%。我们的研究结果表明，该方法甚至可以识别视频中细微的手部动作，并且可用于社交机器人中的手势检测和分类。 本文提出了一种用于自主社交机器人的手部清洁动作检测系统，旨在帮助儿童养成正确的洗手习惯。 Sreejith Sasidharan,Pranav Prabha,Devasena Pasupuleti,Anand M Das,Chaitanya Kapoor,Gayathri Manikutty,Praveen Pankajakshan,Bhavani Rao cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Prakhar Kulshreshtha,Konstantinos-Nektarios Lianos,Brian Pugh,Salma Jiddi
title: Layout Aware Inpainting for Automated Furniture Removal in Indoor Scenes
title_zh: 用于室内场景中自动拆除家具的布局感知修复
abstract: We address the problem of detecting and erasing furniture from a wide angle photograph of a room. Inpainting large regions of an indoor scene often results in geometric inconsistencies of background elements within the inpaint mask. To address this problem, we utilize perceptual information (e.g. instance segmentation, and room layout) to produce a geometrically consistent empty version of a room. We share important details to make this system viable, such as per-plane inpainting, automatic rectification, and texture refinement. We provide detailed ablation along with qualitative examples, justifying our design choices. We show an application of our system by removing real furniture from a room and redecorating it with virtual furniture.
summary: We address the problem of detecting and erasing furniture from a wide angle photograph of a room. Inpainting large regions of an indoor scene often results in geometric inconsistencies of background elements within the inpaint mask. To address this problem, we utilize perceptual information (e.g. instance segmentation, and room layout) to produce a geometrically consistent empty version of a room. We share important details to make this system viable, such as per-plane inpainting, automatic rectification, and texture refinement. We provide detailed ablation along with qualitative examples, justifying our design choices. We show an application of our system by removing real furniture from a room and redecorating it with virtual furniture.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了从房间的广角照片中检测和擦除家具的问题。对室内场景的大区域进行修复通常会导致修复蒙版内背景元素的几何不一致。为了解决这个问题，我们利用感知信息（例如实例分割和房间布局）来生成几何一致的空房间版本。我们分享了使该系统可行的重要细节，例如每平面修复、自动校正和纹理细化。我们提供详细的消融以及定性示例，证明我们的设计选择是合理的。我们通过从房间中移除真实家具并用虚拟家具重新装饰来展示我们系统的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于布局感知的修复方法，用于自动移除室内场景中的家具并生成几何一致的空房间图像。
AI.motivation: 传统修复方法在移除大区域家具时易导致背景几何不一致，需利用房间布局等感知信息实现更自然的修复结果。
AI.method: 结合实例分割与房间布局信息，采用逐平面修复、自动校正和纹理优化技术，通过消融实验验证设计有效性。
AI.result: 成功移除真实家具并生成几何一致的空房间，支持虚拟家具重新装饰，实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统可有效生成几何一致的空房间，为室内场景编辑提供实用工具。

authors_text: Chin-Yun Yu,Sung-Lin Yeh,György Fazekas,Hao Tang
title: Conditioning and Sampling in Variational Diffusion Models for Speech Super-Resolution
title_zh: 语音超分辨率变分扩散模型中的调节和采样
abstract: Recently, diffusion models (DMs) have been increasingly used in audio processing tasks, including speech super-resolution (SR), which aims to restore high-frequency content given low-resolution speech utterances. This is commonly achieved by conditioning the network of noise predictor with low-resolution audio. In this paper, we propose a novel sampling algorithm that communicates the information of the low-resolution audio via the reverse sampling process of DMs. The proposed method can be a drop-in replacement for the vanilla sampling process and can significantly improve the performance of the existing works. Moreover, by coupling the proposed sampling method with an unconditional DM, i.e., a DM with no auxiliary inputs to its noise predictor, we can generalize it to a wide range of SR setups. We also attain state-of-the-art results on the VCTK Multi-Speaker benchmark with this novel formulation.
summary: Recently, diffusion models (DMs) have been increasingly used in audio processing tasks, including speech super-resolution (SR), which aims to restore high-frequency content given low-resolution speech utterances. This is commonly achieved by conditioning the network of noise predictor with low-resolution audio. In this paper, we propose a novel sampling algorithm that communicates the information of the low-resolution audio via the reverse sampling process of DMs. The proposed method can be a drop-in replacement for the vanilla sampling process and can significantly improve the performance of the existing works. Moreover, by coupling the proposed sampling method with an unconditional DM, i.e., a DM with no auxiliary inputs to its noise predictor, we can generalize it to a wide range of SR setups. We also attain state-of-the-art results on the VCTK Multi-Speaker benchmark with this novel formulation.
abstract_zh: 最近，扩散模型（DM）越来越多地用于音频处理任务，包括语音超分辨率（SR），其目的是在给定低分辨率语音的情况下恢复高频内容。这通常是通过使用低分辨率音频调节噪声预测器网络来实现的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的采样算法，通过 DM 的反向采样过程来传达低分辨率音频的信息。所提出的方法可以直接替代普通采样过程，并且可以显着提高现有工作的性能。此外，通过将所提出的采样方法与无条件 DM（即噪声预测器没有辅助输入的 DM）相结合，我们可以将其推广到各种 SR 设置。我们还利用这种新颖的公式在 VCTK 多扬声器基准测试中获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于语音超分辨率的新型扩散模型采样算法，通过反向采样过程传递低分辨率音频信息以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语音超分辨率方法依赖于噪声预测器的低分辨率音频条件，但未充分利用反向采样过程中的信息传递机制，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型采样算法，在扩散模型的反向采样过程中嵌入低分辨率音频信息，并结合无条件扩散模型实现多场景适配。
AI.result: 在VCTK多说话人基准测试中达到语音超分辨率领域的最先进效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进采样过程的信息利用方式，显著提升了语音超分辨率性能，并具备良好的通用性。

authors_text: Shaunak A. Mehta,Yeunhee Kim,Joshua Hoegerman,Michael D. Bartlett,Dylan P. Losey
title: RISO: Combining Rigid Grippers with Soft Switchable Adhesives
title_zh: RISO：将刚性夹具与软可切换粘合剂相结合
abstract: Robot arms that assist humans should be able to pick up, move, and release everyday objects. Today's assistive robot arms use rigid grippers to pinch items between fingers; while these rigid grippers are well suited for large and heavy objects, they often struggle to grasp small, numerous, or delicate items (such as foods). Soft grippers cover the opposite end of the spectrum; these grippers use adhesives or change shape to wrap around small and irregular items, but cannot exert the large forces needed to manipulate heavy objects. In this paper we introduce RIgid-SOft (RISO) grippers that combine switchable soft adhesives with standard rigid mechanisms to enable a diverse range of robotic grasping. We develop RISO grippers by leveraging a novel class of soft materials that change adhesion force in real-time through pneumatically controlled shape and rigidity tuning. By mounting these soft adhesives on the bottom of rigid fingers, we create a gripper that can interact with objects using either purely rigid grasps (pinching the object) or purely soft grasps (adhering to the object). This increased capability requires additional decision making, and we therefore formulate a shared control approach that partially automates the motion of the robot arm. In practice, this controller aligns the RISO gripper while inferring which object the human wants to grasp and how the human wants to grasp that item. Our user study demonstrates that RISO grippers can pick up, move, and release household items from existing datasets, and that the system performs grasps more successfully and efficiently when sharing control between the human and robot. See videos here: https://youtu.be/5uLUkBYcnwg
summary: Robot arms that assist humans should be able to pick up, move, and release everyday objects. Today's assistive robot arms use rigid grippers to pinch items between fingers; while these rigid grippers are well suited for large and heavy objects, they often struggle to grasp small, numerous, or delicate items (such as foods). Soft grippers cover the opposite end of the spectrum; these grippers use adhesives or change shape to wrap around small and irregular items, but cannot exert the large forces needed to manipulate heavy objects. In this paper we introduce RIgid-SOft (RISO) grippers that combine switchable soft adhesives with standard rigid mechanisms to enable a diverse range of robotic grasping. We develop RISO grippers by leveraging a novel class of soft materials that change adhesion force in real-time through pneumatically controlled shape and rigidity tuning. By mounting these soft adhesives on the bottom of rigid fingers, we create a gripper that can interact with objects using either purely rigid grasps (pinching the object) or purely soft grasps (adhering to the object). This increased capability requires additional decision making, and we therefore formulate a shared control approach that partially automates the motion of the robot arm. In practice, this controller aligns the RISO gripper while inferring which object the human wants to grasp and how the human wants to grasp that item. Our user study demonstrates that RISO grippers can pick up, move, and release household items from existing datasets, and that the system performs grasps more successfully and efficiently when sharing control between the human and robot. See videos here: https://youtu.be/5uLUkBYcnwg
abstract_zh: 协助人类的机器人手臂应该能够拾取、移动和释放日常物体。如今的辅助机器人手臂使用刚性夹具来将物品夹在手指之间。虽然这些刚性夹具非常适合抓取大型和重型物体，但它们通常难以抓取小型、大量或精致的物体（例如食物）。软夹具涵盖了光谱的另一端；这些夹具使用粘合剂或改变形状来包裹小型和不规则的物品，但无法施加操纵重物所需的巨大力量。在本文中，我们介绍了 RIgid-SOft (RISO) 夹具，它将可切换的软粘合剂与标准刚性机构相结合，以实现各种机器人抓取。我们利用新型软材料开发 RISO 夹具，该材料通过气动控制形状和刚度调节来实时改变粘附力。通过将这些软粘合剂安装在刚性手指的底部，我们创建了一个可以使用纯刚性抓握（捏住物体）或纯软抓握（粘附到物体）与物体交互的夹具。这种能力的增强需要额外的决策，因此我们制定了一种共享控制方法，可以部分自动化机器人手臂的运动。在实践中，该控制器会对齐 RISO 夹具，同时推断人类想要抓取哪个物体以及人类想要如何抓取该物体。我们的用户研究表明，RISO 抓取器可以从现有数据集中拾取、移动和释放家居用品，并且当人类和机器人之间共享控制时，系统可以更成功、更高效地执行抓取操作。在此处观看视频：https://youtu.be/5uLUkBYcnwg

AI.tldr: 本文提出RISO夹爪，结合刚性夹持器与可切换软粘附材料，实现机器人对多种物体的抓取与操作。
AI.motivation: 现有刚性夹爪难以抓取小型或易碎物品，而软体夹爪无法处理重型物体，需开发兼具两者优势的新型夹爪。
AI.method: 利用可实时调节粘附力的软材料，通过气动控制形状与刚度，将软粘附材料安装在刚性指节底部，结合共享控制算法实现人机协同操作。
AI.result: 实验表明RISO夹爪能成功抓取家庭物品数据集中的物体，共享控制模式下抓取成功率与效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: RISO通过融合刚性与软体特性，扩展了机器人抓取能力，共享控制策略有效提升了人机协作效率。

authors_text: Heng Huang,Lin Zhao,Xintao Hu,Haixing Dai,Lu Zhang,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu
title: BI AVAN: Brain inspired Adversarial Visual Attention Network
title_zh: BI AVAN：受大脑启发的对抗性视觉注意网络
abstract: Visual attention is a fundamental mechanism in the human brain, and it inspires the design of attention mechanisms in deep neural networks. However, most of the visual attention studies adopted eye-tracking data rather than the direct measurement of brain activity to characterize human visual attention. In addition, the adversarial relationship between the attention-related objects and attention-neglected background in the human visual system was not fully exploited. To bridge these gaps, we propose a novel brain-inspired adversarial visual attention network (BI-AVAN) to characterize human visual attention directly from functional brain activity. Our BI-AVAN model imitates the biased competition process between attention-related/neglected objects to identify and locate the visual objects in a movie frame the human brain focuses on in an unsupervised manner. We use independent eye-tracking data as ground truth for validation and experimental results show that our model achieves robust and promising results when inferring meaningful human visual attention and mapping the relationship between brain activities and visual stimuli. Our BI-AVAN model contributes to the emerging field of leveraging the brain's functional architecture to inspire and guide the model design in artificial intelligence (AI), e.g., deep neural networks.
summary: Visual attention is a fundamental mechanism in the human brain, and it inspires the design of attention mechanisms in deep neural networks. However, most of the visual attention studies adopted eye-tracking data rather than the direct measurement of brain activity to characterize human visual attention. In addition, the adversarial relationship between the attention-related objects and attention-neglected background in the human visual system was not fully exploited. To bridge these gaps, we propose a novel brain-inspired adversarial visual attention network (BI-AVAN) to characterize human visual attention directly from functional brain activity. Our BI-AVAN model imitates the biased competition process between attention-related/neglected objects to identify and locate the visual objects in a movie frame the human brain focuses on in an unsupervised manner. We use independent eye-tracking data as ground truth for validation and experimental results show that our model achieves robust and promising results when inferring meaningful human visual attention and mapping the relationship between brain activities and visual stimuli. Our BI-AVAN model contributes to the emerging field of leveraging the brain's functional architecture to inspire and guide the model design in artificial intelligence (AI), e.g., deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 视觉注意力是人脑的基本机制，它启发了深层神经网络中注意力机制的设计。然而，大多数视觉注意力研究采用眼动追踪数据而不是直接测量大脑活动来表征人类视觉注意力。此外，人类视觉系统中与注意相关的物体和被注意忽视的背景之间的对抗关系没有得到充分利用。为了弥补这些差距，我们提出了一种新颖的受大脑启发的对抗性视觉注意网络（BI-AVAN），可以直接从功能性大脑活动中表征人类视觉注意力。我们的 BI-AVAN 模型模仿与注意力相关/被忽视的对象之间的有偏见的竞争过程，以无监督的方式识别和定位人脑关注的电影帧中的视觉对象。我们使用独立的眼球追踪数据作为验证的基本事实，实验结果表明，我们的模型在推断有意义的人类视觉注意力并绘制大脑活动与视觉刺激之间的关系时取得了稳健且有希望的结果。我们的 BI-AVAN 模型有助于利用大脑的功能架构来启发和指导人工智能 (AI)（例如深度神经网络）的模型设计这一新兴领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受大脑启发的对抗性视觉注意力网络（BI-AVAN），直接从功能性脑活动数据中表征人类视觉注意力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉注意力研究多依赖眼动数据而非直接测量脑活动，且未充分挖掘注意力对象与背景的对抗关系，需建立更贴近大脑机制的模型。
AI.method: BI-AVAN模拟大脑中注意力相关对象与忽视背景的对抗竞争过程，通过无监督学习识别视觉对象，并以独立眼动数据作为验证基准。
AI.result: 实验表明模型能稳健推断人类视觉注意力分布，并有效映射脑活动与视觉刺激间的关联关系。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为利用大脑功能架构指导AI模型设计提供了新范式，推动神经科学与人工智能的交叉融合。

authors_text: Abhishek Paudel
title: Motion Primitives based Path Planning with Rapidly-exploring Random Tree
title_zh: 基于运动基元的快速探索随机树路径规划
abstract: We present an approach that generates kinodynamically feasible paths for robots using Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT). We leverage motion primitives as a way to capture the dynamics of the robot and use these motion primitives to build branches of the tree with RRT. Since every branch is built using the robot's motion primitives that doesn't lead to collision with obstacles, the resulting path is guaranteed to satisfy the robot's kinodynamic constraints and thus be feasible for navigation without any post-processing on the generated trajectory. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in simulated 2D environments using simple robot models with a variety of motion primitives.
summary: We present an approach that generates kinodynamically feasible paths for robots using Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT). We leverage motion primitives as a way to capture the dynamics of the robot and use these motion primitives to build branches of the tree with RRT. Since every branch is built using the robot's motion primitives that doesn't lead to collision with obstacles, the resulting path is guaranteed to satisfy the robot's kinodynamic constraints and thus be feasible for navigation without any post-processing on the generated trajectory. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in simulated 2D environments using simple robot models with a variety of motion primitives.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用快速探索随机树（RRT）为机器人生成运动动力学可行路径的方法。我们利用运动原语作为捕获机器人动态的一种方式，并使用这些运动原语通过 RRT 构建树的分支。由于每个分支都是使用机器人的运动基元构建的，不会导致与障碍物发生碰撞，因此保证生成的路径满足机器人的运动动力学约束，从而无需对生成的轨迹进行任何后处理即可进行导航。我们使用具有各种运动原语的简单机器人模型在模拟 2D 环境中展示了我们的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运动原语的路径规划方法，结合快速探索随机树（RRT）生成满足机器人运动学和动力学约束的可行路径。
AI.motivation: 传统RRT算法生成的路径可能无法满足机器人动力学约束，需额外后处理。本文旨在通过运动原语直接构建满足动态特性的碰撞避免路径。
AI.method: 利用运动原语作为机器人动力学的离散表示，通过RRT算法构建树结构时仅使用无碰撞的运动原语分支，确保生成路径天然满足运动约束。
AI.result: 在二维模拟环境中验证了方法有效性，展示了多种运动原语下无需后处理即可生成可行路径的案例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过运动原语与RRT的结合，实现了兼顾动力学可行性与实时性的路径规划，为复杂环境下的机器人导航提供了新思路。

ai_content.motivation: 传统RRT算法生成的路径可能无法满足机器人动力学约束，需额外后处理。本文旨在通过运动原语直接构建满足动态特性的碰撞避免路径。

search_text: Motion Primitives based Path Planning with Rapidly-exploring Random Tree 基于运动基元的快速探索随机树路径规划 We present an approach that generates kinodynamically feasible paths for robots using Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT). We leverage motion primitives as a way to capture the dynamics of the robot and use these motion primitives to build branches of the tree with RRT. Since every branch is built using the robot's motion primitives that doesn't lead to collision with obstacles, the resulting path is guaranteed to satisfy the robot's kinodynamic constraints and thus be feasible for navigation without any post-processing on the generated trajectory. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in simulated 2D environments using simple robot models with a variety of motion primitives. 我们提出了一种使用快速探索随机树（RRT）为机器人生成运动动力学可行路径的方法。我们利用运动原语作为捕获机器人动态的一种方式，并使用这些运动原语通过 RRT 构建树的分支。由于每个分支都是使用机器人的运动基元构建的，不会导致与障碍物发生碰撞，因此保证生成的路径满足机器人的运动动力学约束，从而无需对生成的轨迹进行任何后处理即可进行导航。我们使用具有各种运动原语的简单机器人模型在模拟 2D 环境中展示了我们的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于运动原语的路径规划方法，结合快速探索随机树（RRT）生成满足机器人运动学和动力学约束的可行路径。 Abhishek Paudel cs.RO

authors_text: Fei Jia,Nithin Rao Koluguri,Jagadeesh Balam,Boris Ginsburg
title: A Compact End-to-End Model with Local and Global Context for Spoken Language Identification
title_zh: 具有本地和全局上下文的紧凑端到端模型，用于口语识别
abstract: We introduce TitaNet-LID, a compact end-to-end neural network for Spoken Language Identification (LID) that is based on the ContextNet architecture. TitaNet-LID employs 1D depth-wise separable convolutions and Squeeze-and-Excitation layers to effectively capture local and global context within an utterance. Despite its small size, TitaNet-LID achieves performance similar to state-of-the-art models on the VoxLingua107 dataset while being 10 times smaller. Furthermore, it can be easily adapted to new acoustic conditions and unseen languages through simple fine-tuning, achieving a state-of-the-art accuracy of 88.2% on the FLEURS benchmark. Our model is scalable and can achieve a better trade-off between accuracy and speed. TitaNet-LID performs well even on short utterances less than 5s in length, indicating its robustness to input length.
summary: We introduce TitaNet-LID, a compact end-to-end neural network for Spoken Language Identification (LID) that is based on the ContextNet architecture. TitaNet-LID employs 1D depth-wise separable convolutions and Squeeze-and-Excitation layers to effectively capture local and global context within an utterance. Despite its small size, TitaNet-LID achieves performance similar to state-of-the-art models on the VoxLingua107 dataset while being 10 times smaller. Furthermore, it can be easily adapted to new acoustic conditions and unseen languages through simple fine-tuning, achieving a state-of-the-art accuracy of 88.2% on the FLEURS benchmark. Our model is scalable and can achieve a better trade-off between accuracy and speed. TitaNet-LID performs well even on short utterances less than 5s in length, indicating its robustness to input length.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 TitaNet-LID，这是一种基于 ContextNet 架构的紧凑型端到端口语识别 (LID) 神经网络。 TitaNet-LID 采用一维深度可分离卷积和挤压和激励层来有效捕获话语中的局部和全局上下文。尽管尺寸很小，但 TitaNet-LID 在 VoxLingua107 数据集上实现了与最先进模型相似的性能，同时尺寸缩小了 10 倍。此外，它可以通过简单的微调轻松适应新的声学条件和看不见的语言，在 FLEURS 基准上实现 88.2% 的最先进准确率。我们的模型是可扩展的，可以在准确性和速度之间实现更好的权衡。 TitaNet-LID 即使在长度小于 5 秒的短话语上也表现良好，这表明它对输入长度的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于口语语言识别的紧凑型端到端神经网络模型TitaNet-LID，能够有效捕捉语音中的局部和全局上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 现有模型体积大且难以适应新语言和声学条件，需开发更高效且通用的口语语言识别模型。
AI.method: 基于ContextNet架构，采用1D深度可分离卷积和Squeeze-and-Excitation层，结合局部与全局上下文特征。
AI.result: 在VoxLingua107数据集上性能接近SOTA模型且体积缩小10倍，在FLEURS基准测试中达到88.2%准确率，对短语音具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TitaNet-LID在准确率与速度间取得良好平衡，具备强适应性，适用于实际场景中的多语言和多声学条件识别任务。

authors_text: Pamela Carreno-Medrano,Dana Kulić,Michael Burke
title: Adapting Neural Models with Sequential Monte Carlo Dropout
title_zh: 使用顺序蒙特卡罗 Dropout 调整神经模型
abstract: The ability to adapt to changing environments and settings is essential for robots acting in dynamic and unstructured environments or working alongside humans with varied abilities or preferences. This work introduces an extremely simple and effective approach to adapting neural models in response to changing settings. We first train a standard network using dropout, which is analogous to learning an ensemble of predictive models or distribution over predictions. At run-time, we use a particle filter to maintain a distribution over dropout masks to adapt the neural model to changing settings in an online manner. Experimental results show improved performance in control problems requiring both online and look-ahead prediction, and showcase the interpretability of the inferred masks in a human behaviour modelling task for drone teleoperation.
summary: The ability to adapt to changing environments and settings is essential for robots acting in dynamic and unstructured environments or working alongside humans with varied abilities or preferences. This work introduces an extremely simple and effective approach to adapting neural models in response to changing settings. We first train a standard network using dropout, which is analogous to learning an ensemble of predictive models or distribution over predictions. At run-time, we use a particle filter to maintain a distribution over dropout masks to adapt the neural model to changing settings in an online manner. Experimental results show improved performance in control problems requiring both online and look-ahead prediction, and showcase the interpretability of the inferred masks in a human behaviour modelling task for drone teleoperation.
abstract_zh: 适应不断变化的环境和设置的能力对于机器人在动态和非结构化环境中行动或与具有不同能力或偏好的人类一起工作至关重要。这项工作介绍了一种极其简单而有效的方法来调整神经模型以响应不断变化的设置。我们首先使用 dropout 训练一个标准网络，这类似于学习预测模型的集合或预测的分布。在运行时，我们使用粒子滤波器来维持丢弃掩模的分布，以使神经模型以在线方式适应不断变化的设置。实验结果表明，需要在线和前瞻预测的控制问题的性能得到提高，并展示了无人机遥操作人类行为建模任务中推断掩模的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于序贯蒙特卡洛dropout的神经模型适应方法，通过在线维护dropout掩码分布实现动态环境下的模型调整。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在动态环境和人类协作场景中实时适应变化，传统模型缺乏在线调整能力和可解释性。
AI.method: 训练阶段使用dropout构建预测分布，运行阶段通过粒子滤波器动态更新dropout掩码分布实现在线适应。
AI.result: 在需要在线预测的控制任务中性能提升，无人机遥操作任务中展现了掩码分布的可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以简洁框架实现了模型在线适应，同时保持了预测分布的可解释性，适用于动态环境下的决策场景。

authors_text: Mark Hallap,Emmanuel Dupoux,Ewan Dunbar
title: Evaluating context-invariance in unsupervised speech representations
title_zh: 评估无监督语音表示中的上下文不变性
abstract: Unsupervised speech representations have taken off, with benchmarks (SUPERB, ZeroSpeech) demonstrating major progress on semi-supervised speech recognition, speech synthesis, and speech-only language modelling. Inspiration comes from the promise of ``discovering the phonemes'' of a language or a similar low-bitrate encoding. However, one of the critical properties of phoneme transcriptions is context-invariance: the phonetic context of a speech sound can have massive influence on the way it is pronounced, while the text remains stable. This is what allows tokens of the same word to have the same transcriptions -- key to language understanding. Current benchmarks do not measure context-invariance. We develop a new version of the ZeroSpeech ABX benchmark that measures context-invariance, and apply it to recent self-supervised representations. We demonstrate that the context-independence of representations is predictive of the stability of word-level representations. We suggest research concentrate on improving context-independence of self-supervised and unsupervised representations.
summary: Unsupervised speech representations have taken off, with benchmarks (SUPERB, ZeroSpeech) demonstrating major progress on semi-supervised speech recognition, speech synthesis, and speech-only language modelling. Inspiration comes from the promise of ``discovering the phonemes'' of a language or a similar low-bitrate encoding. However, one of the critical properties of phoneme transcriptions is context-invariance: the phonetic context of a speech sound can have massive influence on the way it is pronounced, while the text remains stable. This is what allows tokens of the same word to have the same transcriptions -- key to language understanding. Current benchmarks do not measure context-invariance. We develop a new version of the ZeroSpeech ABX benchmark that measures context-invariance, and apply it to recent self-supervised representations. We demonstrate that the context-independence of representations is predictive of the stability of word-level representations. We suggest research concentrate on improving context-independence of self-supervised and unsupervised representations.
abstract_zh: 无监督语音表示已经起飞，基准测试（SUPERB、ZeroSpeech）展示了半监督语音识别、语音合成和纯语音语言建模方面的重大进展。灵感来自于“发现语言的音素”或类似的低比特率编码的承诺。然而，音素转录的关键特性之一是上下文不变性：语音的语音上下文可以对其发音方式产生巨大影响，而文本保持稳定。这就是允许同一单词的标记具有相同转录的原因——这是语言理解的关键。当前的基准测试不测量上下文不变性。我们开发了新版本的 ZeroSpeech ABX 基准测试，用于测量上下文不变性，并将其应用于最近的自我监督表示。我们证明，表示的上下文无关性可以预测词级表示的稳定性。我们建议研究重点是提高自监督和无监督表示的上下文无关性。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了新的ZeroSpeech ABX基准以评估无监督语音表示的上下文不变性，并分析其与词级表示稳定性的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有基准未衡量上下文不变性这一音素转录的关键属性，而该属性对语言理解至关重要。
AI.method: 改进ZeroSpeech ABX基准以测量上下文不变性，应用于最新自监督语音表示模型进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明表示的上下文独立性可预测词级表示稳定性，当前模型在此方面存在改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来研究应聚焦于提升自监督和无监督语音表示的上下文独立性以增强稳定性。

search_text: Evaluating context-invariance in unsupervised speech representations 评估无监督语音表示中的上下文不变性 Unsupervised speech representations have taken off, with benchmarks (SUPERB, ZeroSpeech) demonstrating major progress on semi-supervised speech recognition, speech synthesis, and speech-only language modelling. Inspiration comes from the promise of ``discovering the phonemes'' of a language or a similar low-bitrate encoding. However, one of the critical properties of phoneme transcriptions is context-invariance: the phonetic context of a speech sound can have massive influence on the way it is pronounced, while the text remains stable. This is what allows tokens of the same word to have the same transcriptions -- key to language understanding. Current benchmarks do not measure context-invariance. We develop a new version of the ZeroSpeech ABX benchmark that measures context-invariance, and apply it to recent self-supervised representations. We demonstrate that the context-independence of representations is predictive of the stability of word-level representations. We suggest research concentrate on improving context-independence of self-supervised and unsupervised representations. 无监督语音表示已经起飞，基准测试（SUPERB、ZeroSpeech）展示了半监督语音识别、语音合成和纯语音语言建模方面的重大进展。灵感来自于“发现语言的音素”或类似的低比特率编码的承诺。然而，音素转录的关键特性之一是上下文不变性：语音的语音上下文可以对其发音方式产生巨大影响，而文本保持稳定。这就是允许同一单词的标记具有相同转录的原因——这是语言理解的关键。当前的基准测试不测量上下文不变性。我们开发了新版本的 ZeroSpeech ABX 基准测试，用于测量上下文不变性，并将其应用于最近的自我监督表示。我们证明，表示的上下文无关性可以预测词级表示的稳定性。我们建议研究重点是提高自监督和无监督表示的上下文无关性。 本文开发了新的ZeroSpeech ABX基准以评估无监督语音表示的上下文不变性，并分析其与词级表示稳定性的关系。 Mark Hallap,Emmanuel Dupoux,Ewan Dunbar cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Giacomo Fiorentini,Itir Onal Ertugrul,Albert Ali Salah
title: Fully-attentive and interpretable: vision and video vision transformers for pain detection
title_zh: 全神贯注且可解释：用于疼痛检测的视觉和视频视觉转换器
abstract: Pain is a serious and costly issue globally, but to be treated, it must first be detected. Vision transformers are a top-performing architecture in computer vision, with little research on their use for pain detection. In this paper, we propose the first fully-attentive automated pain detection pipeline that achieves state-of-the-art performance on binary pain detection from facial expressions. The model is trained on the UNBC-McMaster dataset, after faces are 3D-registered and rotated to the canonical frontal view. In our experiments we identify important areas of the hyperparameter space and their interaction with vision and video vision transformers, obtaining 3 noteworthy models. We analyse the attention maps of one of our models, finding reasonable interpretations for its predictions. We also evaluate Mixup, an augmentation technique, and Sharpness-Aware Minimization, an optimizer, with no success. Our presented models, ViT-1 (F1 score 0.55 +- 0.15), ViViT-1 (F1 score 0.55 +- 0.13), and ViViT-2 (F1 score 0.49 +- 0.04), all outperform earlier works, showing the potential of vision transformers for pain detection. Code is available at https://github.com/IPDTFE/ViT-McMaster
summary: Pain is a serious and costly issue globally, but to be treated, it must first be detected. Vision transformers are a top-performing architecture in computer vision, with little research on their use for pain detection. In this paper, we propose the first fully-attentive automated pain detection pipeline that achieves state-of-the-art performance on binary pain detection from facial expressions. The model is trained on the UNBC-McMaster dataset, after faces are 3D-registered and rotated to the canonical frontal view. In our experiments we identify important areas of the hyperparameter space and their interaction with vision and video vision transformers, obtaining 3 noteworthy models. We analyse the attention maps of one of our models, finding reasonable interpretations for its predictions. We also evaluate Mixup, an augmentation technique, and Sharpness-Aware Minimization, an optimizer, with no success. Our presented models, ViT-1 (F1 score 0.55 +- 0.15), ViViT-1 (F1 score 0.55 +- 0.13), and ViViT-2 (F1 score 0.49 +- 0.04), all outperform earlier works, showing the potential of vision transformers for pain detection. Code is available at https://github.com/IPDTFE/ViT-McMaster
abstract_zh: 疼痛在全球范围内是一个严重且代价高昂的问题，但要治疗，必须首先检测到疼痛。视觉变换器是计算机视觉领域表现最好的架构，但对其用于疼痛检测的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了第一个完全专注的自动化疼痛检测管道，该管道在面部表情的二元疼痛检测方面实现了最先进的性能。在对人脸进行 3D 配准并将其旋转到规范的正面视图后，该模型在 UNNBC-McMaster 数据集上进行训练。在我们的实验中，我们确定了超参数空间的重要区域及其与视觉和视频视觉转换器的交互，获得了 3 个值得注意的模型。我们分析了其中一个模型的注意力图，为其预测找到合理的解释。我们还评估了 Mixup（一种增强技术）和 Sharpness-Aware Minimization（一种优化器），但没有成功。我们提出的模型 ViT-1（F1 得分 0.55 ± 0.15）、ViViT-1（F1 得分 0.55 ± 0.13）和 ViViT-2（F1 得分 0.49 ± 0.04）均优于早期作品，显示了视觉转换器在疼痛检测方面的潜力。代码可在 https://github.com/IPDTFE/ViT-McMaster 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer和视频视觉Transformer的全自动疼痛检测方法，通过面部表情实现二分类疼痛检测。
AI.motivation: 疼痛是全球性健康问题，但现有研究对视觉Transformer在疼痛检测中的应用探索不足，需开发高效且可解释的检测模型。
AI.method: 使用UNBC-McMaster数据集进行3D人脸对齐后，构建全注意力机制模型，分析超参数空间并开发三种模型（ViT-1、ViViT-1、ViViT-2），通过注意力图解释预测结果，同时评估Mixup和Sharpness-Aware Minimization技术。
AI.result: 三种模型在F1分数上均优于先前研究（ViT-1: 0.55±0.15，ViViT-1: 0.55±0.13，ViViT-2: 0.49±0.04），但增强技术和优化器未提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer在疼痛检测中展现潜力，但需进一步研究超参数优化和训练策略以提升稳定性与性能。

authors_text: Michael L. Littman,Ifeoma Ajunwa,Guy Berger,Craig Boutilier,Morgan Currie,Finale Doshi-Velez,Gillian Hadfield,Michael C. Horowitz,Charles Isbell,Hiroaki Kitano,Karen Levy,Terah Lyons,Melanie Mitchell,Julie Shah,Steven Sloman,Shannon Vallor,Toby Walsh
title: Gathering Strength, Gathering Storms: The One Hundred Year Study on Artificial Intelligence (AI100) 2021 Study Panel Report
title_zh: 凝聚力量，汇聚风暴：人工智能百年研究（AI100）2021年研究小组报告
abstract: In September 2021, the "One Hundred Year Study on Artificial Intelligence" project (AI100) issued the second report of its planned long-term periodic assessment of artificial intelligence (AI) and its impact on society. It was written by a panel of 17 study authors, each of whom is deeply rooted in AI research, chaired by Michael Littman of Brown University. The report, entitled "Gathering Strength, Gathering Storms," answers a set of 14 questions probing critical areas of AI development addressing the major risks and dangers of AI, its effects on society, its public perception and the future of the field. The report concludes that AI has made a major leap from the lab to people's lives in recent years, which increases the urgency to understand its potential negative effects. The questions were developed by the AI100 Standing Committee, chaired by Peter Stone of the University of Texas at Austin, consisting of a group of AI leaders with expertise in computer science, sociology, ethics, economics, and other disciplines.
summary: In September 2021, the "One Hundred Year Study on Artificial Intelligence" project (AI100) issued the second report of its planned long-term periodic assessment of artificial intelligence (AI) and its impact on society. It was written by a panel of 17 study authors, each of whom is deeply rooted in AI research, chaired by Michael Littman of Brown University. The report, entitled "Gathering Strength, Gathering Storms," answers a set of 14 questions probing critical areas of AI development addressing the major risks and dangers of AI, its effects on society, its public perception and the future of the field. The report concludes that AI has made a major leap from the lab to people's lives in recent years, which increases the urgency to understand its potential negative effects. The questions were developed by the AI100 Standing Committee, chaired by Peter Stone of the University of Texas at Austin, consisting of a group of AI leaders with expertise in computer science, sociology, ethics, economics, and other disciplines.
abstract_zh: 2021年9月，“人工智能百年研究”项目（AI100）发布了其计划对人工智能（AI）及其对社会影响进行长期定期评估的第二份报告。它是由 17 名研究作者组成的小组撰写的，每个作者都深深扎根于人工智能研究，由布朗大学的迈克尔·利特曼 (Michael Littman) 担任主席。这份题为《汇聚力量，汇聚风暴》的报告回答了探讨人工智能发展关键领域的 14 个问题，涉及人工智能的主要风险和危险、其对社会的影响、公众认知和该领域的未来。报告的结论是，近年来人工智能已经从实验室迈入人们的生活，这增加了了解其潜在负面影响的紧迫性。这些问题由 AI100 常务委员会制定，该委员会由德克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校的 Peter Stone 担任主席，由一群在计算机科学、社会学、伦理学、经济学和其他学科领域拥有专业知识的人工智能领导者组成。

AI.tldr: 该论文是AI100项目2021年发布的第二份报告，探讨人工智能的发展、风险及社会影响。
AI.motivation: 评估人工智能从实验室走向社会的进程，分析其潜在风险与挑战，以应对技术快速发展带来的社会影响。
AI.method: 由17位AI领域专家组成的小组，从计算机科学、社会学、伦理学等多学科角度回答14个关键问题。
AI.result: 人工智能已显著融入日常生活，但需更紧迫地理解其可能的负面影响，如伦理问题和社会变革。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁持续关注AI发展，加强跨学科合作，以确保技术进步符合社会利益并有效管理风险。

search_text: Gathering Strength, Gathering Storms: The One Hundred Year Study on Artificial Intelligence (AI100) 2021 Study Panel Report 凝聚力量，汇聚风暴：人工智能百年研究（AI100）2021年研究小组报告 In September 2021, the "One Hundred Year Study on Artificial Intelligence" project (AI100) issued the second report of its planned long-term periodic assessment of artificial intelligence (AI) and its impact on society. It was written by a panel of 17 study authors, each of whom is deeply rooted in AI research, chaired by Michael Littman of Brown University. The report, entitled "Gathering Strength, Gathering Storms," answers a set of 14 questions probing critical areas of AI development addressing the major risks and dangers of AI, its effects on society, its public perception and the future of the field. The report concludes that AI has made a major leap from the lab to people's lives in recent years, which increases the urgency to understand its potential negative effects. The questions were developed by the AI100 Standing Committee, chaired by Peter Stone of the University of Texas at Austin, consisting of a group of AI leaders with expertise in computer science, sociology, ethics, economics, and other disciplines. 2021年9月，“人工智能百年研究”项目（AI100）发布了其计划对人工智能（AI）及其对社会影响进行长期定期评估的第二份报告。它是由 17 名研究作者组成的小组撰写的，每个作者都深深扎根于人工智能研究，由布朗大学的迈克尔·利特曼 (Michael Littman) 担任主席。这份题为《汇聚力量，汇聚风暴》的报告回答了探讨人工智能发展关键领域的 14 个问题，涉及人工智能的主要风险和危险、其对社会的影响、公众认知和该领域的未来。报告的结论是，近年来人工智能已经从实验室迈入人们的生活，这增加了了解其潜在负面影响的紧迫性。这些问题由 AI100 常务委员会制定，该委员会由德克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校的 Peter Stone 担任主席，由一群在计算机科学、社会学、伦理学、经济学和其他学科领域拥有专业知识的人工智能领导者组成。 该论文是AI100项目2021年发布的第二份报告，探讨人工智能的发展、风险及社会影响。 Michael L. Littman,Ifeoma Ajunwa,Guy Berger,Craig Boutilier,Morgan Currie,Finale Doshi-Velez,Gillian Hadfield,Michael C. Horowitz,Charles Isbell,Hiroaki Kitano,Karen Levy,Terah Lyons,Melanie Mitchell,Julie Shah,Steven Sloman,Shannon Vallor,Toby Walsh cs.AI

authors_text: Noam Levi,Itay M. Bloch,Marat Freytsis,Tomer Volansky
title: Noise Injection Node Regularization for Robust Learning
title_zh: 用于鲁棒学习的噪声注入节点正则化
abstract: We introduce Noise Injection Node Regularization (NINR), a method of injecting structured noise into Deep Neural Networks (DNN) during the training stage, resulting in an emergent regularizing effect. We present theoretical and empirical evidence for substantial improvement in robustness against various test data perturbations for feed-forward DNNs when trained under NINR. The novelty in our approach comes from the interplay of adaptive noise injection and initialization conditions such that noise is the dominant driver of dynamics at the start of training. As it simply requires the addition of external nodes without altering the existing network structure or optimization algorithms, this method can be easily incorporated into many standard problem specifications. We find improved stability against a number of data perturbations, including domain shifts, with the most dramatic improvement obtained for unstructured noise, where our technique outperforms other existing methods such as Dropout or $L_2$ regularization, in some cases. We further show that desirable generalization properties on clean data are generally maintained.
summary: We introduce Noise Injection Node Regularization (NINR), a method of injecting structured noise into Deep Neural Networks (DNN) during the training stage, resulting in an emergent regularizing effect. We present theoretical and empirical evidence for substantial improvement in robustness against various test data perturbations for feed-forward DNNs when trained under NINR. The novelty in our approach comes from the interplay of adaptive noise injection and initialization conditions such that noise is the dominant driver of dynamics at the start of training. As it simply requires the addition of external nodes without altering the existing network structure or optimization algorithms, this method can be easily incorporated into many standard problem specifications. We find improved stability against a number of data perturbations, including domain shifts, with the most dramatic improvement obtained for unstructured noise, where our technique outperforms other existing methods such as Dropout or $L_2$ regularization, in some cases. We further show that desirable generalization properties on clean data are generally maintained.
abstract_zh: 我们引入噪声注入节点正则化（NINR），这是一种在训练阶段将结构化噪声注入深度神经网络（DNN）的方法，从而产生紧急的正则化效果。我们提出了理论和经验证据，证明前馈 DNN 在 NINR 下训练时，其针对各种测试数据扰动的鲁棒性得到了显着提高。我们方法的新颖性来自自适应噪声注入和初始化条件的相互作用，使得噪声是训练开始时动态的主要驱动因素。由于它只需要添加外部节点而无需改变现有的网络结构或优化算法，因此该方法可以轻松地纳入许多标准问题规范中。我们发现针对许多数据扰动（包括域移位）的稳定性得到了提高，对于非结构化噪声获得了最显着的改进，在某些情况下，我们的技术优于其他现有方法，例如 Dropout 或 $L_2$ 正则化。我们进一步表明，干净数据的理想泛化属性通常得到维持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为噪声注入节点正则化（NINR）的方法，通过在深度神经网络训练阶段注入结构化噪声，提升模型对测试数据扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如Dropout或L2正则化在处理数据扰动（如领域偏移）时效果有限，需探索更有效的正则化策略以增强模型稳定性。
AI.method: 在不改变网络结构和优化算法的前提下，通过注入外部节点实现自适应噪声注入，利用噪声在训练初期主导动态过程以增强正则化效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，NINR在多种数据扰动下表现更稳定，尤其在非结构化噪声场景中优于Dropout和L2正则化，同时保持对干净数据的良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: NINR是一种简单有效的鲁棒学习方法，通过噪声注入机制可广泛适用于标准问题设定，为提升模型抗扰动能力提供新思路。

authors_text: Mahdi Bonyani,Maryam Soleymani
title: Towards Improving Workers' Safety and Progress Monitoring of Construction Sites Through Construction Site Understanding
title_zh: 通过了解施工现场来提高工人的安全和施工现场的进度监控
abstract: An important component of computer vision research is object detection. In recent years, there has been tremendous progress in the study of construction site images. However, there are obvious problems in construction object detection, including complex backgrounds, varying-sized objects, and poor imaging quality. In the state-of-the-art approaches, elaborate attention mechanisms are developed to handle space-time features, but rarely address the importance of channel-wise feature adjustments. We propose a lightweight Optimized Positioning (OP) module to improve channel relation based on global feature affinity association, which can be used to determine the Optimized weights adaptively for each channel. OP first computes the intermediate optimized position by comparing each channel with the remaining channels for a given set of feature maps. A weighted aggregation of all the channels will then be used to represent each channel. The OP-Net module is a general deep neural network module that can be plugged into any deep neural network. Algorithms that utilize deep learning have demonstrated their ability to identify a wide range of objects from images nearly in real time. Machine intelligence can potentially benefit the construction industry by automatically analyzing productivity and monitoring safety using algorithms that are linked to construction images. The benefits of on-site automatic monitoring are immense when it comes to hazard prevention. Construction monitoring tasks can also be automated once construction objects have been correctly recognized. Object detection task in construction site images is experimented with extensively to demonstrate its efficacy and effectiveness. A benchmark test using SODA demonstrated that our OP-Net was capable of achieving new state-of-the-art performance in accuracy while maintaining a reasonable computational overhead.
summary: An important component of computer vision research is object detection. In recent years, there has been tremendous progress in the study of construction site images. However, there are obvious problems in construction object detection, including complex backgrounds, varying-sized objects, and poor imaging quality. In the state-of-the-art approaches, elaborate attention mechanisms are developed to handle space-time features, but rarely address the importance of channel-wise feature adjustments. We propose a lightweight Optimized Positioning (OP) module to improve channel relation based on global feature affinity association, which can be used to determine the Optimized weights adaptively for each channel. OP first computes the intermediate optimized position by comparing each channel with the remaining channels for a given set of feature maps. A weighted aggregation of all the channels will then be used to represent each channel. The OP-Net module is a general deep neural network module that can be plugged into any deep neural network. Algorithms that utilize deep learning have demonstrated their ability to identify a wide range of objects from images nearly in real time. Machine intelligence can potentially benefit the construction industry by automatically analyzing productivity and monitoring safety using algorithms that are linked to construction images. The benefits of on-site automatic monitoring are immense when it comes to hazard prevention. Construction monitoring tasks can also be automated once construction objects have been correctly recognized. Object detection task in construction site images is experimented with extensively to demonstrate its efficacy and effectiveness. A benchmark test using SODA demonstrated that our OP-Net was capable of achieving new state-of-the-art performance in accuracy while maintaining a reasonable computational overhead.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉研究的一个重要组成部分是目标检测。近年来，建筑工地图像的研究取得了巨大进展。然而，建筑物体检测存在明显的问题，包括背景复杂、物体大小不一、成像质量差等。在最先进的方法中，开发了复杂的注意机制来处理时空特征，但很少解决通道方面特征调整的重要性。我们提出了一种轻量级的优化定位（OP）模块来改善基于全局特征关联关联的通道关系，该模块可用于自适应地确定每个通道的优化权重。 OP 首先通过将给定特征图集的每个通道与剩余通道进行比较来计算中间优化位置。然后将使用所有通道的加权聚合来表示每个通道。 OP-Net模块是一个通用的深度神经网络模块，可以插入到任何深度神经网络中。利用深度学习的算法已经证明了它们几乎实时地从图像中识别各种对象的能力。机器智能可以通过使用与施工图像链接的算法自动分析生产力和监控安全性，从而使建筑行业受益。在危险预防方面，现场自动监控的好处是巨大的。一旦正确识别了施工对象，施工监控任务也可以自动化。建筑工地图像中的目标检测任务经过广泛的实验，以证明其功效和有效性。使用 SODA 的基准测试表明，我们的 OP-Net 能够在准确度方面实现新的最先进的性能，同时保持合理的计算开销。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进计算机视觉中的物体检测技术，提升建筑工地工人安全性和工程进度监测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑工地图像物体检测方法面临复杂背景、物体尺寸差异大及成像质量差等问题，且现有注意力机制未充分优化通道级特征调整。
AI.method: 提出轻量级优化定位（OP）模块，通过全局特征关联计算通道间优化权重，实现通道关系自适应调整，并构建可插拔的OP-Net网络模块。
AI.result: 在SODA基准测试中，OP-Net在保持合理计算开销的同时达到新的最先进检测精度水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了建筑工地图像检测难题，为工地安全监控与施工进度自动化分析提供了可靠技术支撑。

A benchmark test using SODA demonstrated that our OP-Net was capable of achieving new state-of-the-art performance in accuracy while maintaining a reasonable computational overhead. 计算机视觉研究的一个重要组成部分是目标检测。近年来，建筑工地图像的研究取得了巨大进展。然而，建筑物体检测存在明显的问题，包括背景复杂、物体大小不一、成像质量差等。在最先进的方法中，开发了复杂的注意机制来处理时空特征，但很少解决通道方面特征调整的重要性。我们提出了一种轻量级的优化定位（OP）模块来改善基于全局特征关联关联的通道关系，该模块可用于自适应地确定每个通道的优化权重。 OP 首先通过将给定特征图集的每个通道与剩余通道进行比较来计算中间优化位置。然后将使用所有通道的加权聚合来表示每个通道。 OP-Net模块是一个通用的深度神经网络模块，可以插入到任何深度神经网络中。利用深度学习的算法已经证明了它们几乎实时地从图像中识别各种对象的能力。机器智能可以通过使用与施工图像链接的算法自动分析生产力和监控安全性，从而使建筑行业受益。在危险预防方面，现场自动监控的好处是巨大的。一旦正确识别了施工对象，施工监控任务也可以自动化。建筑工地图像中的目标检测任务经过广泛的实验，以证明其功效和有效性。使用 SODA 的基准测试表明，我们的 OP-Net 能够在准确度方面实现新的最先进的性能，同时保持合理的计算开销。 本文旨在通过改进计算机视觉中的物体检测技术，提升建筑工地工人安全性和工程进度监测能力。 Mahdi Bonyani,Maryam Soleymani cs.CV

authors_text: Ewan Dunbar,Nicolas Hamilakis,Emmanuel Dupoux
title: Self-supervised language learning from raw audio: Lessons from the Zero Resource Speech Challenge
title_zh: 从原始音频中进行自我监督语言学习：零资源语音挑战的经验教训
comment: ef:Journal: IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing Publication Date: OCTOBER 2022 Volume: 16, Issue: 6 On Page(s): 1211-1226 Print ISSN: 1932-4553 Online ISSN: 1941-0484 Digital Object Identifier: 10.1109/JSTSP.2022.3206084
comments: ef:Journal: IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Signal Processing Publication Date: OCTOBER 2022 Volume: 16, Issue: 6 On Page(s): 1211-1226 Print ISSN: 1932-4553 Online ISSN: 1941-0484 Digital Object Identifier: 10.1109/JSTSP.2022.3206084
abstract: Recent progress in self-supervised or unsupervised machine learning has opened the possibility of building a full speech processing system from raw audio without using any textual representations or expert labels such as phonemes, dictionaries or parse trees. The contribution of the Zero Resource Speech Challenge series since 2015 has been to break down this long-term objective into four well-defined tasks -- Acoustic Unit Discovery, Spoken Term Discovery, Discrete Resynthesis, and Spoken Language Modeling -- and introduce associated metrics and benchmarks enabling model comparison and cumulative progress. We present an overview of the six editions of this challenge series since 2015, discuss the lessons learned, and outline the areas which need more work or give puzzling results.
summary: Recent progress in self-supervised or unsupervised machine learning has opened the possibility of building a full speech processing system from raw audio without using any textual representations or expert labels such as phonemes, dictionaries or parse trees. The contribution of the Zero Resource Speech Challenge series since 2015 has been to break down this long-term objective into four well-defined tasks -- Acoustic Unit Discovery, Spoken Term Discovery, Discrete Resynthesis, and Spoken Language Modeling -- and introduce associated metrics and benchmarks enabling model comparison and cumulative progress. We present an overview of the six editions of this challenge series since 2015, discuss the lessons learned, and outline the areas which need more work or give puzzling results.
abstract_zh: 自监督或无监督机器学习的最新进展使得从原始音频构建完整的语音处理系统成为可能，而无需使用任何文本表示或专家标签（例如音素、词典或解析树）。自 2015 年以来，零资源语音挑战系列的贡献是将这一长期目标分解为四个明确定义的任务——声学单元发现、口语术语发现、离散再合成和口语建模——并引入相关的指标和基准，以实现模型比较和累积进展。我们概述了自 2015 年以来该挑战系列的六个版本，讨论了经验教训，并概述了需要更多工作或给出令人困惑的结果的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了自2015年以来Zero Resource Speech Challenge系列竞赛的成果，讨论了从原始音频中进行自监督语言学习的四个核心任务及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统语音处理依赖文本标注和专家标签，而自监督学习可突破这一限制，实现无需人工标注的端到端语音处理系统。
AI.method: 通过分解长期目标为四个明确任务（声学单元发现、口语术语发现、离散重合成、口语语言建模），并引入标准化评估指标和基准数据集。
AI.result: 六届竞赛显示模型在无监督场景下取得进展，但部分任务（如离散重合成）仍存在性能瓶颈，需进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习为语音处理开辟新路径，但需解决数据效率、跨语言泛化及生成质量等关键挑战。

authors_text: Gellért Weisz,András György,Tadashi Kozuno,Csaba Szepesvári
title: Confident Approximate Policy Iteration for Efficient Local Planning in $q^π$-realizable MDPs
title_zh: $q^π$-可实现的 MDP 中有效局部规划的置信近似策略迭代
abstract: We consider approximate dynamic programming in $γ$-discounted Markov decision processes and apply it to approximate planning with linear value-function approximation. Our first contribution is a new variant of Approximate Policy Iteration (API), called Confident Approximate Policy Iteration (CAPI), which computes a deterministic stationary policy with an optimal error bound scaling linearly with the product of the effective horizon $H$ and the worst-case approximation error $ε$ of the action-value functions of stationary policies. This improvement over API (whose error scales with $H^2$) comes at the price of an $H$-fold increase in memory cost. Unlike Scherrer and Lesner [2012], who recommended computing a non-stationary policy to achieve a similar improvement (with the same memory overhead), we are able to stick to stationary policies. This allows for our second contribution, the application of CAPI to planning with local access to a simulator and $d$-dimensional linear function approximation. As such, we design a planning algorithm that applies CAPI to obtain a sequence of policies with successively refined accuracies on a dynamically evolving set of states. The algorithm outputs an $\tilde O(\sqrt{d}Hε)$-optimal policy after issuing $\tilde O(dH^4/ε^2)$ queries to the simulator, simultaneously achieving the optimal accuracy bound and the best known query complexity bound, while earlier algorithms in the literature achieve only one of them. This query complexity is shown to be tight in all parameters except $H$. These improvements come at the expense of a mild (polynomial) increase in memory and computational costs of both the algorithm and its output policy.
summary: We consider approximate dynamic programming in $γ$-discounted Markov decision processes and apply it to approximate planning with linear value-function approximation. Our first contribution is a new variant of Approximate Policy Iteration (API), called Confident Approximate Policy Iteration (CAPI), which computes a deterministic stationary policy with an optimal error bound scaling linearly with the product of the effective horizon $H$ and the worst-case approximation error $ε$ of the action-value functions of stationary policies. This improvement over API (whose error scales with $H^2$) comes at the price of an $H$-fold increase in memory cost. Unlike Scherrer and Lesner [2012], who recommended computing a non-stationary policy to achieve a similar improvement (with the same memory overhead), we are able to stick to stationary policies. This allows for our second contribution, the application of CAPI to planning with local access to a simulator and $d$-dimensional linear function approximation. As such, we design a planning algorithm that applies CAPI to obtain a sequence of policies with successively refined accuracies on a dynamically evolving set of states. The algorithm outputs an $\tilde O(\sqrt{d}Hε)$-optimal policy after issuing $\tilde O(dH^4/ε^2)$ queries to the simulator, simultaneously achieving the optimal accuracy bound and the best known query complexity bound, while earlier algorithms in the literature achieve only one of them. This query complexity is shown to be tight in all parameters except $H$. These improvements come at the expense of a mild (polynomial) increase in memory and computational costs of both the algorithm and its output policy.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑$γ$折扣马尔可夫决策过程中的近似动态规划，并将其应用于具有线性值函数近似的近似规划。我们的第一个贡献是近似策略迭代（API）的一个新变体，称为置信近似策略迭代（CAPI），它计算确定性静态策略，其最佳误差界限与静态策略的动作价值函数的有效范围 $H$ 和最坏情况近似误差 $ε$ 的乘积线性缩放。相对于 API（其错误与 $H^2$ 成比例）的这种改进是以内存成本增加 $H$ 倍为代价的。 Scherrer 和 Lesner [2012] 建议计算非平稳策略来实现类似的改进（具有相同的内存开销），与此不同的是，我们能够坚持固定策略。这使得我们的第二个贡献成为可能，即通过本地访问模拟器和 $d$ 维线性函数逼近来应用 CAPI 进行规划。因此，我们设计了一种规划算法，该算法应用 CAPI 来获取一系列策略，这些策略在一组动态演变的状态上具有连续精确的精度。该算法在向模拟器发出 $\tilde O(dH^4/ε^2)$ 查询后输出 $\tilde O(\sqrt{d}Hε)$ 最优策略，同时实现最佳精度范围和已知查询复杂度范围，而文献中的早期算法仅实现其中之一。该查询复杂性在除 $H$ 之外的所有参数中都很严格。这些改进是以算法及其输出策略的内存和计算成本轻微（多项式）增加为代价的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Confident Approximate Policy Iteration (CAPI)的近似策略迭代新方法，用于在q^π可实现的马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）中实现高效的局部规划。
AI.motivation: 传统近似策略迭代（API）的误差随有效时域H平方增长，且需非平稳策略以降低误差。本文旨在设计一种在保持平稳策略的同时，降低误差并优化查询复杂度的算法。
AI.method: 提出CAPI算法，通过确定性平稳策略将误差上界线性缩放至H与近似误差ε的乘积，并结合局部模拟器访问和d维线性函数逼近，设计动态调整状态集的规划算法。
AI.result: 算法在O(dH^4/ε²)次模拟器查询后输出近似最优策略，同时达到最优精度界和已知最佳查询复杂度界（除H外参数紧致）。
AI.conclusion: CAPI在保持平稳策略的前提下，实现了误差与查询效率的双重优化，代价是算法和策略的内存及计算成本轻微多项式增长。

The algorithm outputs an $\tilde O(\sqrt{d}Hε)$-optimal policy after issuing $\tilde O(dH^4/ε^2)$ queries to the simulator, simultaneously achieving the optimal accuracy bound and the best known query complexity bound, while earlier algorithms in the literature achieve only one of them. This query complexity is shown to be tight in all parameters except $H$. These improvements come at the expense of a mild (polynomial) increase in memory and computational costs of both the algorithm and its output policy. 我们考虑$γ$折扣马尔可夫决策过程中的近似动态规划，并将其应用于具有线性值函数近似的近似规划。我们的第一个贡献是近似策略迭代（API）的一个新变体，称为置信近似策略迭代（CAPI），它计算确定性静态策略，其最佳误差界限与静态策略的动作价值函数的有效范围 $H$ 和最坏情况近似误差 $ε$ 的乘积线性缩放。相对于 API（其错误与 $H^2$ 成比例）的这种改进是以内存成本增加 $H$ 倍为代价的。 Scherrer 和 Lesner [2012] 建议计算非平稳策略来实现类似的改进（具有相同的内存开销），与此不同的是，我们能够坚持固定策略。这使得我们的第二个贡献成为可能，即通过本地访问模拟器和 $d$ 维线性函数逼近来应用 CAPI 进行规划。因此，我们设计了一种规划算法，该算法应用 CAPI 来获取一系列策略，这些策略在一组动态演变的状态上具有连续精确的精度。该算法在向模拟器发出 $\tilde O(dH^4/ε^2)$ 查询后输出 $\tilde O(\sqrt{d}Hε)$ 最优策略，同时实现最佳精度范围和已知查询复杂度范围，而文献中的早期算法仅实现其中之一。该查询复杂性在除 $H$ 之外的所有参数中都很严格。这些改进是以算法及其输出策略的内存和计算成本轻微（多项式）增加为代价的。 本文提出了一种名为Confident Approximate Policy Iteration (CAPI)的近似策略迭代新方法，用于在q^π可实现的马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）中实现高效的局部规划。 Gellért Weisz,András György,Tadashi Kozuno,Csaba Szepesvári cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Alice Baird,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Jeffrey A. Brooks,Christopher B. Gregory,Björn Schuller,Anton Batliner,Dacher Keltner,Alan Cowen
title: Proceedings of the ACII Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop and Competition 2022 (A-VB): Understanding a critically understudied modality of emotional expression
title_zh: 2022 年 ACII 情感声音爆发研讨会和比赛 (A-VB) 论文集：理解一种经过严格研究的情感表达方式
abstract: This is the Proceedings of the ACII Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop and Competition (A-VB). A-VB was a workshop-based challenge that introduces the problem of understanding emotional expression in vocal bursts -- a wide range of non-verbal vocalizations that includes laughs, grunts, gasps, and much more. With affective states informing both mental and physical wellbeing, the core focus of the A-VB workshop was the broader discussion of current strategies in affective computing for modeling vocal emotional expression. Within this first iteration of the A-VB challenge, the participants were presented with four emotion-focused sub-challenges that utilize the large-scale and `in-the-wild' Hume-VB dataset. The dataset and the four sub-challenges draw attention to new innovations in emotion science as it pertains to vocal expression, addressing low- and high-dimensional theories of emotional expression, cultural variation, and `call types' (laugh, cry, sigh, etc.).
summary: This is the Proceedings of the ACII Affective Vocal Bursts Workshop and Competition (A-VB). A-VB was a workshop-based challenge that introduces the problem of understanding emotional expression in vocal bursts -- a wide range of non-verbal vocalizations that includes laughs, grunts, gasps, and much more. With affective states informing both mental and physical wellbeing, the core focus of the A-VB workshop was the broader discussion of current strategies in affective computing for modeling vocal emotional expression. Within this first iteration of the A-VB challenge, the participants were presented with four emotion-focused sub-challenges that utilize the large-scale and `in-the-wild' Hume-VB dataset. The dataset and the four sub-challenges draw attention to new innovations in emotion science as it pertains to vocal expression, addressing low- and high-dimensional theories of emotional expression, cultural variation, and `call types' (laugh, cry, sigh, etc.).
abstract_zh: 这是 ACII 情感声音爆发研讨会和比赛 (A-VB) 的会议记录。 A-VB 是一项基于研讨会的挑战，介绍了理解突发声音中的情感表达的问题——各种非语言发声，包括笑声、咕哝声、喘息声等。由于情感状态影响心理和身体健康，A-VB 研讨会的核心焦点是对当前情感计算建模声音情感表达的策略进行更广泛的讨论。在 A-VB 挑战的第一次迭代中，参与者面临四个以情感为中心的子挑战，这些挑战利用了大规模的“野外”Hume-VB 数据集。该数据集和四个子挑战引起了人们对情感科学新创新的关注，因为它涉及声音表达、解决情感表达的低维和高维理论、文化差异和“呼叫类型”（笑、哭、叹息等）。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了ACII情感语音爆发研讨会和竞赛（A-VB）的主要任务，旨在通过非语言性语音爆发（如笑声、呻吟等）理解情感表达，并利用Hume-VB数据集进行四类情感子挑战。
AI.motivation: 情感表达的非语言性语音爆发是情感计算领域中被严重忽视的模态，研究其有助于提升对心理健康与生理状态的理解，并推动情感科学的创新。
AI.method: 通过组织研讨会和竞赛，利用大规模真实场景数据集Hume-VB，设置四类子挑战，探索低维与高维情感表达理论、文化差异及不同‘呼叫类型’（如笑声、哭泣等）的建模方法。
AI.result: 研讨会促进了情感计算领域对语音爆发情感表达的创新研究，揭示了不同理论框架和文化背景下的情感表达差异，并推动了相关技术的发展。
AI.conclusion: A-VB研讨会为情感计算提供了新的研究方向，强调了语音爆发作为情感表达模态的重要性，未来需进一步探索跨文化及多维度的情感建模方法。

authors_text: Xingyu Lin,Carl Qi,Yunchu Zhang,Zhiao Huang,Katerina Fragkiadaki,Yunzhu Li,Chuang Gan,David Held
title: Planning with Spatial-Temporal Abstraction from Point Clouds for Deformable Object Manipulation
title_zh: 利用点云的时空抽象进行规划以实现可变形对象的操作
comment: Published at the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL 2022)
comments: Published at the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL 2022)
abstract: Effective planning of long-horizon deformable object manipulation requires suitable abstractions at both the spatial and temporal levels. Previous methods typically either focus on short-horizon tasks or make strong assumptions that full-state information is available, which prevents their use on deformable objects. In this paper, we propose PlAnning with Spatial-Temporal Abstraction (PASTA), which incorporates both spatial abstraction (reasoning about objects and their relations to each other) and temporal abstraction (reasoning over skills instead of low-level actions). Our framework maps high-dimension 3D observations such as point clouds into a set of latent vectors and plans over skill sequences on top of the latent set representation. We show that our method can effectively perform challenging sequential deformable object manipulation tasks in the real world, which require combining multiple tool-use skills such as cutting with a knife, pushing with a pusher, and spreading the dough with a roller.
summary: Effective planning of long-horizon deformable object manipulation requires suitable abstractions at both the spatial and temporal levels. Previous methods typically either focus on short-horizon tasks or make strong assumptions that full-state information is available, which prevents their use on deformable objects. In this paper, we propose PlAnning with Spatial-Temporal Abstraction (PASTA), which incorporates both spatial abstraction (reasoning about objects and their relations to each other) and temporal abstraction (reasoning over skills instead of low-level actions). Our framework maps high-dimension 3D observations such as point clouds into a set of latent vectors and plans over skill sequences on top of the latent set representation. We show that our method can effectively perform challenging sequential deformable object manipulation tasks in the real world, which require combining multiple tool-use skills such as cutting with a knife, pushing with a pusher, and spreading the dough with a roller.
abstract_zh: 长视距可变形物体操纵的有效规划需要在空间和时间层面上进行适当的抽象。以前的方法通常要么关注短期任务，要么强烈假设全状态信息可用，这阻止了它们在可变形物体上的使用。在本文中，我们提出了时空抽象规划（PASTA），它结合了空间抽象（对对象及其相互关系的推理）和时间抽象（对技能而不是低级动作的推理）。我们的框架将高维 3D 观察结果（例如点云）映射到一组潜在向量中，并在潜在集表示之上规划技能序列。我们证明，我们的方法可以有效地执行现实世界中具有挑战性的顺序可变形物体操纵任务，这需要结合多种工具使用技能，例如用刀切割、用推杆推动以及用滚筒铺开面团。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于点云的空间-时间抽象规划方法（PASTA），用于解决可变形物体的长期操作任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理可变形物体操作时，要么局限于短期任务，要么依赖完整的状态信息，难以实际应用。
AI.method: 通过将高维3D点云观测映射为潜在向量，结合空间抽象（物体关系推理）和时间抽象（技能序列规划）进行操作规划。
AI.result: 方法成功实现了需要组合多种工具技能（如切割、推动、擀压）的复杂可变形物体操作任务。
AI.conclusion: PASTA通过空间-时间联合抽象，有效解决了可变形物体操作中长期规划与部分可观测状态的挑战。

authors_text: Prateek Verma,Chris Chafe,Jonathan Berger
title: One-Shot Acoustic Matching Of Audio Signals -- Learning to Hear Music In Any Room/ Concert Hall
title_zh: 音频信号的一次性声学匹配——学习在任何房间/音乐厅聆听音乐
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure; fixed up broken url; added acknowledgments
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure; fixed up broken url; added acknowledgments
abstract: The acoustic space in which a sound is created and heard plays an essential role in how that sound is perceived by affording a unique sense of \textit{presence}. Every sound we hear results from successive convolution operations intrinsic to the sound source and external factors such as microphone characteristics and room impulse responses. Typically, researchers use an excitation such as a pistol shot or balloon pop as an impulse signal with which an auralization can be created. The room "impulse" responses convolved with the signal of interest can transform the input sound into the sound played in the acoustic space of interest. Here we propose a novel architecture that can transform a sound of interest into any other acoustic space(room or hall) of interest by using arbitrary audio recorded as a proxy for a balloon pop. The architecture is grounded in simple signal processing ideas to learn residual signals from a learned acoustic signature and the input signal. Our framework allows a neural network to adjust gains of every point in the time-frequency representation, giving sound qualitative and quantitative results.
summary: The acoustic space in which a sound is created and heard plays an essential role in how that sound is perceived by affording a unique sense of \textit{presence}. Every sound we hear results from successive convolution operations intrinsic to the sound source and external factors such as microphone characteristics and room impulse responses. Typically, researchers use an excitation such as a pistol shot or balloon pop as an impulse signal with which an auralization can be created. The room "impulse" responses convolved with the signal of interest can transform the input sound into the sound played in the acoustic space of interest. Here we propose a novel architecture that can transform a sound of interest into any other acoustic space(room or hall) of interest by using arbitrary audio recorded as a proxy for a balloon pop. The architecture is grounded in simple signal processing ideas to learn residual signals from a learned acoustic signature and the input signal. Our framework allows a neural network to adjust gains of every point in the time-frequency representation, giving sound qualitative and quantitative results.
abstract_zh: 产生和听到声音的声学空间通过提供独特的\textit{存在}感，在如何感知声音方面发挥着重要作用。我们听到的每一个声音都是声源固有的连续卷积运算和外部因素（例如麦克风特性和房间脉冲响应）的结果。通常，研究人员使用手枪射击或气球爆炸等激励作为脉冲信号，通过该信号可以产生可听度。与感兴趣的信号卷积的房间“脉冲”响应可以将输入声音转换成在感兴趣的声学空间中播放的声音。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，可以通过使用录制的任意音频作为气球爆裂的代理，将感兴趣的声音转换为任何其他感兴趣的声学空间（房间或大厅）。该架构基于简单的信号处理思想，从学习的声学特征和输入信号中学习残留信号。我们的框架允许神经网络调整时频表示中每个点的增益，给出合理的定性和定量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经网络架构，能够利用任意音频信号作为代理，将目标声音转换为任意声学环境（如房间或音乐厅）中的声音。
AI.motivation: 传统声学匹配方法依赖特定冲击信号（如气球爆破声）生成房间脉冲响应，存在场景适应性差和数据获取受限的问题。
AI.method: 基于信号处理思想设计神经网络，通过学习声学特征与输入信号的残差，动态调整时频域增益参数实现声学空间转换。
AI.result: 框架在定性和定量实验中均能有效实现声音到目标声学环境的转换，且无需依赖特定冲击信号。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统声学匹配对特定冲击信号的依赖，为跨场景音频渲染提供了更灵活的解决方案。

search_text: One-Shot Acoustic Matching Of Audio Signals -- Learning to Hear Music In Any Room/ Concert Hall 音频信号的一次性声学匹配——学习在任何房间/音乐厅聆听音乐 The acoustic space in which a sound is created and heard plays an essential role in how that sound is perceived by affording a unique sense of \textit{presence}. Every sound we hear results from successive convolution operations intrinsic to the sound source and external factors such as microphone characteristics and room impulse responses. Typically, researchers use an excitation such as a pistol shot or balloon pop as an impulse signal with which an auralization can be created. The room "impulse" responses convolved with the signal of interest can transform the input sound into the sound played in the acoustic space of interest. Here we propose a novel architecture that can transform a sound of interest into any other acoustic space(room or hall) of interest by using arbitrary audio recorded as a proxy for a balloon pop. The architecture is grounded in simple signal processing ideas to learn residual signals from a learned acoustic signature and the input signal. Our framework allows a neural network to adjust gains of every point in the time-frequency representation, giving sound qualitative and quantitative results. 产生和听到声音的声学空间通过提供独特的\textit{存在}感，在如何感知声音方面发挥着重要作用。我们听到的每一个声音都是声源固有的连续卷积运算和外部因素（例如麦克风特性和房间脉冲响应）的结果。通常，研究人员使用手枪射击或气球爆炸等激励作为脉冲信号，通过该信号可以产生可听度。与感兴趣的信号卷积的房间“脉冲”响应可以将输入声音转换成在感兴趣的声学空间中播放的声音。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，可以通过使用录制的任意音频作为气球爆裂的代理，将感兴趣的声音转换为任何其他感兴趣的声学空间（房间或大厅）。该架构基于简单的信号处理思想，从学习的声学特征和输入信号中学习残留信号。我们的框架允许神经网络调整时频表示中每个点的增益，给出合理的定性和定量结果。 本文提出一种新型神经网络架构，能够利用任意音频信号作为代理，将目标声音转换为任意声学环境（如房间或音乐厅）中的声音。 Prateek Verma,Chris Chafe,Jonathan Berger cs.SD,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Joshua Engels,Benjamin Coleman,Vihan Lakshman,Anshumali Shrivastava
title: DESSERT: An Efficient Algorithm for Vector Set Search with Vector Set Queries
title_zh: DESSERT：一种使用向量集查询进行向量集搜索的高效算法
abstract: We study the problem of $\textit{vector set search}$ with $\textit{vector set queries}$. This task is analogous to traditional near-neighbor search, with the exception that both the query and each element in the collection are $\textit{sets}$ of vectors. We identify this problem as a core subroutine for semantic search applications and find that existing solutions are unacceptably slow. Towards this end, we present a new approximate search algorithm, DESSERT (${\bf D}$ESSERT ${\bf E}$ffeciently ${\bf S}$earches ${\bf S}$ets of ${\bf E}$mbeddings via ${\bf R}$etrieval ${\bf T}$ables). DESSERT is a general tool with strong theoretical guarantees and excellent empirical performance. When we integrate DESSERT into ColBERT, a state-of-the-art semantic search model, we find a 2-5x speedup on the MS MARCO and LoTTE retrieval benchmarks with minimal loss in recall, underscoring the effectiveness and practical applicability of our proposal.
summary: We study the problem of $\textit{vector set search}$ with $\textit{vector set queries}$. This task is analogous to traditional near-neighbor search, with the exception that both the query and each element in the collection are $\textit{sets}$ of vectors. We identify this problem as a core subroutine for semantic search applications and find that existing solutions are unacceptably slow. Towards this end, we present a new approximate search algorithm, DESSERT (${\bf D}$ESSERT ${\bf E}$ffeciently ${\bf S}$earches ${\bf S}$ets of ${\bf E}$mbeddings via ${\bf R}$etrieval ${\bf T}$ables). DESSERT is a general tool with strong theoretical guarantees and excellent empirical performance. When we integrate DESSERT into ColBERT, a state-of-the-art semantic search model, we find a 2-5x speedup on the MS MARCO and LoTTE retrieval benchmarks with minimal loss in recall, underscoring the effectiveness and practical applicability of our proposal.
abstract_zh: 我们用$\textit{向量集查询}$研究$\textit{向量集搜索}$问题。此任务类似于传统的近邻搜索，不同之处在于查询和集合中的每个元素都是 $\textit{sets}$ 向量。我们将此问题确定为语义搜索应用程序的核心子例程，并发现现有解决方案速度慢得令人无法接受。为此，我们提出了一种新的近似搜索算法，DESSERT（${\bf D}$ESSERT ${\bf E}$有效地${\bf S}$通过${\bf R}$etrieval ${\bf T}$ables搜索${\bf S}$ets of ${\bf E}$mbeddings）。 DESSERT是一个通用工具，具有较强的理论保证和优异的实证性能。当我们将 DESSERT 集成到最先进的语义搜索模型 ColBERT 中时，我们发现 MS MARCO 和 LoTTE 检索基准的速度提高了 2-5 倍，同时召回率损失最小，强调了我们建议的有效性和实际适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DESSERT的高效算法，用于处理向量集搜索问题，其中查询和数据集中的元素均为向量集合。
AI.motivation: 现有解决方案在语义搜索等应用场景中效率低下，无法满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计DESSERT算法，通过检索表机制实现向量集的近似搜索，具有强理论保证和高效能。
AI.result: 将DESSERT集成到ColBERT模型后，在MS MARCO和LoTTE基准测试中实现2-5倍加速，且召回率损失极小。
AI.conclusion: DESSERT在理论和实践中均表现出色，为语义搜索提供了高效可行的解决方案。
