The proposed Max Relevance Max Synergy (MRMS) algorithm evaluates the relevance of every band through the combination of spectral synergy, redundancy and relevance measures. Our objective is to select the optimal subset of synergistic bands providing accurate classification of the supervised scene materials. Experimental results have been performed using three different hyperspectral datasets: "Indiana Pine", "Pavia University" and "Salinas" provided by the "NASA-AVIRIS" and the "ROSIS" spectrometers. Furthermore, a comparison with the state of the art band selection methods has been carried out in order to demonstrate the robustness and efficiency of the proposed approach. Keywords: Hyperspectral images, remote sensing, dimensionality reduction, classification, synergic, correlation, spectral interaction information, mutual inform
abstract_zh: 过去几十年来，高光谱遥感技术的发展引起了各领域科学家日益浓厚的兴趣。高光谱传感器提供丰富、详细的光谱信息，提高了对地表物质的监测和探测能力。然而，高光谱图像（HSI）的高维性是分析所收集数据的主要挑战之一。噪声、冗余和不相关频带的存在增加了计算复杂度，诱发休斯现象并降低目标的分类精度。因此，降维是应对维度挑战的重要一步。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于光谱相互作用度量最大化和支持向量机的新颖滤波器方法，用于 HSI 的降维和分类。所提出的最大相关性最大协同（MRMS）算法通过频谱协同、冗余和相关性测量的组合来评估每个频段的相关性。我们的目标是选择协同带的最佳子集，提供监督场景材料的准确分类。实验结果是使用“NASA-AVIRIS”和“ROSIS”光谱仪提供的三个不同的高光谱数据集：“Indiana Pine”、“Pavia University”和“Salinas”进行的。此外，还与最先进的频带选择方法进行了比较，以证明所提出方法的稳健性和效率。关键词: 高光谱图像, 遥感, 降维, 分类, 协同, 相关性, 光谱相互作用信息, 相互信息

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光谱互作用和SVM分类器的高光谱图像分类与降维方法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像的高维度性导致计算复杂度增加、分类精度下降，需通过降维解决冗余和噪声问题。
AI.method: 提出Max Relevance Max Synergy (MRMS)算法，结合光谱协同性、冗余度和相关性度量选择最优波段子集，并使用SVM进行分类。
AI.result: 在Indiana Pine、Pavia University和Salinas数据集上验证，相比现有方法表现出更高的分类准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MRMS算法通过优化波段选择有效提升了高光谱图像分类性能，为后续分析提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Audrey Huang,Nan Jiang
title: Beyond the Return: Off-policy Function Estimation under User-specified Error-measuring Distributions
title_zh: 超越回报：用户指定的误差测量分布下的离策略函数估计
abstract: Off-policy evaluation often refers to two related tasks: estimating the expected return of a policy and estimating its value function (or other functions of interest, such as density ratios). While recent works on marginalized importance sampling (MIS) show that the former can enjoy provable guarantees under realizable function approximation, the latter is only known to be feasible under much stronger assumptions such as prohibitively expressive discriminators. In this work, we provide guarantees for off-policy function estimation under only realizability, by imposing proper regularization on the MIS objectives. Compared to commonly used regularization in MIS, our regularizer is much more flexible and can account for an arbitrary user-specified distribution, under which the learned function will be close to the groundtruth. We provide exact characterization of the optimal dual solution that needs to be realized by the discriminator class, which determines the data-coverage assumption in the case of value-function learning. As another surprising observation, the regularizer can be altered to relax the data-coverage requirement, and completely eliminate it in the ideal case with strong side information.
summary: Off-policy evaluation often refers to two related tasks: estimating the expected return of a policy and estimating its value function (or other functions of interest, such as density ratios). While recent works on marginalized importance sampling (MIS) show that the former can enjoy provable guarantees under realizable function approximation, the latter is only known to be feasible under much stronger assumptions such as prohibitively expressive discriminators. In this work, we provide guarantees for off-policy function estimation under only realizability, by imposing proper regularization on the MIS objectives. Compared to commonly used regularization in MIS, our regularizer is much more flexible and can account for an arbitrary user-specified distribution, under which the learned function will be close to the groundtruth. We provide exact characterization of the optimal dual solution that needs to be realized by the discriminator class, which determines the data-coverage assumption in the case of value-function learning. As another surprising observation, the regularizer can be altered to relax the data-coverage requirement, and completely eliminate it in the ideal case with strong side information.
abstract_zh: 离政策评估通常指两个相关的任务：估计政策的预期回报和估计其价值函数（或其他感兴趣的函数，例如密度比）。虽然最近关于边缘化重要性抽样（MIS）的研究表明，前者可以在可实现的函数逼近下享有可证明的保证，但后者只有在更强的假设（例如过度表达的判别器）下才可行。在这项工作中，我们通过对 MIS 目标进行适当的正则化，为仅可实现性下的离策略函数估计提供保证。与 MIS 中常用的正则化相比，我们的正则化器更加灵活，可以考虑任意用户指定的分布，在该分布下，学习到的函数将接近真实值。我们提供了判别器类需要实现的最佳对偶解决方案的精确表征，这决定了价值函数学习情况下的数据覆盖假设。作为另一个令人惊讶的观察结果，可以更改正则化器以放宽数据覆盖要求，并在具有强大辅助信息的理想情况下完全消除它。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在用户指定误差度量分布下进行离线策略函数估计，解决价值函数估计中的数据覆盖假设限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线策略评估方法在估计回报时有理论保证，但价值函数估计需依赖强假设（如高表达能力的判别器），限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 通过在边缘化重要性采样（MIS）目标中引入灵活正则化项，适配任意用户指定分布，并精确刻画最优对偶解以调整数据覆盖假设。
AI.result: 在仅需函数可实现性假设下，证明了价值函数估计的理论保证；正则化方法可消除数据覆盖约束，且通过强先验信息可完全去除该要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过正则化设计突破了传统数据覆盖限制，在无需强假设条件下实现更灵活的离线策略函数估计，为实际应用提供新思路。

search_text: Beyond the Return: Off-policy Function Estimation under User-specified Error-measuring Distributions 超越回报：用户指定的误差测量分布下的离策略函数估计 Off-policy evaluation often refers to two related tasks: estimating the expected return of a policy and estimating its value function (or other functions of interest, such as density ratios). While recent works on marginalized importance sampling (MIS) show that the former can enjoy provable guarantees under realizable function approximation, the latter is only known to be feasible under much stronger assumptions such as prohibitively expressive discriminators. In this work, we provide guarantees for off-policy function estimation under only realizability, by imposing proper regularization on the MIS objectives. Compared to commonly used regularization in MIS, our regularizer is much more flexible and can account for an arbitrary user-specified distribution, under which the learned function will be close to the groundtruth. We provide exact characterization of the optimal dual solution that needs to be realized by the discriminator class, which determines the data-coverage assumption in the case of value-function learning. As another surprising observation, the regularizer can be altered to relax the data-coverage requirement, and completely eliminate it in the ideal case with strong side information. 离政策评估通常指两个相关的任务：估计政策的预期回报和估计其价值函数（或其他感兴趣的函数，例如密度比）。虽然最近关于边缘化重要性抽样（MIS）的研究表明，前者可以在可实现的函数逼近下享有可证明的保证，但后者只有在更强的假设（例如过度表达的判别器）下才可行。在这项工作中，我们通过对 MIS 目标进行适当的正则化，为仅可实现性下的离策略函数估计提供保证。与 MIS 中常用的正则化相比，我们的正则化器更加灵活，可以考虑任意用户指定的分布，在该分布下，学习到的函数将接近真实值。我们提供了判别器类需要实现的最佳对偶解决方案的精确表征，这决定了价值函数学习情况下的数据覆盖假设。作为另一个令人惊讶的观察结果，可以更改正则化器以放宽数据覆盖要求，并在具有强大辅助信息的理想情况下完全消除它。 本文研究在用户指定误差度量分布下进行离线策略函数估计，解决价值函数估计中的数据覆盖假设限制问题。 Audrey Huang,Nan Jiang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Sungjun Cho,Seonwoo Min,Jinwoo Kim,Moontae Lee,Honglak Lee,Seunghoon Hong
title: Transformers meet Stochastic Block Models: Attention with Data-Adaptive Sparsity and Cost
title_zh: Transformer 满足随机块模型：关注数据自适应稀疏性和成本
abstract: To overcome the quadratic cost of self-attention, recent works have proposed various sparse attention modules, most of which fall under one of two groups: 1) sparse attention under a hand-crafted patterns and 2) full attention followed by a sparse variant of softmax such as $α$-entmax. Unfortunately, the first group lacks adaptability to data while the second still requires quadratic cost in training. In this work, we propose SBM-Transformer, a model that resolves both problems by endowing each attention head with a mixed-membership Stochastic Block Model (SBM). Then, each attention head data-adaptively samples a bipartite graph, the adjacency of which is used as an attention mask for each input. During backpropagation, a straight-through estimator is used to flow gradients beyond the discrete sampling step and adjust the probabilities of sampled edges based on the predictive loss. The forward and backward cost are thus linear to the number of edges, which each attention head can also choose flexibly based on the input. By assessing the distribution of graphs, we theoretically show that SBM-Transformer is a universal approximator for arbitrary sequence-to-sequence functions in expectation. Empirical evaluations under the LRA and GLUE benchmarks demonstrate that our model outperforms previous efficient variants as well as the original Transformer with full attention. Our implementation can be found in https://github.com/sc782/SBM-Transformer .
summary: To overcome the quadratic cost of self-attention, recent works have proposed various sparse attention modules, most of which fall under one of two groups: 1) sparse attention under a hand-crafted patterns and 2) full attention followed by a sparse variant of softmax such as $α$-entmax. Unfortunately, the first group lacks adaptability to data while the second still requires quadratic cost in training. In this work, we propose SBM-Transformer, a model that resolves both problems by endowing each attention head with a mixed-membership Stochastic Block Model (SBM). Then, each attention head data-adaptively samples a bipartite graph, the adjacency of which is used as an attention mask for each input. During backpropagation, a straight-through estimator is used to flow gradients beyond the discrete sampling step and adjust the probabilities of sampled edges based on the predictive loss. The forward and backward cost are thus linear to the number of edges, which each attention head can also choose flexibly based on the input. By assessing the distribution of graphs, we theoretically show that SBM-Transformer is a universal approximator for arbitrary sequence-to-sequence functions in expectation. Empirical evaluations under the LRA and GLUE benchmarks demonstrate that our model outperforms previous efficient variants as well as the original Transformer with full attention. Our implementation can be found in https://github.com/sc782/SBM-Transformer .
abstract_zh: 为了克服自注意力的二次成本，最近的工作提出了各种稀疏注意力模块，其中大多数属于以下两组之一：1）手工制作模式下的稀疏注意力和2）完全注意力，然后是softmax的稀疏变体，例如$α$-entmax。不幸的是，第一组缺乏对数据的适应性，而第二组仍然需要二次训练成本。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SBM-Transformer，该模型通过为每个注意力头赋予混合成员随机块模型（SBM）来解决这两个问题。然后，每个注意力头数据自适应地采样二部图，其邻接用作每个输入的注意力掩模。在反向传播期间，直通估计器用于使梯度超出离散采样步骤，并根据预测损失调整采样边缘的概率。因此，前向和后向成本与边的数量呈线性关系，每个注意力头也可以根据输入灵活选择边的数量。通过评估图的分布，我们从理论上证明 SBM-Transformer 是期望中任意序列到序列函数的通用逼近器。 LRA 和 GLUE 基准下的实证评估表明，我们的模型优于之前的高效变体以及充分关注的原始 Transformer。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/sc782/SBM-Transformer 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SBM-Transformer模型，通过结合随机块模型（SBM）实现自适应稀疏注意力机制，解决传统Transformer的二次计算成本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏注意力方法要么依赖人工设计模式缺乏数据适应性，要么仍需二次计算成本，无法兼顾效率与灵活性。
AI.method: 为每个注意力头引入混合成员随机块模型，根据输入数据动态生成稀疏图结构作为注意力掩码，并通过直通估计器实现反向传播优化。
AI.result: 在LRA和GLUE基准测试中，SBM-Transformer在保持性能的同时优于现有高效变体及全注意力Transformer，且理论证明其为通用序列到序列函数逼近器。
AI.conclusion: SBM-Transformer通过数据自适应稀疏性与线性计算成本，为高效 Transformer 架构提供了新范式，在准确率与效率间取得平衡。

Unfortunately, the first group lacks adaptability to data while the second still requires quadratic cost in training. Then, each attention head data-adaptively samples a bipartite graph, the adjacency of which is used as an attention mask for each input. During backpropagation, a straight-through estimator is used to flow gradients beyond the discrete sampling step and adjust the probabilities of sampled edges based on the predictive loss. authors_text: Axel De Nardin,Pankaj Mishra,Gian Luca Foresti,Claudio Piciarelli
title: Masked Transformer for image Anomaly Localization
title_zh: 用于图像异常定位的 Masked Transformer
abstract: Image anomaly detection consists in detecting images or image portions that are visually different from the majority of the samples in a dataset. The task is of practical importance for various real-life applications like biomedical image analysis, visual inspection in industrial production, banking, traffic management, etc. Most of the current deep learning approaches rely on image reconstruction: the input image is projected in some latent space and then reconstructed, assuming that the network (mostly trained on normal data) will not be able to reconstruct the anomalous portions. However, this assumption does not always hold. We thus propose a new model based on the Vision Transformer architecture with patch masking: the input image is split in several patches, and each patch is reconstructed only from the surrounding data, thus ignoring the potentially anomalous information contained in the patch itself. We then show that multi-resolution patches and their collective embeddings provide a large improvement in the model's performance compared to the exclusive use of the traditional square patches. The proposed model has been tested on popular anomaly detection datasets such as MVTec and head CT and achieved good results when compared to other state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Image anomaly detection consists in detecting images or image portions that are visually different from the majority of the samples in a dataset. The task is of practical importance for various real-life applications like biomedical image analysis, visual inspection in industrial production, banking, traffic management, etc. Most of the current deep learning approaches rely on image reconstruction: the input image is projected in some latent space and then reconstructed, assuming that the network (mostly trained on normal data) will not be able to reconstruct the anomalous portions. However, this assumption does not always hold. We thus propose a new model based on the Vision Transformer architecture with patch masking: the input image is split in several patches, and each patch is reconstructed only from the surrounding data, thus ignoring the potentially anomalous information contained in the patch itself. We then show that multi-resolution patches and their collective embeddings provide a large improvement in the model's performance compared to the exclusive use of the traditional square patches. The proposed model has been tested on popular anomaly detection datasets such as MVTec and head CT and achieved good results when compared to other state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 图像异常检测包括检测在视觉上与数据集中的大多数样本不同的图像或图像部分。该任务对于生物医学图像分析、工业生产中的视觉检查、银行、交通管理等各种实际应用具有实际意义。当前的大多数深度学习方法都依赖于图像重建：输入图像被投影到某些潜在空间中，然后重建，假设网络（主要是在正常数据上训练）将无法重建异常部分。然而，这个假设并不总是成立。因此，我们提出了一种基于带有补丁掩码的 Vision Transformer 架构的新模型：输入图像被分成几个补丁，每个补丁仅根据周围的数据重建，从而忽略了补丁本身包含的潜在异常信息。然后，我们表明，与单独使用传统的方形补丁相比，多分辨率补丁及其集体嵌入可以极大地提高模型的性能。所提出的模型已在 MVTec 和头部 CT 等流行的异常检测数据集上进行了测试，与其他最先进的方法相比，取得了良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于掩码Transformer的图像异常定位方法，通过多分辨率补丁增强检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统重建方法依赖于正常数据训练的网络无法重建异常区域，但该假设不总成立，需改进方法提高检测准确性。
AI.method: 采用Vision Transformer架构，将图像分割为补丁，通过周围数据重建每个补丁，结合多分辨率补丁和集体嵌入提升性能。
AI.result: 在MVTec和头部CT数据集上测试，性能优于其他先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 多分辨率补丁和集体嵌入有效提升模型性能，为图像异常检测提供新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于掩码Transformer的图像异常定位方法，通过多分辨率补丁增强检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统重建方法依赖于正常数据训练的网络无法重建异常区域，但该假设不总成立，需改进方法提高检测准确性。

search_text: Masked Transformer for image Anomaly Localization 用于图像异常定位的 Masked Transformer Image anomaly detection consists in detecting images or image portions that are visually different from the majority of the samples in a dataset. The task is of practical importance for various real-life applications like biomedical image analysis, visual inspection in industrial production, banking, traffic management, etc. Most of the current deep learning approaches rely on image reconstruction: the input image is projected in some latent space and then reconstructed, assuming that the network (mostly trained on normal data) will not be able to reconstruct the anomalous portions. However, this assumption does not always hold. We thus propose a new model based on the Vision Transformer architecture with patch masking: the input image is split in several patches, and each patch is reconstructed only from the surrounding data, thus ignoring the potentially anomalous information contained in the patch itself. We then show that multi-resolution patches and their collective embeddings provide a large improvement in the model's performance compared to the exclusive use of the traditional square patches. The proposed model has been tested on popular anomaly detection datasets such as MVTec and head CT and achieved good results when compared to other state-of-the-art approaches. 图像异常检测包括检测在视觉上与数据集中的大多数样本不同的图像或图像部分。该任务对于生物医学图像分析、工业生产中的视觉检查、银行、交通管理等各种实际应用具有实际意义。当前的大多数深度学习方法都依赖于图像重建：输入图像被投影到某些潜在空间中，然后重建，假设网络（主要是在正常数据上训练）将无法重建异常部分。然而，这个假设并不总是成立。因此，我们提出了一种基于带有补丁掩码的 Vision Transformer 架构的新模型：输入图像被分成几个补丁，每个补丁仅根据周围的数据重建，从而忽略了补丁本身包含的潜在异常信息。然后，我们表明，与单独使用传统的方形补丁相比，多分辨率补丁及其集体嵌入可以极大地提高模型的性能。所提出的模型已在 MVTec 和头部 CT 等流行的异常检测数据集上进行了测试，与其他最先进的方法相比，取得了良好的结果。 提出一种基于掩码Transformer的图像异常定位方法，通过多分辨率补丁增强检测性能。 Axel De Nardin,Pankaj Mishra,Gian Luca Foresti,Claudio Piciarelli cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Reo Yoneyama,Yi-Chiao Wu,Tomoki Toda
title: Source-Filter HiFi-GAN: Fast and Pitch Controllable High-Fidelity Neural Vocoder
title_zh: 源滤波器 HiFi-GAN：快速且音调可控的高保真神经声码器
abstract: Our previous work, the unified source-filter GAN (uSFGAN) vocoder, introduced a novel architecture based on the source-filter theory into the parallel waveform generative adversarial network to achieve high voice quality and pitch controllability. However, the high temporal resolution inputs result in high computation costs. Although the HiFi-GAN vocoder achieves fast high-fidelity voice generation thanks to the efficient upsampling-based generator architecture, the pitch controllability is severely limited. To realize a fast and pitch-controllable high-fidelity neural vocoder, we introduce the source-filter theory into HiFi-GAN by hierarchically conditioning the resonance filtering network on a well-estimated source excitation information. According to the experimental results, our proposed method outperforms HiFi-GAN and uSFGAN on a singing voice generation in voice quality and synthesis speed on a single CPU. Furthermore, unlike the uSFGAN vocoder, the proposed method can be easily adopted/integrated in real-time applications and end-to-end systems.
summary: Our previous work, the unified source-filter GAN (uSFGAN) vocoder, introduced a novel architecture based on the source-filter theory into the parallel waveform generative adversarial network to achieve high voice quality and pitch controllability. However, the high temporal resolution inputs result in high computation costs. Although the HiFi-GAN vocoder achieves fast high-fidelity voice generation thanks to the efficient upsampling-based generator architecture, the pitch controllability is severely limited. To realize a fast and pitch-controllable high-fidelity neural vocoder, we introduce the source-filter theory into HiFi-GAN by hierarchically conditioning the resonance filtering network on a well-estimated source excitation information. According to the experimental results, our proposed method outperforms HiFi-GAN and uSFGAN on a singing voice generation in voice quality and synthesis speed on a single CPU. Furthermore, unlike the uSFGAN vocoder, the proposed method can be easily adopted/integrated in real-time applications and end-to-end systems.
abstract_zh: 我们之前的工作，统一源滤波器 GAN (uSFGAN) 声码器，将一种基于源滤波器理论的新颖架构引入到并行波形生成对抗网络中，以实现高语音质量和音调可控性。然而，高时间分辨率输入导致高计算成本。尽管 HiFi-GAN 声码器凭借高效的基于上采样的生成器架构实现了快速高保真语音生成，但音调可控性受到严重限制。为了实现快速且音调可控的高保真神经声码器，我们通过在良好估计的源激励信息上分层调节谐振滤波网络，将源滤波器理论引入 HiFi-GAN 中。根据实验结果，我们提出的方法在单 CPU 上的语音质量和合成速度方面优于 HiFi-GAN 和 uSFGAN。此外，与 uSFGAN 声码器不同，所提出的方法可以轻松地在实时应用和端到端系统中采用/集成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于源滤波理论的HiFi-GAN神经声码器，实现了快速且可控制音高的高保真语音生成。
AI.motivation: 先前的uSFGAN声码器虽具备音高可控性但计算成本高，而HiFi-GAN虽生成速度快但音高控制能力有限，需兼顾速度与音高可控性的改进方案。
AI.method: 将源滤波理论引入HiFi-GAN，通过分层条件化共振滤波网络，基于精确估计的源激励信息实现音高控制。
AI.result: 在单核CPU上，该方法在歌声合成任务中优于HiFi-GAN和uSFGAN，在语音质量和合成速度上表现更优，且适合实时系统集成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了源滤波理论与HiFi-GAN架构优势，实现了高保真、快速且音高可控的神经声码器，适用于实时应用场景。

authors_text: Chenyang Li,Zhi-Qi Cheng,Jun-Yan He,Pengyu Li,Bin Luo,Hanyuan Chen,Yifeng Geng,Jin-Peng Lan,Xuansong Xie
title: LongShortNet: Exploring Temporal and Semantic Features Fusion in Streaming Perception
title_zh: LongShortNet：探索流感知中的时间和语义特征融合
comment: Accepted at ICASSP 2023, source code is at https://github.com/zhiqic/LongShortNet
comments: Accepted at ICASSP 2023, source code is at https://github.com/zhiqic/LongShortNet
abstract: Streaming perception is a critical task in autonomous driving that requires balancing the latency and accuracy of the autopilot system. However, current methods for streaming perception are limited as they only rely on the current and adjacent two frames to learn movement patterns. This restricts their ability to model complex scenes, often resulting in poor detection results. To address this limitation, we propose LongShortNet, a novel dual-path network that captures long-term temporal motion and integrates it with short-term spatial semantics for real-time perception. LongShortNet is notable as it is the first work to extend long-term temporal modeling to streaming perception, enabling spatiotemporal feature fusion. We evaluate LongShortNet on the challenging Argoverse-HD dataset and demonstrate that it outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods with almost no additional computational cost.
summary: Streaming perception is a critical task in autonomous driving that requires balancing the latency and accuracy of the autopilot system. However, current methods for streaming perception are limited as they only rely on the current and adjacent two frames to learn movement patterns. This restricts their ability to model complex scenes, often resulting in poor detection results. To address this limitation, we propose LongShortNet, a novel dual-path network that captures long-term temporal motion and integrates it with short-term spatial semantics for real-time perception. LongShortNet is notable as it is the first work to extend long-term temporal modeling to streaming perception, enabling spatiotemporal feature fusion. We evaluate LongShortNet on the challenging Argoverse-HD dataset and demonstrate that it outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods with almost no additional computational cost.
abstract_zh: 流感知是自动驾驶中的一项关键任务，需要平衡自动驾驶系统的延迟和准确性。然而，当前的流感知方法是有限的，因为它们仅依赖于当前和相邻的两帧来学习运动模式。这限制了他们对复杂场景进行建模的能力，通常会导致检测结果不佳。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 LongShortNet，这是一种新颖的双路径网络，可以捕获长期时间运动并将其与短期空间语义相结合以实现实时感知。 LongShortNet 值得注意，因为它是第一个将长期时间建模扩展到流感知的工作，从而实现时空特征融合。我们在具有挑战性的 Argoverse-HD 数据集上评估了 LongShortNet，并证明它优于现有的最先进方法，几乎​​没有额外的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LongShortNet，通过融合时序与语义特征提升自动驾驶中流式感知的检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有流式感知方法仅依赖当前及相邻两帧，难以建模复杂场景导致检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计双路径网络LongShortNet，结合长期时序运动建模与短期空间语义特征，首次实现流式感知中的时空特征融合。
AI.result: 在Argoverse-HD数据集上优于现有方法，且几乎不增加计算成本。
AI.conclusion: LongShortNet有效解决了流式感知中时序与语义信息融合的难题，为实时自动驾驶感知提供新思路。

authors_text: Lifa Zhu,Changwei Lin,Chen Zheng,Ninghua Yang
title: Point-Voxel Adaptive Feature Abstraction for Robust Point Cloud Classification
title_zh: 用于稳健点云分类的点体素自适应特征抽象
abstract: Great progress has been made in point cloud classification with learning-based methods. However, complex scene and sensor inaccuracy in real-world application make point cloud data suffer from corruptions, such as occlusion, noise and outliers. In this work, we propose Point-Voxel based Adaptive (PV-Ada) feature abstraction for robust point cloud classification under various corruptions. Specifically, the proposed framework iteratively voxelize the point cloud and extract point-voxel feature with shared local encoding and Transformer. Then, adaptive max-pooling is proposed to robustly aggregate the point cloud feature for classification. Experiments on ModelNet-C dataset demonstrate that PV-Ada outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. In particular, we rank the $2^{nd}$ place in ModelNet-C classification track of PointCloud-C Challenge 2022, with Overall Accuracy (OA) being 0.865. Code will be available at https://github.com/zhulf0804/PV-Ada.
summary: Great progress has been made in point cloud classification with learning-based methods. However, complex scene and sensor inaccuracy in real-world application make point cloud data suffer from corruptions, such as occlusion, noise and outliers. In this work, we propose Point-Voxel based Adaptive (PV-Ada) feature abstraction for robust point cloud classification under various corruptions. Specifically, the proposed framework iteratively voxelize the point cloud and extract point-voxel feature with shared local encoding and Transformer. Then, adaptive max-pooling is proposed to robustly aggregate the point cloud feature for classification. Experiments on ModelNet-C dataset demonstrate that PV-Ada outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. In particular, we rank the $2^{nd}$ place in ModelNet-C classification track of PointCloud-C Challenge 2022, with Overall Accuracy (OA) being 0.865. Code will be available at https://github.com/zhulf0804/PV-Ada.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的方法在点云分类方面取得了巨大进展。然而，现实应用中复杂的场景和传感器的不准确性使得点云数据遭受遮挡、噪声和异常值等损坏。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于点体素的自适应（PV-Ada）特征抽象，用于在各种损坏下进行稳健的点云分类。具体来说，所提出的框架迭代地对点云进行体素化，并通过共享本地编码和 Transformer 提取点体素特征。然后，提出自适应最大池来稳健地聚合点云特征以进行分类。 ModelNet-C 数据集上的实验表明 PV-Ada 优于最先进的方法。特别是，我们在 PointCloud-C Challenge 2022 的 ModelNet-C 分类赛道中排名第 2^{nd}$ 位，总体准确度 (OA) 为 0.865。代码可在 https://github.com/zhulf0804/PV-Ada 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于点-体素自适应特征抽象的鲁棒点云分类方法PV-Ada，以应对现实场景中的噪声、遮挡等数据损坏问题。
AI.motivation: 现实应用中点云数据常因复杂场景和传感器误差导致损坏（如噪声、异常值），现有方法在鲁棒性上存在不足。
AI.method: 通过迭代体素化点云并结合局部编码与Transformer提取点-体素特征，再利用自适应最大池化聚合特征进行分类。
AI.result: 在ModelNet-C数据集上优于现有方法，2022年PointCloud-C挑战赛分类任务中获得第2名，整体准确率达0.865。
AI.conclusion: PV-Ada通过点-体素联合建模与自适应特征聚合，有效提升了点云分类在损坏数据下的鲁棒性。

search_text: Point-Voxel Adaptive Feature Abstraction for Robust Point Cloud Classification 用于稳健点云分类的点体素自适应特征抽象 Great progress has been made in point cloud classification with learning-based methods. However, complex scene and sensor inaccuracy in real-world application make point cloud data suffer from corruptions, such as occlusion, noise and outliers. In this work, we propose Point-Voxel based Adaptive (PV-Ada) feature abstraction for robust point cloud classification under various corruptions. Specifically, the proposed framework iteratively voxelize the point cloud and extract point-voxel feature with shared local encoding and Transformer. Then, adaptive max-pooling is proposed to robustly aggregate the point cloud feature for classification. Experiments on ModelNet-C dataset demonstrate that PV-Ada outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. In particular, we rank the $2^{nd}$ place in ModelNet-C classification track of PointCloud-C Challenge 2022, with Overall Accuracy (OA) being 0.865. Code will be available at https://github.com/zhulf0804/PV-Ada. 基于学习的方法在点云分类方面取得了巨大进展。然而，现实应用中复杂的场景和传感器的不准确性使得点云数据遭受遮挡、噪声和异常值等损坏。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于点体素的自适应（PV-Ada）特征抽象，用于在各种损坏下进行稳健的点云分类。具体来说，所提出的框架迭代地对点云进行体素化，并通过共享本地编码和 Transformer 提取点体素特征。然后，提出自适应最大池来稳健地聚合点云特征以进行分类。 ModelNet-C 数据集上的实验表明 PV-Ada 优于最先进的方法。特别是，我们在 PointCloud-C Challenge 2022 的 ModelNet-C 分类赛道中排名第 2^{nd}$ 位，总体准确度 (OA) 为 0.865。代码可在 https://github.com/zhulf0804/PV-Ada 获取。 本文提出了一种基于点-体素自适应特征抽象的鲁棒点云分类方法PV-Ada，以应对现实场景中的噪声、遮挡等数据损坏问题。 Lifa Zhu,Changwei Lin,Chen Zheng,Ninghua Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Felix Schur,Parnian Kassraie,Jonas Rothfuss,Andreas Krause
title: Lifelong Bandit Optimization: No Prior and No Regret
title_zh: 终身强盗优化：无先无后
comment: 35 pages, 6 figures, In Proceedings of UAI 2023
comments: 35 pages, 6 figures, In Proceedings of UAI 2023
abstract: Machine learning algorithms are often repeatedly applied to problems with similar structure over and over again. We focus on solving a sequence of bandit optimization tasks and develop LIBO, an algorithm which adapts to the environment by learning from past experience and becomes more sample-efficient in the process. We assume a kernelized structure where the kernel is unknown but shared across all tasks. LIBO sequentially meta-learns a kernel that approximates the true kernel and solves the incoming tasks with the latest kernel estimate. Our algorithm can be paired with any kernelized or linear bandit algorithm and guarantees oracle optimal performance, meaning that as more tasks are solved, the regret of LIBO on each task converges to the regret of the bandit algorithm with oracle knowledge of the true kernel. Naturally, if paired with a sublinear bandit algorithm, LIBO yields a sublinear lifelong regret. We also show that direct access to the data from each task is not necessary for attaining sublinear regret. We propose F-LIBO, which solves the lifelong problem in a federated manner.
summary: Machine learning algorithms are often repeatedly applied to problems with similar structure over and over again. We focus on solving a sequence of bandit optimization tasks and develop LIBO, an algorithm which adapts to the environment by learning from past experience and becomes more sample-efficient in the process. We assume a kernelized structure where the kernel is unknown but shared across all tasks. LIBO sequentially meta-learns a kernel that approximates the true kernel and solves the incoming tasks with the latest kernel estimate. Our algorithm can be paired with any kernelized or linear bandit algorithm and guarantees oracle optimal performance, meaning that as more tasks are solved, the regret of LIBO on each task converges to the regret of the bandit algorithm with oracle knowledge of the true kernel. Naturally, if paired with a sublinear bandit algorithm, LIBO yields a sublinear lifelong regret. We also show that direct access to the data from each task is not necessary for attaining sublinear regret. We propose F-LIBO, which solves the lifelong problem in a federated manner.
abstract_zh: 机器学习算法通常会一遍又一遍地重复应用于具有相似结构的问题。我们专注于解决一系列老虎机优化任务，并开发了 LIBO，这是一种通过学习过去的经验来适应环境的算法，并在此过程中变得更加高效。我们假设一个内核化结构，其中内核未知但在所有任务之间共享。 LIBO 依次元学习一个接近真实内核的内核，并使用最新的内核估计来解决传入的任务。我们的算法可以与任何内核化或线性老虎机算法配对，并保证预言机的最佳性能，这意味着随着更多任务的解决，LIBO 在每个任务上的遗憾会收敛到具有真实内核的预言机知识的老虎机算法的遗憾。当然，如果与次线性老虎机算法配合使用，LIBO 会产生次线性终身遗憾。我们还表明，直接访问每个任务的数据对于获得亚线性遗憾并不是必需的。我们提出F-LIBO，它以联邦的方式解决终身问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIBO算法，用于解决一系列共享核结构的老虎机优化任务，通过元学习逼近真实核函数，实现无先验知识且无遗憾的终身学习。
AI.motivation: 传统老虎机算法需依赖先验知识或独立处理每个任务，而实际中多任务常共享潜在结构，需设计能跨任务学习并提升样本效率的方法。
AI.method: 设计LIBO算法，通过顺序元学习估计共享核函数，结合任意核化或线性老虎机算法；提出F-LIBO实现联邦学习场景下的终身优化。
AI.result: LIBO的遗憾随任务增加收敛至最优算法水平，支持次线性终身遗憾；无需直接访问历史任务数据，F-LIBO适用于联邦学习。
AI.conclusion: LIBO通过跨任务元学习有效利用共享结构，兼顾理论保证与实际效率，为终身优化提供通用框架及联邦学习扩展方案。

authors_text: Annika Briegleb,Mhd Modar Halimeh,Walter Kellermann
title: Exploiting spatial information with the informed complex-valued spatial autoencoder for target speaker extraction
title_zh: 利用知情复值空间自动编码器利用空间信息进行目标说话人提取
comment: Accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), Rhodes Island, Greece. 5 pages, 2 figures
comments: Accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), Rhodes Island, Greece. 5 pages, 2 figures
abstract: In conventional multichannel audio signal enhancement, spatial and spectral filtering are often performed sequentially. In contrast, it has been shown that for neural spatial filtering a joint approach of spectro-spatial filtering is more beneficial. In this contribution, we investigate the spatial filtering performed by such a time-varying spectro-spatial filter. We extend the recently proposed complex-valued spatial autoencoder (COSPA) for the task of target speaker extraction by leveraging its interpretable structure and purposefully informing the network of the target speaker's position. We show that the resulting informed COSPA (iCOSPA) effectively and flexibly extracts a target speaker from a mixture of speakers. We also find that the proposed architecture is well capable of learning pronounced spatial selectivity patterns and show that the results depend significantly on the training target and the reference signal when computing various evaluation metrics.
summary: In conventional multichannel audio signal enhancement, spatial and spectral filtering are often performed sequentially. In contrast, it has been shown that for neural spatial filtering a joint approach of spectro-spatial filtering is more beneficial. In this contribution, we investigate the spatial filtering performed by such a time-varying spectro-spatial filter. We extend the recently proposed complex-valued spatial autoencoder (COSPA) for the task of target speaker extraction by leveraging its interpretable structure and purposefully informing the network of the target speaker's position. We show that the resulting informed COSPA (iCOSPA) effectively and flexibly extracts a target speaker from a mixture of speakers. We also find that the proposed architecture is well capable of learning pronounced spatial selectivity patterns and show that the results depend significantly on the training target and the reference signal when computing various evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 在传统的多通道音频信号增强中，空间和频谱滤波通常顺序执行。相比之下，已经表明对于神经空间过滤来说，光谱空间过滤的联合方法更有益。在这篇文章中，我们研究了这种时变光谱空间滤波器执行的空间滤波。我们通过利用其可解释结构并有目的地告知网络目标说话者的位置，扩展了最近提出的复值空间自动编码器（COSPA），用于目标说话者提取任务。我们表明，由此产生的知情 COSPA (iCOSPA) 可以有效、灵活地从混合说话人中提取目标说话人。我们还发现，所提出的架构能够很好地学习明显的空间选择性模式，并表明在计算各种评估指标时，结果在很大程度上取决于训练目标和参考信号。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知情复值空间自编码器（iCOSPA）的目标说话人提取方法，通过联合利用时频-空间信息提升提取效果。
AI.motivation: 传统多通道音频增强方法将空间与频谱滤波分离处理，而神经网络的联合时频-空间滤波能更有效利用空间信息，但现有方法缺乏对目标说话人位置的显式建模。
AI.method: 扩展复值空间自编码器（COSPA），通过显式注入目标说话人位置信息构建iCOSPA，利用其可解释结构实现空间选择性特征学习。
AI.result: iCOSPA在目标说话人提取任务中表现出显著的空间选择性，性能高度依赖训练目标设计和参考信号质量。
AI.conclusion: 知情复值空间自编码器能有效建模空间选择性，为多通道语音增强提供了可解释且灵活的解决方案。

motivation: 传统多通道音频增强方法将空间与频谱滤波分离处理，而神经网络的联合时频-空间滤波能更有效利用空间信息，但现有方法缺乏对目标说话人位置的显式建模。
method: 扩展复值空间自编码器（COSPA），通过显式注入目标说话人位置信息构建iCOSPA，利用其可解释结构实现空间选择性特征学习。
result: iCOSPA在目标说话人提取任务中表现出显著的空间选择性，性能高度依赖训练目标设计和参考信号质量。
conclusion: 知情复值空间自编码器能有效建模空间选择性，为多通道语音增强提供了可解释且灵活的解决方案。
search_text: Exploiting spatial information with the informed complex-valued spatial autoencoder for target speaker extraction 利用知情复值空间自动编码器利用空间信息进行目标说话人提取 In conventional multichannel audio signal enhancement, spatial and spectral filtering are often performed sequentially. In contrast, it has been shown that for neural spatial filtering a joint approach of spectro-spatial filtering is more beneficial. In this contribution, we investigate the spatial filtering performed by such a time-varying spectro-spatial filter. We extend the recently proposed complex-valued spatial autoencoder (COSPA) for the task of target speaker extraction by leveraging its interpretable structure and purposefully informing the network of the target speaker's position. We show that the resulting informed COSPA (iCOSPA) effectively and flexibly extracts a target speaker from a mixture of speakers. We also find that the proposed architecture is well capable of learning pronounced spatial selectivity patterns and show that the results depend significantly on the training target and the reference signal when computing various evaluation metrics. 在传统的多通道音频信号增强中，空间和频谱滤波通常顺序执行。相比之下，已经表明对于神经空间过滤来说，光谱空间过滤的联合方法更有益。在这篇文章中，我们研究了这种时变光谱空间滤波器执行的空间滤波。我们通过利用其可解释结构并有目的地告知网络目标说话者的位置，扩展了最近提出的复值空间自动编码器（COSPA），用于目标说话者提取任务。我们表明，由此产生的知情 COSPA (iCOSPA) 可以有效、灵活地从混合说话人中提取目标说话人。我们还发现，所提出的架构能够很好地学习明显的空间选择性模式，并表明在计算各种评估指标时，结果在很大程度上取决于训练目标和参考信号。 本文提出一种基于知情复值空间自编码器（iCOSPA）的目标说话人提取方法，通过联合利用时频-空间信息提升提取效果。 Annika Briegleb,Mhd Modar Halimeh,Walter Kellermann eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Jin-Peng Lan,Zhi-Qi Cheng,Jun-Yan He,Chenyang Li,Bin Luo,Xu Bao,Wangmeng Xiang,Yifeng Geng,Xuansong Xie
title: ProContEXT: Exploring Progressive Context Transformer for Tracking
title_zh: ProContEXT：探索用于跟踪的渐进式上下文转换器
comment: Accepted at ICASSP 2023, source code is at https://github.com/zhiqic/ProContEXT
comments: Accepted at ICASSP 2023, source code is at https://github.com/zhiqic/ProContEXT
abstract: Existing Visual Object Tracking (VOT) only takes the target area in the first frame as a template. This causes tracking to inevitably fail in fast-changing and crowded scenes, as it cannot account for changes in object appearance between frames. To this end, we revamped the tracking framework with Progressive Context Encoding Transformer Tracker (ProContEXT), which coherently exploits spatial and temporal contexts to predict object motion trajectories. Specifically, ProContEXT leverages a context-aware self-attention module to encode the spatial and temporal context, refining and updating the multi-scale static and dynamic templates to progressively perform accurately tracking. It explores the complementary between spatial and temporal context, raising a new pathway to multi-context modeling for transformer-based trackers. In addition, ProContEXT revised the token pruning technique to reduce computational complexity. Extensive experiments on popular benchmark datasets such as GOT-10k and TrackingNet demonstrate that the proposed ProContEXT achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Existing Visual Object Tracking (VOT) only takes the target area in the first frame as a template. This causes tracking to inevitably fail in fast-changing and crowded scenes, as it cannot account for changes in object appearance between frames. To this end, we revamped the tracking framework with Progressive Context Encoding Transformer Tracker (ProContEXT), which coherently exploits spatial and temporal contexts to predict object motion trajectories. Specifically, ProContEXT leverages a context-aware self-attention module to encode the spatial and temporal context, refining and updating the multi-scale static and dynamic templates to progressively perform accurately tracking. It explores the complementary between spatial and temporal context, raising a new pathway to multi-context modeling for transformer-based trackers. In addition, ProContEXT revised the token pruning technique to reduce computational complexity. Extensive experiments on popular benchmark datasets such as GOT-10k and TrackingNet demonstrate that the proposed ProContEXT achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 现有的视觉对象跟踪（VOT）仅以第一帧中的目标区域作为模板。这会导致跟踪在快速变化和拥挤的场景中不可避免地失败，因为它无法解释帧之间对象外观的变化。为此，我们使用渐进式上下文编码转换器跟踪器 (ProContEXT) 改进了跟踪框架，它连贯地利用空间和时间上下文来预测对象运动轨迹。具体来说，ProContEXT 利用上下文感知自注意力模块对空间和时间上下文进行编码，细化和更新多尺度静态和动态模板，以逐步执行准确的跟踪。它探索了空间和时间上下文之间的互补性，为基于变压器的跟踪器提供了多上下文建模的新途径。此外，ProContEXT 修改了 token 剪枝技术以降低计算复杂度。对 GOT-10k 和 TrackingNet 等流行基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 ProContEXT 实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProContEXT方法，通过结合空间与时间上下文信息改进视觉目标跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法仅依赖初始帧目标区域模板，无法适应快速变化或拥挤场景中目标外观的动态变化。
AI.method: 设计上下文感知自注意力模块，融合空间与时间上下文信息，动态更新多尺度模板并优化计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在GOT-10k和TrackingNet数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: ProContEXT通过多上下文建模和计算优化，为基于Transformer的跟踪器提供了新思路。

authors_text: Na Zhang,Shan Jia,Siwei Lyu,Xin Li
title: Fusion-based Few-Shot Morphing Attack Detection and Fingerprinting
title_zh: 基于融合的少样本变形攻击检测和指纹识别
abstract: The vulnerability of face recognition systems to morphing attacks has posed a serious security threat due to the wide adoption of face biometrics in the real world. Most existing morphing attack detection (MAD) methods require a large amount of training data and have only been tested on a few predefined attack models. The lack of good generalization properties, especially in view of the growing interest in developing novel morphing attacks, is a critical limitation with existing MAD research. To address this issue, we propose to extend MAD from supervised learning to few-shot learning and from binary detection to multiclass fingerprinting in this paper. Our technical contributions include: 1) We propose a fusion-based few-shot learning (FSL) method to learn discriminative features that can generalize to unseen morphing attack types from predefined presentation attacks; 2) The proposed FSL based on the fusion of the PRNU model and Noiseprint network is extended from binary MAD to multiclass morphing attack fingerprinting (MAF). 3) We have collected a large-scale database, which contains five face datasets and eight different morphing algorithms, to benchmark the proposed few-shot MAF (FS-MAF) method. Extensive experimental results show the outstanding performance of our fusion-based FS-MAF. The code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/nz0001na/mad maf.
summary: The vulnerability of face recognition systems to morphing attacks has posed a serious security threat due to the wide adoption of face biometrics in the real world. Most existing morphing attack detection (MAD) methods require a large amount of training data and have only been tested on a few predefined attack models. The lack of good generalization properties, especially in view of the growing interest in developing novel morphing attacks, is a critical limitation with existing MAD research. To address this issue, we propose to extend MAD from supervised learning to few-shot learning and from binary detection to multiclass fingerprinting in this paper. Our technical contributions include: 1) We propose a fusion-based few-shot learning (FSL) method to learn discriminative features that can generalize to unseen morphing attack types from predefined presentation attacks; 2) The proposed FSL based on the fusion of the PRNU model and Noiseprint network is extended from binary MAD to multiclass morphing attack fingerprinting (MAF). 3) We have collected a large-scale database, which contains five face datasets and eight different morphing algorithms, to benchmark the proposed few-shot MAF (FS-MAF) method. Extensive experimental results show the outstanding performance of our fusion-based FS-MAF. The code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/nz0001na/mad maf.
abstract_zh: 由于人脸生物识别技术在现实世界中的广泛采用，人脸识别系统容易受到变形攻击，从而构成了严重的安全威胁。大多数现有的变形攻击检测（MAD）方法需要大量的训练数据，并且仅在少数预定义的攻击模型上进行了测试。缺乏良好的泛化特性，特别是考虑到人们对开发新型变形攻击的兴趣日益浓厚，是现有 MAD 研究的一个关键限制。为了解决这个问题，我们建议在本文中将 MAD 从监督学习扩展到少样本学习，从二进制检测扩展到多类指纹识别。我们的技术贡献包括：1）我们提出了一种基于融合的少样本学习（FSL）方法来学习判别性特征，这些特征可以从预定义的表示攻击中推广到未见过的变形攻击类型； 2）所提出的基于PRNU模型和Noiseprint网络融合的FSL从二进制MAD扩展到多类变形攻击指纹（MAF）。 3）我们收集了一个大型数据库，其中包含五个人脸数据集和八种不同的变形算法，以对所提出的少镜头MAF（FS-MAF）方法进行基准测试。大量的实验结果表明我们基于融合的 FS-MAF 具有出色的性能。代码和数据将在 https://github.com/nz0001na/mad maf 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于融合的少样本学习方法，用于检测和指纹识别形态攻击，以解决现有方法泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有形态攻击检测方法依赖大量训练数据且泛化能力差，难以应对新型攻击，亟需提升模型的适应性与检测精度。
AI.method: 融合PRNU模型与Noiseprint网络，构建少样本学习框架，实现从二分类检测到多分类指纹识别的扩展，并构建包含五个数据集和八种算法的大规模数据库进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，提出的FS-MAF方法在未见过的攻击类型上表现出色，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 融合少样本学习与多分类指纹识别有效提升了形态攻击检测的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mieczysław A. Kłopotek,Robert A. Kłopotek
title: How To Overcome Richness Axiom Fallacy
title_zh: 如何克服丰富公理谬误
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, an extended version of ISMIS2022 paper
comments: 18 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, an extended version of ISMIS2022 paper
abstract: The paper points at the grieving problems implied by the richness axiom in the Kleinberg's axiomatic system and suggests resolutions. The richness induces learnability problem in general and leads to conflicts with consistency axiom. As a resolution, learnability constraints and usage of centric consistency or restriction of the domain of considered clusterings to super-ball-clusterings is proposed.
summary: The paper points at the grieving problems implied by the richness axiom in the Kleinberg's axiomatic system and suggests resolutions. The richness induces learnability problem in general and leads to conflicts with consistency axiom. As a resolution, learnability constraints and usage of centric consistency or restriction of the domain of considered clusterings to super-ball-clusterings is proposed.
abstract_zh: 该论文指出了克莱因伯格公理系统中的丰富性公理所隐含的令人痛心的问题，并提出了解决方案。丰富性通常会引发可学习性问题，并导致与一致性公理的冲突。作为解决方案，提出了可学习性约束和中心一致性的使用或将所考虑的聚类的域限制为超级球聚类。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Kleinberg公理体系中丰富性公理隐含的问题，并提出了解决方案。
AI.motivation: 丰富性公理在一般情况下会导致可学习性问题，并与一致性公理产生冲突，需寻找替代方案。
AI.method: 通过引入可学习性约束、采用中心一致性或限制聚类域为超球聚类来解决冲突。
AI.result: 提出了缓解丰富性公理缺陷的方法，减少了与一致性公理的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 所提方案有效解决了丰富性公理带来的问题，优化了聚类公理体系的兼容性。

search_text: How To Overcome Richness Axiom Fallacy 如何克服丰富公理谬误 The paper points at the grieving problems implied by the richness axiom in the Kleinberg's axiomatic system and suggests resolutions. The richness induces learnability problem in general and leads to conflicts with consistency axiom. As a resolution, learnability constraints and usage of centric consistency or restriction of the domain of considered clusterings to super-ball-clusterings is proposed. 该论文指出了克莱因伯格公理系统中的丰富性公理所隐含的令人痛心的问题，并提出了解决方案。丰富性通常会引发可学习性问题，并导致与一致性公理的冲突。作为解决方案，提出了可学习性约束和中心一致性的使用或将所考虑的聚类的域限制为超级球聚类。 本文探讨了Kleinberg公理体系中丰富性公理隐含的问题，并提出了解决方案。 Mieczysław A. Kłopotek,Robert A. Kłopotek cs.AI

authors_text: Navid Kayhani,Angela Schoellig,Brenda McCabe
title: Perception-aware Tag Placement Planning for Robust Localization of UAVs in Indoor Construction Environments
title_zh: 室内施工环境中无人机稳健定位的感知感知标签放置规划
comment: [Final draft] This material may be downloaded for personal use only. Any other use requires prior permission of the American Society of Civil Engineers and the Journal of Computing in Civil Engineering
comments: [Final draft] This material may be downloaded for personal use only. Any other use requires prior permission of the American Society of Civil Engineers and the Journal of Computing in Civil Engineering
abstract: Tag-based visual-inertial localization is a lightweight method for enabling autonomous data collection missions of low-cost unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in indoor construction environments. However, finding the optimal tag configuration (i.e., number, size, and location) on dynamic construction sites remains challenging. This paper proposes a perception-aware genetic algorithm-based tag placement planner (PGA-TaPP) to determine the optimal tag configuration using 4D-BIM, considering the project progress, safety requirements, and UAV's localizability. The proposed method provides a 4D plan for tag placement by maximizing the localizability in user-specified regions of interest (ROIs) while limiting the installation costs. Localizability is quantified using the Fisher information matrix (FIM) and encapsulated in navigable grids. The experimental results show the effectiveness of our method in finding an optimal 4D tag placement plan for the robust localization of UAVs on under-construction indoor sites.
summary: Tag-based visual-inertial localization is a lightweight method for enabling autonomous data collection missions of low-cost unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in indoor construction environments. However, finding the optimal tag configuration (i.e., number, size, and location) on dynamic construction sites remains challenging. This paper proposes a perception-aware genetic algorithm-based tag placement planner (PGA-TaPP) to determine the optimal tag configuration using 4D-BIM, considering the project progress, safety requirements, and UAV's localizability. The proposed method provides a 4D plan for tag placement by maximizing the localizability in user-specified regions of interest (ROIs) while limiting the installation costs. Localizability is quantified using the Fisher information matrix (FIM) and encapsulated in navigable grids. The experimental results show the effectiveness of our method in finding an optimal 4D tag placement plan for the robust localization of UAVs on under-construction indoor sites.
abstract_zh: 基于标签的视觉惯性定位是一种轻量级方法，可在室内施工环境中实现低成本无人机（UAV）的自主数据收集任务。然而，在动态建筑工地上找到最佳标签配置（即数量、大小和位置）仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种基于感知感知遗传算法的标签放置规划器（PGA-TaPP），以考虑项目进度、安全要求和无人机的可定位性，使用 4D-BIM 确定最佳标签配置。所提出的方法通过最大化用户指定的感兴趣区域 (ROI) 的可定位性同时限制安装成本，提供标签放置的 4D 计划。可定位性使用 Fisher 信息矩阵 (FIM) 进行量化，并封装在可导航网格中。实验结果表明，我们的方法在寻找最佳 4D 标签放置计划以实现在建室内场地上无人机稳健定位方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于感知的遗传算法标签放置规划方法（PGA-TaPP），用于在室内建筑环境中实现无人机的鲁棒定位。
AI.motivation: 在动态建筑工地中，确定标签数量、尺寸和位置的最优配置以确保无人机定位鲁棒性是一个挑战。
AI.method: 结合4D-BIM和遗传算法，通过Fisher信息矩阵量化可定位性，并在可导航网格中封装，考虑项目进度、安全要求和无人机定位性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效找到满足用户指定区域兴趣（ROI）的最优4D标签放置方案，平衡定位性能与安装成本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PGA-TaPP方法为建筑工地无人机的鲁棒定位提供了有效的标签放置规划解决方案。

authors_text: Alejandro Gonzalez-Hevia,Daniel Gayo-Avello
title: Leveraging Wikidata's edit history in knowledge graph refinement tasks
title_zh: 在知识图细化任务中利用维基数据的编辑历史
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to the Journal of Web Semantics
comments: 18 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to the Journal of Web Semantics
abstract: Knowledge graphs have been adopted in many diverse fields for a variety of purposes. Most of those applications rely on valid and complete data to deliver their results, pressing the need to improve the quality of knowledge graphs. A number of solutions have been proposed to that end, ranging from rule-based approaches to the use of probabilistic methods, but there is an element that has not been considered yet: the edit history of the graph. In the case of collaborative knowledge graphs (e.g., Wikidata), those edits represent the process in which the community reaches some kind of fuzzy and distributed consensus over the information that best represents each entity, and can hold potentially interesting information to be used by knowledge graph refinement methods. In this paper, we explore the use of edit history information from Wikidata to improve the performance of type prediction methods. To do that, we have first built a JSON dataset containing the edit history of every instance from the 100 most important classes in Wikidata. This edit history information is then explored and analyzed, with a focus on its potential applicability in knowledge graph refinement tasks. Finally, we propose and evaluate two new methods to leverage this edit history information in knowledge graph embedding models for type prediction tasks. Our results show an improvement in one of the proposed methods against current approaches, showing the potential of using edit information in knowledge graph refinement tasks and opening new promising research lines within the field.

A number of solutions have been proposed to that end, ranging from rule-based approaches to the use of probabilistic methods, but there is an element that has not been considered yet: the edit history of the graph. In the case of collaborative knowledge graphs (e.g., Wikidata), those edits represent the process in which the community reaches some kind of fuzzy and distributed consensus over the information that best represents each entity, and can hold potentially interesting information to be used by knowledge graph refinement methods. In this paper, we explore the use of edit history information from Wikidata to improve the performance of type prediction methods. To do that, we have first built a JSON dataset containing the edit history of every instance from the 100 most important classes in Wikidata. This edit history information is then explored and analyzed, with a focus on its potential applicability in knowledge graph refinement tasks. Finally, we propose and evaluate two new methods to leverage this edit history information in knowledge graph embedding models for type prediction tasks. Our results show an improvement in one of the proposed methods against current approaches, showing the potential of using edit information in knowledge graph refinement tasks and opening new promising research lines within the field.
abstract_zh: 知识图已被应用于许多不同的领域，用于各种目的。这些应用程序大多数依赖于有效且完整的数据来提供结果，迫切需要提高知识图的质量。为此，人们提出了许多解决方案，从基于规则的方法到使用概率方法，但有一个元素尚未考虑：图表的编辑历史。在协作知识图（例如维基数据）的情况下，这些编辑代表了社区对最能代表每个实体的信息达成某种模糊和分布式共识的过程，并且可以保存知识图细化方法使用的潜在有趣信息。在本文中，我们探索使用维基数据的编辑历史信息来提高类型预测方法的性能。为此，我们首先构建了一个 JSON 数据集，其中包含 Wikidata 中 100 个最重要类的每个实例的编辑历史记录。然后探索和分析该编辑历史信息，重点关注其在知识图细化任务中的潜在适用性。最后，我们提出并评估了两种新方法，以利用知识图嵌入模型中的编辑历史信息来执行类型预测任务。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法之一相对于当前方法有所改进，显示了在知识图细化任务中使用编辑信息的潜力，并在该领域开辟了新的有前途的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建Wikidata中前100个重要类别的实例编辑历史数据集，并提出两种新方法将编辑历史信息融入知识图谱嵌入模型，以提升类型预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱优化方法未充分考虑协作编辑过程中形成的社区共识信息，而Wikidata的编辑历史可能蕴含有价值的信息用于改进知识图谱质量。
AI.method: 构建包含100个重要类别实例编辑历史的JSON数据集，分析编辑历史特征，并设计两种将编辑历史信息整合至知识图谱嵌入模型的方法。
AI.result: 其中一种方法在类型预测任务中相较于现有方法表现出性能提升，验证了编辑历史信息的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 编辑历史信息在知识图谱优化任务中具有应用潜力，为该领域开辟了新的研究方向。

Our results show an improvement in one of the proposed methods against current approaches, showing the potential of using edit information in knowledge graph refinement tasks and opening new promising research lines within the field. 知识图已被应用于许多不同的领域，用于各种目的。这些应用程序大多数依赖于有效且完整的数据来提供结果，迫切需要提高知识图的质量。为此，人们提出了许多解决方案，从基于规则的方法到使用概率方法，但有一个元素尚未考虑：图表的编辑历史。在协作知识图（例如维基数据）的情况下，这些编辑代表了社区对最能代表每个实体的信息达成某种模糊和分布式共识的过程，并且可以保存知识图细化方法使用的潜在有趣信息。在本文中，我们探索使用维基数据的编辑历史信息来提高类型预测方法的性能。为此，我们首先构建了一个 JSON 数据集，其中包含 Wikidata 中 100 个最重要类的每个实例的编辑历史记录。然后探索和分析该编辑历史信息，重点关注其在知识图细化任务中的潜在适用性。最后，我们提出并评估了两种新方法，以利用知识图嵌入模型中的编辑历史信息来执行类型预测任务。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法之一相对于当前方法有所改进，显示了在知识图细化任务中使用编辑信息的潜力，并在该领域开辟了新的有前途的研究方向。 本文通过构建Wikidata中前100个重要类别的实例编辑历史数据集，并提出两种新方法将编辑历史信息融入知识图谱嵌入模型，以提升类型预测任务的性能。 Alejandro Gonzalez-Hevia,Daniel Gayo-Avello cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Pan Wang,Jie Li,Jieru Chen,Lin Wang,Chun Qi
title: Reconstruction of compressed spectral imaging based on global structure and spectral correlation
title_zh: 基于全局结构和光谱相关性的压缩光谱成像重建
abstract: In this paper, a convolutional sparse coding method based on global structure characteristics and spectral correlation is proposed for the reconstruction of compressive spectral images. The spectral data is regarded as the convolution sum of the convolution kernel and the corresponding coefficients, using the convolution kernel operates the global image information, preserving the structure information of the spectral image in the spatial dimension. To take full exploration of the constraints between spectra, the coefficients corresponding to the convolution kernel are constrained by the L_(2,1)norm to improve spectral accuracy. And, to solve the problem that convolutional sparse coding is insensitive to low frequency, the global total-variation (TV) constraint is added to estimate the low-frequency components. It not only ensures the effective estimation of the low-frequency but also transforms the convolutional sparse coding into a de-noising process, which makes the reconstructing process simpler. Simulations show that compared with the current mainstream optimization methods, the proposed method can improve the reconstruction quality by up to 4 dB in PSNR and 10% in SSIM, and has a great improvement in the details of the reconstructed image.
summary: In this paper, a convolutional sparse coding method based on global structure characteristics and spectral correlation is proposed for the reconstruction of compressive spectral images. The spectral data is regarded as the convolution sum of the convolution kernel and the corresponding coefficients, using the convolution kernel operates the global image information, preserving the structure information of the spectral image in the spatial dimension. To take full exploration of the constraints between spectra, the coefficients corresponding to the convolution kernel are constrained by the L_(2,1)norm to improve spectral accuracy. And, to solve the problem that convolutional sparse coding is insensitive to low frequency, the global total-variation (TV) constraint is added to estimate the low-frequency components. It not only ensures the effective estimation of the low-frequency but also transforms the convolutional sparse coding into a de-noising process, which makes the reconstructing process simpler. Simulations show that compared with the current mainstream optimization methods, the proposed method can improve the reconstruction quality by up to 4 dB in PSNR and 10% in SSIM, and has a great improvement in the details of the reconstructed image.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于全局结构特征和谱相关性的卷积稀疏编码方法，用于压缩光谱图像的重建。将光谱数据视为卷积核与相应系数的卷积和，利用卷积核对图像的全局信息进行运算，保留了光谱图像在空间维度上的结构信息。为了充分探索光谱之间的约束，对卷积核对应的系数进行L_(2,1)范数约束，以提高光谱精度。并且，为了解决卷积稀疏编码对低频不敏感的问题，添加全局总变化（TV）约束来估计低频分量。不仅保证了低频的有效估计，而且将卷积稀疏编码转化为去噪过程，使得重构过程更加简单。仿真结果表明，与目前主流的优化方法相比，该方法在PSNR上可以将重建质量提高高达4dB，在SSIM上可以提高10%，并且重建图像的细节也有很大的改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局结构特征和光谱相关性的卷积稀疏编码方法，用于压缩光谱图像的重建。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩光谱图像重建方法未能有效利用全局结构信息和光谱间的相关性，导致重建质量不足。
AI.method: 将光谱数据视为卷积核与系数的卷积和，通过卷积核提取全局信息并保留空间结构；采用L_(2,1)范数约束系数提升光谱准确性；引入全局总变分约束估计低频分量，简化重建过程。
AI.result: 相比主流优化方法，PSNR提升最高达4dB，SSIM提升10%，重建图像细节显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合全局结构、光谱相关性及低频约束，有效提升了压缩光谱图像的重建质量与细节表现。

authors_text: Ekkasit Pinyoanuntapong,Ayman Ali,Pu Wang,Minwoo Lee,Chen Chen
title: GaitMixer: Skeleton-based Gait Representation Learning via Wide-spectrum Multi-axial Mixer
title_zh: GaitMixer：通过广谱多轴混合器进行基于骨架的步态表示学习
abstract: Most existing gait recognition methods are appearance-based, which rely on the silhouettes extracted from the video data of human walking activities. The less-investigated skeleton-based gait recognition methods directly learn the gait dynamics from 2D/3D human skeleton sequences, which are theoretically more robust solutions in the presence of appearance changes caused by clothes, hairstyles, and carrying objects. However, the performance of skeleton-based solutions is still largely behind the appearance-based ones. This paper aims to close such performance gap by proposing a novel network model, GaitMixer, to learn more discriminative gait representation from skeleton sequence data. In particular, GaitMixer follows a heterogeneous multi-axial mixer architecture, which exploits the spatial self-attention mixer followed by the temporal large-kernel convolution mixer to learn rich multi-frequency signals in the gait feature maps. Experiments on the widely used gait database, CASIA-B, demonstrate that GaitMixer outperforms the previous SOTA skeleton-based methods by a large margin while achieving a competitive performance compared with the representative appearance-based solutions. Code will be available at https://github.com/exitudio/gaitmixer
summary: Most existing gait recognition methods are appearance-based, which rely on the silhouettes extracted from the video data of human walking activities. The less-investigated skeleton-based gait recognition methods directly learn the gait dynamics from 2D/3D human skeleton sequences, which are theoretically more robust solutions in the presence of appearance changes caused by clothes, hairstyles, and carrying objects. However, the performance of skeleton-based solutions is still largely behind the appearance-based ones. This paper aims to close such performance gap by proposing a novel network model, GaitMixer, to learn more discriminative gait representation from skeleton sequence data. In particular, GaitMixer follows a heterogeneous multi-axial mixer architecture, which exploits the spatial self-attention mixer followed by the temporal large-kernel convolution mixer to learn rich multi-frequency signals in the gait feature maps. Experiments on the widely used gait database, CASIA-B, demonstrate that GaitMixer outperforms the previous SOTA skeleton-based methods by a large margin while achieving a competitive performance compared with the representative appearance-based solutions. Code will be available at https://github.com/exitudio/gaitmixer
abstract_zh: 现有的步态识别方法大多是基于外观的，依赖于从人类步行活动的视频数据中提取的轮廓。研究较少的基于骨骼的步态识别方法直接从 2D/3D 人体骨骼序列中学习步态动力学，理论上来说，在因衣服、发型和携带物体引起的外观变化的情况下，这是更稳健的解决方案。然而，基于骨架的解决方案的性能仍然很大程度上落后于基于外观的解决方案。本文旨在通过提出一种新颖的网络模型 GaitMixer 来缩小这种性能差距，以从骨架序列数据中学习更具辨别力的步态表示。特别是，GaitMixer 采用异构多轴混合器架构，利用空间自注意力混合器和时间大内核卷积混合器来学习步态特征图中丰富的多频信号。在广泛使用的步态数据库 CASIA-B 上进行的实验表明，GaitMixer 大幅优于之前的基于 SOTA 骨架的方法，同时与代表性的基于外观的解决方案相比，实现了具有竞争力的性能。代码将在 https://github.com/exitudio/gaitmixer 提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于骨架的步态识别方法GaitMixer，通过多轴混合架构学习更具判别性的步态表示以缩小与外观方法的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法多依赖外观特征，易受衣物等外观变化影响。基于骨架的方法理论上更鲁棒但性能不足，需改进以提升效果。
AI.method: 设计异构多轴混合网络架构，结合空间自注意力机制与大核时序卷积，提取步态特征图中的多频信号。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B数据集上，GaitMixer显著优于现有骨架方法，并达到与主流外观方法相当的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过多轴混合架构有效学习骨架序列的判别性表示，成功缩小骨架方法与外观方法的性能差距。

authors_text: Arcadi Llanza,Nadiya Shvai,Amir Nakib
title: Study of the Fractal decomposition based metaheuristic on low-dimensional Black-Box optimization problems
title_zh: 基于分形分解的低维黑盒优化问题元启发式研究
abstract: This paper analyzes the performance of the Fractal Decomposition Algorithm (FDA) metaheuristic applied to low-dimensional continuous optimization problems. This algorithm was originally developed specifically to deal efficiently with high-dimensional continuous optimization problems by building a fractal-based search tree with a branching factor linearly proportional to the number of dimensions. Here, we aim to answer the question of whether FDA could be equally effective for low-dimensional problems. For this purpose, we evaluate the performance of FDA on the Black Box Optimization Benchmark (BBOB) for dimensions 2, 3, 5, 10, 20, and 40. The experimental results show that overall the FDA in its current form does not perform well enough. Among different function groups, FDA shows its best performance on Misc. moderate and Weak structure functions.
summary: This paper analyzes the performance of the Fractal Decomposition Algorithm (FDA) metaheuristic applied to low-dimensional continuous optimization problems. This algorithm was originally developed specifically to deal efficiently with high-dimensional continuous optimization problems by building a fractal-based search tree with a branching factor linearly proportional to the number of dimensions. Here, we aim to answer the question of whether FDA could be equally effective for low-dimensional problems. For this purpose, we evaluate the performance of FDA on the Black Box Optimization Benchmark (BBOB) for dimensions 2, 3, 5, 10, 20, and 40. The experimental results show that overall the FDA in its current form does not perform well enough. Among different function groups, FDA shows its best performance on Misc. moderate and Weak structure functions.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了分形分解算法（FDA）元启发式应用于低维连续优化问题的性能。该算法最初是专门为有效处理高维连续优化问题而开发的，方法是构建基于分形的搜索树，其分支因子与维数成线性比例。在这里，我们的目标是回答 FDA 对于低维问题是否同样有效的问题。为此，我们在黑盒优化基准（BBOB）上评估了 FDA 在 2、3、5、10、20 和 40 维度上的表现。实验结果表明，总体而言，目前形式的 FDA 表现不够好。在不同的功能组中，FDA 在 Misc 上表现最好。中度和弱结构功能。

AI.tldr: 评估分形分解算法（FDA）元启发式方法在低维连续优化问题中的性能
AI.motivation: 探讨FDA是否能有效解决低维问题，尽管其设计初衷是高维问题

search_text: Study of the Fractal decomposition based metaheuristic on low-dimensional Black-Box optimization problems 基于分形分解的低维黑盒优化问题元启发式研究 This paper analyzes the performance of the Fractal Decomposition Algorithm (FDA) metaheuristic applied to low-dimensional continuous optimization problems. This algorithm was originally developed specifically to deal efficiently with high-dimensional continuous optimization problems by building a fractal-based search tree with a branching factor linearly proportional to the number of dimensions. Here, we aim to answer the question of whether FDA could be equally effective for low-dimensional problems. For this purpose, we evaluate the performance of FDA on the Black Box Optimization Benchmark (BBOB) for dimensions 2, 3, 5, 10, 20, and 40. The experimental results show that overall the FDA in its current form does not perform well enough. Among different function groups, FDA shows its best performance on Misc. moderate and Weak structure functions. 本文分析了分形分解算法（FDA）元启发式应用于低维连续优化问题的性能。该算法最初是专门为有效处理高维连续优化问题而开发的，方法是构建基于分形的搜索树，其分支因子与维数成线性比例。在这里，我们的目标是回答 FDA 对于低维问题是否同样有效的问题。为此，我们在黑盒优化基准（BBOB）上评估了 FDA 在 2、3、5、10、20 和 40 维度上的表现。实验结果表明，总体而言，目前形式的 FDA 表现不够好。在不同的功能组中，FDA 在 Misc 上表现最好。中度和弱结构功能。 评估分形分解算法（FDA）元启发式方法在低维连续优化问题中的性能 Arcadi Llanza,Nadiya Shvai,Amir Nakib cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Mahmut Can Bozyiğit,Murat Olgun,Mehmet Ünver
title: Circular Pythagorean fuzzy sets and applications to multi-criteria decision making
title_zh: 循环毕达哥拉斯模糊集及其在多标准决策中的应用
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the concept of circular Pythagorean fuzzy set (value) (C-PFS(V)) as a new generalization of both circular intuitionistic fuzzy sets (C-IFSs) proposed by Atannassov and Pythagorean fuzzy sets (PFSs) proposed by Yager. A circular Pythagorean fuzzy set is represented by a circle that represents the membership degree and the non-membership degree and whose center consists of non-negative real numbers $μ$ and $ν$ with the condition $μ^2+ν^2\leq 1$. A C-PFS models the fuzziness of the uncertain information more properly thanks to its structure that allows modelling the information with points of a circle of a certain center and a radius. Therefore, a C-PFS lets decision makers to evaluate objects in a larger and more flexible region and thus more sensitive decisions can be made. After defining the concept of C-PFS we define some fundamental set operations between C-PFSs and propose some algebraic operations between C-PFVs via general $t$-norms and $t$-conorms. By utilizing these algebraic operations, we introduce some weighted aggregation operators to transform input values represented by C-PFVs to a single output value. Then to determine the degree of similarity between C-PFVs we define a cosine similarity measure based on radius. Furthermore, we develop a method to transform a collection of Pythagorean fuzzy values to a PFS. Finally, a method is given to solve multi-criteria decision making problems in circular Pythagorean fuzzy environment and the proposed method is practiced to a problem about selecting the best photovoltaic cell from the literature. We also study the comparison analysis and time complexity of the proposed method.
summary: In this paper, we introduce the concept of circular Pythagorean fuzzy set (value) (C-PFS(V)) as a new generalization of both circular intuitionistic fuzzy sets (C-IFSs) proposed by Atannassov and Pythagorean fuzzy sets (PFSs) proposed by Yager. A circular Pythagorean fuzzy set is represented by a circle that represents the membership degree and the non-membership degree and whose center consists of non-negative real numbers $μ$ and $ν$ with the condition $μ^2+ν^2\leq 1$. A C-PFS models the fuzziness of the uncertain information more properly thanks to its structure that allows modelling the information with points of a circle of a certain center and a radius. Therefore, a C-PFS lets decision makers to evaluate objects in a larger and more flexible region and thus more sensitive decisions can be made. After defining the concept of C-PFS we define some fundamental set operations between C-PFSs and propose some algebraic operations between C-PFVs via general $t$-norms and $t$-conorms. By utilizing these algebraic operations, we introduce some weighted aggregation operators to transform input values represented by C-PFVs to a single output value. Then to determine the degree of similarity between C-PFVs we define a cosine similarity measure based on radius. Furthermore, we develop a method to transform a collection of Pythagorean fuzzy values to a PFS. Finally, a method is given to solve multi-criteria decision making problems in circular Pythagorean fuzzy environment and the proposed method is practiced to a problem about selecting the best photovoltaic cell from the literature. We also study the comparison analysis and time complexity of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入了循环勾股模糊集（值）（C-PFS（V））的概念，作为Atannassov提出的循环直觉模糊集（C-IFS）和Yager提出的勾股模糊集（PFS）的新推广。圆形毕达哥拉斯模糊集用一个代表隶属度和非隶属度的圆来表示，其中心由非负实数$μ$和$ν$组成，条件为$μ^2+ν^2\leq 1$。 C-PFS 能够更准确地对不确定信息的模糊性进行建模，因为它的结构允许使用特定圆心和半径的圆上的点对信息进行建模。因此，C-PFS可以让决策者在更大、更灵活的区域中评估对象，从而做出更敏感的决策。在定义了 C-PFS 的概念之后，我们定义了 C-PFS 之间的一些基本集合运算，并通过通用 $t$-norms 和 $t$-conorms 提出了 C-PFV 之间的一些代数运算。通过利用这些代数运算，我们引入了一些加权聚合算子，将 C-PFV 表示的输入值转换为单个输出值。然后为了确定 C-PFV 之间的相似程度，我们定义了基于半径的余弦相似性度量。此外，我们开发了一种将毕达哥拉斯模糊值集合转换为 PFS 的方法。最后，给出了一种解决圆形毕达哥拉斯模糊环境中的多准则决策问题的方法，并将所提出的方法应用于从文献中选择最佳光伏电池的问题。我们还研究了所提出方法的比较分析和时间复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的圆型毕达哥拉斯模糊集（C-PFS），并将其应用于多准则决策问题，通过定义相关运算和聚合算子，解决了不确定性信息的建模与决策问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的毕达哥拉斯模糊集和直觉模糊集在处理不确定性信息时存在局限性，本文旨在通过引入圆型结构扩展模糊集理论，以更灵活地建模复杂不确定性并提升决策敏感性。
AI.method: 定义圆型毕达哥拉斯模糊集的数学结构，建立基于t-范数和t-余范数的集合运算与代数操作，提出加权聚合算子和基于半径的余弦相似度度量，并开发适用于多准则决策的转换方法与求解框架。
AI.result: 通过光伏电池选择案例验证了方法的有效性，同时进行了比较分析与时间复杂度评估，证明了C-PFS在处理不确定性信息时的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 圆型毕达哥拉斯模糊集为多准则决策提供了更灵活的不确定性建模工具，其结构优势和算法有效性在实际案例中得到验证，为模糊决策理论的发展提供了新方向。

authors_text: Heng Dong,Tonghan Wang,Jiayuan Liu,Chongjie Zhang
title: Low-Rank Modular Reinforcement Learning via Muscle Synergy
title_zh: 通过肌肉协同的低阶模块化强化学习
comment: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Modular Reinforcement Learning (RL) decentralizes the control of multi-joint robots by learning policies for each actuator. Previous work on modular RL has proven its ability to control morphologically different agents with a shared actuator policy. However, with the increase in the Degree of Freedom (DoF) of robots, training a morphology-generalizable modular controller becomes exponentially difficult. Motivated by the way the human central nervous system controls numerous muscles, we propose a Synergy-Oriented LeARning (SOLAR) framework that exploits the redundant nature of DoF in robot control. Actuators are grouped into synergies by an unsupervised learning method, and a synergy action is learned to control multiple actuators in synchrony. In this way, we achieve a low-rank control at the synergy level. We extensively evaluate our method on a variety of robot morphologies, and the results show its superior efficiency and generalizability, especially on robots with a large DoF like Humanoids++ and UNIMALs.
summary: Modular Reinforcement Learning (RL) decentralizes the control of multi-joint robots by learning policies for each actuator. Previous work on modular RL has proven its ability to control morphologically different agents with a shared actuator policy. However, with the increase in the Degree of Freedom (DoF) of robots, training a morphology-generalizable modular controller becomes exponentially difficult. Motivated by the way the human central nervous system controls numerous muscles, we propose a Synergy-Oriented LeARning (SOLAR) framework that exploits the redundant nature of DoF in robot control. Actuators are grouped into synergies by an unsupervised learning method, and a synergy action is learned to control multiple actuators in synchrony. In this way, we achieve a low-rank control at the synergy level. We extensively evaluate our method on a variety of robot morphologies, and the results show its superior efficiency and generalizability, especially on robots with a large DoF like Humanoids++ and UNIMALs.
abstract_zh: 模块化强化学习（RL）通过学习每个执行器的策略来分散多关节机器人的控制。先前关于模块化强化学习的工作已经证明其能够通过共享执行器策略来控制形态上不同的代理。 However, with the increase in the Degree of Freedom (DoF) of robots, training a morphology-generalizable modular controller becomes exponentially difficult.受人类中枢神经系统控制大量肌肉的方式的启发，我们提出了一种面向协同的学习（SOLAR）框架，该框架利用了机器人控制中自由度的冗余性质。通过无监督学习方法将执行器分组为协同，并学习协同动作来同步控制多个执行器。 In this way, we achieve a low-rank control at the synergy level. We extensively evaluate our method on a variety of robot morphologies, and the results show its superior efficiency and generalizability, especially on robots with a large DoF like Humanoids++ and UNIMALs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于肌肉协同的低秩模块化强化学习框架SOLAR，用于解决高自由度机器人控制的通用性难题。
AI.motivation: 传统模块化强化学习在高自由度机器人控制中面临指数级训练难度，受人类中枢神经系统通过肌肉协同控制多组肌肉的启发，提出利用冗余自由度进行协同控制的新思路。
AI.method: 通过无监督学习将执行器分组为协同单元，学习同步控制多个执行器的协同动作，实现协同层面的低秩控制。
AI.result: 在多种机器人形态（包括Humanoids++和UNIMALs等高自由度机器人）上的实验表明，该方法在效率和泛化能力上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SOLAR框架通过模仿生物肌肉协同机制，有效解决了高自由度机器人模块化控制的可扩展性问题，为复杂机器人控制提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 通过无监督学习将执行器分组为协同单元，学习同步控制多个执行器的协同动作，实现协同层面的低秩控制。
ai_content_json.result: 在多种机器人形态（包括Humanoids++和UNIMALs等高自由度机器人）上的实验表明，该方法在效率和泛化能力上优于现有方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: SOLAR框架通过模仿生物肌肉协同机制，有效解决了高自由度机器人模块化控制的可扩展性问题，为复杂机器人控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Low-Rank Modular Reinforcement Learning via Muscle Synergy 通过肌肉协同的低阶模块化强化学习 Modular Reinforcement Learning (RL) decentralizes the control of multi-joint robots by learning policies for each actuator. Previous work on modular RL has proven its ability to control morphologically different agents with a shared actuator policy. However, with the increase in the Degree of Freedom (DoF) of robots, training a morphology-generalizable modular controller becomes exponentially difficult. Motivated by the way the human central nervous system controls numerous muscles, we propose a Synergy-Oriented LeARning (SOLAR) framework that exploits the redundant nature of DoF in robot control. Actuators are grouped into synergies by an unsupervised learning method, and a synergy action is learned to control multiple actuators in synchrony. In this way, we achieve a low-rank control at the synergy level. We extensively evaluate our method on a variety of robot morphologies, and the results show its superior efficiency and generalizability, especially on robots with a large DoF like Humanoids++ and UNIMALs. 模块化强化学习（RL）通过学习每个执行器的策略来分散多关节机器人的控制。先前关于模块化强化学习的工作已经证明其能够通过共享执行器策略来控制形态上不同的代理。 However, with the increase in the Degree of Freedom (DoF) of robots, training a morphology-generalizable modular controller becomes exponentially difficult.受人类中枢神经系统控制大量肌肉的方式的启发，我们提出了一种面向协同的学习（SOLAR）框架，该框架利用了机器人控制中自由度的冗余性质。通过无监督学习方法将执行器分组为协同，并学习协同动作来同步控制多个执行器。 In this way, we achieve a low-rank control at the synergy level. We extensively evaluate our method on a variety of robot morphologies, and the results show its superior efficiency and generalizability, especially on robots with a large DoF like Humanoids++ and UNIMALs. 本文提出了一种基于肌肉协同的低秩模块化强化学习框架SOLAR，用于解决高自由度机器人控制的通用性难题。 Heng Dong,Tonghan Wang,Jiayuan Liu,Chongjie Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Vittorio Lippi,Christoph Maurer,Thomas Mergner
title: Human-Likeness Indicator for Robot Posture Control and Balance
title_zh: 用于机器人姿势控制和平衡的拟人指示器
comment: 16 pages, 5 Figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.14395
comments: 16 pages, 5 Figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.14395
abstract: Similarly to humans, humanoid robots require posture control and balance to walk and interact with the environment. In this work posture control in perturbed conditions is evaluated as a performance test for humanoid control. A specific performance indicator is proposed: the score is based on the comparison between the body sway of the tested humanoid standing on a moving surface and the sway produced by healthy subjects performing the same experiment. This approach is here oriented to the evaluation of a human-likeness. The measure is tested using a humanoid robot in order to demonstrate a typical usage of the proposed evaluation scheme and an example of how to improve robot control on the basis of such a performance indicator score
summary: Similarly to humans, humanoid robots require posture control and balance to walk and interact with the environment. In this work posture control in perturbed conditions is evaluated as a performance test for humanoid control. A specific performance indicator is proposed: the score is based on the comparison between the body sway of the tested humanoid standing on a moving surface and the sway produced by healthy subjects performing the same experiment. This approach is here oriented to the evaluation of a human-likeness. The measure is tested using a humanoid robot in order to demonstrate a typical usage of the proposed evaluation scheme and an example of how to improve robot control on the basis of such a performance indicator score
abstract_zh: 与人类类似，人形机器人需要姿势控制和平衡才能行走并与环境交互。在此工作中，扰动条件下的姿势控制被评估为人形控制的性能测试。提出了一个具体的性能指标：分数是基于被测试的人形生物站在移动表面上的身体摇摆与进行相同实验的健康受试者产生的摇摆之间的比较。这种方法在这里面向的是对人类相似性的评估。该措施使用人形机器人进行测试，以展示所提出的评估方案的典型用法以及如何基于此类性能指标分数改进机器人控制的示例

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人体相似性的指标，用于评估类人机器人在受扰动条件下的姿势控制与平衡能力。
AI.motivation: 类人机器人需要像人类一样保持平衡与姿势控制，但缺乏有效量化其人类相似性的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过比较机器人与健康人在移动表面站立时的躯干摆动数据，构建人类相似性评分指标，并用于指导控制优化。
AI.result: 实验验证了该指标能有效评估机器人平衡性能，并展示了基于该指标改进控制策略的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的评估框架为类人机器人控制系统的优化提供了量化依据，可提升其动态平衡能力的人类相似性。

authors_text: Hasna Nhaila,Asma Elmaizi,Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed Hammouch
title: A Novel Filter Approach for Band Selection and Classification of Hyperspectral Remotely Sensed Images Using Normalized Mutual Information and Support Vector Machines
title_zh: 使用归一化互信息和支持向量机进行高光谱遥感图像波段选择和分类的新型滤波器方法
abstract: Band selection is a great challenging task in the classification of hyperspectral remotely sensed images HSI. This is resulting from its high spectral resolution, the many class outputs and the limited number of training samples. For this purpose, this paper introduces a new filter approach for dimension reduction and classification of hyperspectral images using information theoretic (normalized mutual information) and support vector machines SVM. This method consists to select a minimal subset of the most informative and relevant bands from the input datasets for better classification efficiency. We applied our proposed algorithm on two well-known benchmark datasets gathered by the NASA's AVIRIS sensor over Indiana and Salinas valley in USA. The experimental results were assessed based on different evaluation metrics widely used in this area. The comparison with the state of the art methods proves that our method could produce good performance with reduced number of selected bands in a good timing. Keywords: Dimension reduction, Hyperspectral images, Band selection, Normalized mutual information, Classification, Support vector machines
summary: Band selection is a great challenging task in the classification of hyperspectral remotely sensed images HSI. This is resulting from its high spectral resolution, the many class outputs and the limited number of training samples. For this purpose, this paper introduces a new filter approach for dimension reduction and classification of hyperspectral images using information theoretic (normalized mutual information) and support vector machines SVM. This method consists to select a minimal subset of the most informative and relevant bands from the input datasets for better classification efficiency. We applied our proposed algorithm on two well-known benchmark datasets gathered by the NASA's AVIRIS sensor over Indiana and Salinas valley in USA. The experimental results were assessed based on different evaluation metrics widely used in this area. The comparison with the state of the art methods proves that our method could produce good performance with reduced number of selected bands in a good timing. Keywords: Dimension reduction, Hyperspectral images, Band selection, Normalized mutual information, Classification, Support vector machines
abstract_zh: Band selection is a great challenging task in the classification of hyperspectral remotely sensed images HSI. This is resulting from its high spectral resolution, the many class outputs and the limited number of training samples.为此，本文介绍了一种使用信息论（归一化互信息）和支持向量机 SVM 进行高光谱图像降维和分类的新滤波器方法。该方法包括从输入数据集中选择信息最丰富且相关的波段的最小子集，以提高分类效率。我们将我们提出的算法应用于美国宇航局 AVIRIS 传感器在美国印第安纳州和萨利纳斯山谷收集的两个著名基准数据集。 The experimental results were assessed based on different evaluation metrics widely used in this area.与最先进的方法的比较证明，我们的方法可以在良好的时机减少所选频段的数量，从而产生良好的性能。 Keywords: Dimension reduction, Hyperspectral images, Band selection, Normalized mutual information, Classification, Support vector machines

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合归一化互信息和支持向量机的新过滤方法，用于高光谱图像的波段选择和分类，以提高分类效率并减少计算负担。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像因高光谱分辨率、多类别输出及训练样本有限，导致波段选择和分类面临挑战，需更高效的降维方法。
AI.method: 基于信息论的归一化互信息筛选关键波段，结合支持向量机进行分类，选取最小信息量大的波段子集优化分类性能。
AI.result: 在NASA AVIRIS传感器的Indiana和Salinas数据集实验中，该方法在较少波段数量下取得优于现有方法的分类准确率和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了波段数量与分类精度，为高光谱图像处理提供了实用的降维分类方案。
