authors_text: Hongcheng Guo,Jiaheng Liu,Haoyang Huang,Jian Yang,Zhoujun Li,Dongdong Zhang,Zheng Cui,Furu Wei
title: LVP-M3: Language-aware Visual Prompt for Multilingual Multimodal Machine Translation
title_zh: LVP-M3：多语言多模式机器翻译的语言感知视觉提示
abstract: Multimodal Machine Translation (MMT) focuses on enhancing text-only translation with visual features, which has attracted considerable attention from both natural language processing and computer vision communities. Recent advances still struggle to train a separate model for each language pair, which is costly and unaffordable when the number of languages increases in the real world. In other words, the multilingual multimodal machine translation (Multilingual MMT) task has not been investigated, which aims to handle the aforementioned issues by providing a shared semantic space for multiple languages. Besides, the image modality has no language boundaries, which is superior to bridging the semantic gap between languages. To this end, we first propose the Multilingual MMT task by establishing two new Multilingual MMT benchmark datasets covering seven languages. Then, an effective baseline LVP-M3 using visual prompts is proposed to support translations between different languages, which includes three stages (token encoding, language-aware visual prompt generation, and language translation). Extensive experimental results on our constructed benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of LVP-M3 method for Multilingual MMT.
summary: Multimodal Machine Translation (MMT) focuses on enhancing text-only translation with visual features, which has attracted considerable attention from both natural language processing and computer vision communities. Recent advances still struggle to train a separate model for each language pair, which is costly and unaffordable when the number of languages increases in the real world. In other words, the multilingual multimodal machine translation (Multilingual MMT) task has not been investigated, which aims to handle the aforementioned issues by providing a shared semantic space for multiple languages. Besides, the image modality has no language boundaries, which is superior to bridging the semantic gap between languages. To this end, we first propose the Multilingual MMT task by establishing two new Multilingual MMT benchmark datasets covering seven languages. Then, an effective baseline LVP-M3 using visual prompts is proposed to support translations between different languages, which includes three stages (token encoding, language-aware visual prompt generation, and language translation). Extensive experimental results on our constructed benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of LVP-M3 method for Multilingual MMT.
abstract_zh: 多模态机器翻译（MMT）专注于增强具有视觉特征的纯文本翻译，这引起了自然语言处理和计算机视觉社区的广泛关注。最近的进展仍然难以为每种语言对训练单独的模型，当现实世界中语言数量增加时，这种方法成本高昂且难以承受。换句话说，多语言多模态机器翻译（Multilingual MMT）任务尚未被研究，其旨在通过为多种语言提供共享语义空间来处理上述问题。此外，图像情态没有语言界限，这优于弥合语言之间的语义鸿沟。为此，我们首先通过建立两个涵盖七种语言的新多语言 MMT 基准数据集来提出多语言 MMT 任务。然后，提出了一种使用视觉提示的有效基线LVP-M3来支持不同语言之间的翻译，其中包括三个阶段（令牌编码、语言感知视觉提示生成和语言翻译）。我们构建的基准数据集上的大量实验结果证明了 LVP-M3 方法对于多语言 MMT 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多语言多模态机器翻译任务及LVP-M3方法，通过构建七种语言的基准数据集，利用视觉提示实现跨语言翻译。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需为每个语言对单独训练模型，成本高昂且难以扩展；视觉模态可跨越语言边界，但多语言MMT任务尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 构建两个涵盖七种语言的多语言MMT基准数据集，提出LVP-M3基线方法，包含标记编码、语言感知视觉提示生成和语言翻译三个阶段。
AI.result: 在构建的基准数据集上验证了LVP-M3方法的有效性，证明其在多语言MMT任务中的性能。
AI.conclusion: LVP-M3为多语言MMT提供了有效解决方案，展示了视觉提示在跨语言语义对齐中的潜力。

search_text: LVP-M3: Language-aware Visual Prompt for Multilingual Multimodal Machine Translation LVP-M3：多语言多模式机器翻译的语言感知视觉提示 Multimodal Machine Translation (MMT) focuses on enhancing text-only translation with visual features, which has attracted considerable attention from both natural language processing and computer vision communities. Recent advances still struggle to train a separate model for each language pair, which is costly and unaffordable when the number of languages increases in the real world. In other words, the multilingual multimodal machine translation (Multilingual MMT) task has not been investigated, which aims to handle the aforementioned issues by providing a shared semantic space for multiple languages. Besides, the image modality has no language boundaries, which is superior to bridging the semantic gap between languages. To this end, we first propose the Multilingual MMT task by establishing two new Multilingual MMT benchmark datasets covering seven languages. Then, an effective baseline LVP-M3 using visual prompts is proposed to support translations between different languages, which includes three stages (token encoding, language-aware visual prompt generation, and language translation). Extensive experimental results on our constructed benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of LVP-M3 method for Multilingual MMT. 多模态机器翻译（MMT）专注于增强具有视觉特征的纯文本翻译，这引起了自然语言处理和计算机视觉社区的广泛关注。最近的进展仍然难以为每种语言对训练单独的模型，当现实世界中语言数量增加时，这种方法成本高昂且难以承受。换句话说，多语言多模态机器翻译（Multilingual MMT）任务尚未被研究，其旨在通过为多种语言提供共享语义空间来处理上述问题。此外，图像情态没有语言界限，这优于弥合语言之间的语义鸿沟。为此，我们首先通过建立两个涵盖七种语言的新多语言 MMT 基准数据集来提出多语言 MMT 任务。然后，提出了一种使用视觉提示的有效基线LVP-M3来支持不同语言之间的翻译，其中包括三个阶段（令牌编码、语言感知视觉提示生成和语言翻译）。我们构建的基准数据集上的大量实验结果证明了 LVP-M3 方法对于多语言 MMT 的有效性。 本文提出多语言多模态机器翻译任务及LVP-M3方法，通过构建七种语言的基准数据集，利用视觉提示实现跨语言翻译。 Hongcheng Guo,Jiaheng Liu,Haoyang Huang,Jian Yang,Zhoujun Li,Dongdong Zhang,Zheng Cui,Furu Wei cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Hyunsik Jeon,Jun-Gi Jang,Taehun Kim,U Kang
title: Accurate Bundle Matching and Generation via Multitask Learning with Partially Shared Parameters
title_zh: 通过具有部分共享参数的多任务学习进行准确的捆绑匹配和生成
abstract: How can we recommend existing bundles to users accurately? How can we generate new tailored bundles for users? Recommending a bundle, or a group of various items, has attracted widespread attention in e-commerce owing to the increased satisfaction of both users and providers. Bundle matching and bundle generation are two representative tasks in bundle recommendation. The bundle matching task is to correctly match existing bundles to users while the bundle generation is to generate new bundles that users would prefer. Although many recent works have developed bundle recommendation models, they fail to achieve high accuracy since they do not handle heterogeneous data effectively and do not learn a method for customized bundle generation. In this paper, we propose BundleMage, an accurate approach for bundle matching and generation. BundleMage effectively mixes user preferences of items and bundles using an adaptive gate technique to achieve high accuracy for the bundle matching. BundleMage also generates a personalized bundle by learning a generation module that exploits a user preference and the characteristic of a given incomplete bundle to be completed. BundleMage further improves its performance using multi-task learning with partially shared parameters. Through extensive experiments, we show that BundleMage achieves up to 6.6% higher nDCG in bundle matching and 6.3x higher nDCG in bundle generation than the best competitors. We also provide qualitative analysis that BundleMage effectively generates bundles considering both the tastes of users and the characteristics of target bundles.

Recommending a bundle, or a group of various items, has attracted widespread attention in e-commerce owing to the increased satisfaction of both users and providers. Bundle matching and bundle generation are two representative tasks in bundle recommendation. The bundle matching task is to correctly match existing bundles to users while the bundle generation is to generate new bundles that users would prefer. Although many recent works have developed bundle recommendation models, they fail to achieve high accuracy since they do not handle heterogeneous data effectively and do not learn a method for customized bundle generation. In this paper, we propose BundleMage, an accurate approach for bundle matching and generation. BundleMage effectively mixes user preferences of items and bundles using an adaptive gate technique to achieve high accuracy for the bundle matching. BundleMage also generates a personalized bundle by learning a generation module that exploits a user preference and the characteristic of a given incomplete bundle to be completed. BundleMage further improves its performance using multi-task learning with partially shared parameters. Through extensive experiments, we show that BundleMage achieves up to 6.6% higher nDCG in bundle matching and 6.3x higher nDCG in bundle generation than the best competitors. We also provide qualitative analysis that BundleMage effectively generates bundles considering both the tastes of users and the characteristics of target bundles.
abstract_zh: 如何准确向用户推荐现有捆绑包？我们如何为用户生成新的定制捆绑包？由于用户和提供商满意度的提高，推荐捆绑包或一组不同的商品已在电子商务中引起了广泛的关注。捆绑匹配和捆绑生成是捆绑推荐中的两个代表性任务。捆绑包匹配任务是将现有捆绑包与用户正确匹配，而捆绑包生成则是生成用户喜欢的新捆绑包。尽管最近的许多工作已经开发了捆绑推荐模型，但由于它们不能有效地处理异构数据并且没有学习定制捆绑生成的方法，因此无法实现高精度。在本文中，我们提出了 BundleMage，一种用于捆绑匹配和生成的准确方法。 BundleMage 使用自适应门技术有效地混合用户对项目和捆绑包的偏好，以实现捆绑包匹配的高精度。 BundleMage 还通过学习生成模块来生成个性化捆绑包，该生成模块利用用户偏好和要完成的给定不完整捆绑包的特征。 BundleMage 使用部分共享参数的多任务学习进一步提高了其性能。通过大量实验，我们表明，与最佳竞争对手相比，BundleMage 在捆绑匹配方面的 nDCG 高出 6.6%，在捆绑生成方面的 nDCG 高出 6.3 倍。我们还提供了定性分析，表明 BundleMage 可以有效地生成捆绑包，同时考虑用户的品味和目标捆绑包的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BundleMage方法，通过多任务学习与部分共享参数，实现高精度的套餐匹配与生成。
AI.motivation: 现有套餐推荐模型未能有效处理异构数据且缺乏定制化生成方法，导致推荐准确性不足。
AI.method: 采用自适应门控技术融合用户物品与套餐偏好，设计生成模块补全不完整套餐，并通过多任务学习共享参数提升性能。
AI.result: 在套餐匹配任务中nDCG提升6.6%，生成任务中nDCG达竞品6.3倍，定性分析验证生成效果兼顾用户偏好与套餐特性。
AI.conclusion: BundleMage通过多任务学习与自适应机制有效解决了套餐推荐的准确性与个性化问题，为领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Huiran Li,Yanwu Yang
title: Keyword Targeting Optimization in Sponsored Search Advertising: Combining Selection and Matching
title_zh: 赞助搜索广告中的关键词定位优化：选择与匹配相结合
abstract: In sponsored search advertising (SSA), advertisers need to select keywords and determine matching types for selected keywords simultaneously, i.e., keyword targeting. An optimal keyword targeting strategy guarantees reaching the right population effectively. This paper aims to address the keyword targeting problem, which is a challenging task because of the incomplete information of historical advertising performance indices and the high uncertainty in SSA environments. First, we construct a data distribution estimation model and apply a Markov Chain Monte Carlo method to make inference about unobserved indices (i.e., impression and click-through rate) over three keyword matching types (i.e., broad, phrase and exact). Second, we formulate a stochastic keyword targeting model (BB-KSM) combining operations of keyword selection and keyword matching to maximize the expected profit under the chance constraint of the budget, and develop a branch-and-bound algorithm incorporating a stochastic simulation process for our keyword targeting model. Finally, based on a realworld dataset collected from field reports and logs of past SSA campaigns, computational experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our keyword targeting strategy. Experimental results show that, (a) BB-KSM outperforms seven baselines in terms of profit; (b) BB-KSM shows its superiority as the budget increases, especially in situations with more keywords and keyword combinations; (c) the proposed data distribution estimation approach can effectively address the problem of incomplete performance indices over the three matching types and in turn significantly promotes the performance of keyword targeting decisions. This research makes important contributions to the SSA literature and the results offer critical insights into keyword management for SSA advertisers.
summary: In sponsored search advertising (SSA), advertisers need to select keywords and determine matching types for selected keywords simultaneously, i.e., keyword targeting. An optimal keyword targeting strategy guarantees reaching the right population effectively. This paper aims to address the keyword targeting problem, which is a challenging task because of the incomplete information of historical advertising performance indices and the high uncertainty in SSA environments. First, we construct a data distribution estimation model and apply a Markov Chain Monte Carlo method to make inference about unobserved indices (i.e., impression and click-through rate) over three keyword matching types (i.e., broad, phrase and exact). Second, we formulate a stochastic keyword targeting model (BB-KSM) combining operations of keyword selection and keyword matching to maximize the expected profit under the chance constraint of the budget, and develop a branch-and-bound algorithm incorporating a stochastic simulation process for our keyword targeting model. Finally, based on a realworld dataset collected from field reports and logs of past SSA campaigns, computational experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our keyword targeting strategy. Experimental results show that, (a) BB-KSM outperforms seven baselines in terms of profit; (b) BB-KSM shows its superiority as the budget increases, especially in situations with more keywords and keyword combinations; (c) the proposed data distribution estimation approach can effectively address the problem of incomplete performance indices over the three matching types and in turn significantly promotes the performance of keyword targeting decisions. This research makes important contributions to the SSA literature and the results offer critical insights into keyword management for SSA advertisers.
abstract_zh: 在赞助搜索广告（SSA）中，广告主需要选择关键词并同时确定所选关键词的匹配类型，即关键词定位。最佳的关键词定位策略可以保证有效地到达正确的人群。本文旨在解决关键词定位问题，由于历史广告效果指数的信息不完整以及SSA环境的高度不确定性，关键词定位问题是一项具有挑战性的任务。首先，我们构建了一个数据分布估计模型，并应用马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗方法来推断三种关键词匹配类型（即广泛、短语和精确）的未观察指标（即印象和点击率）。其次，我们制定了一个随机关键词定位模型（BB-KSM），结合了关键词选择和关键词匹配的操作，以在预算的机会约束下最大化预期利润，并为我们的关键词定位模型开发了一种结合随机模拟过程的分支定界算法。最后，根据从现场报告和过去 SSA 活动日志收集的真实数据集，进行计算实验来评估我们的关键字定位策略的性能。实验结果表明，(a) BB-KSM 在利润方面优于七个基线； (b)随着预算的增加，BB-KSM显示出其优越性，特别是在关键词和关键词组合较多的情况下； (c)所提出的数据分布估计方法可以有效解决三种匹配类型的性能指标不完整的问题，从而显着提高关键词定位决策的性能。这项研究对 SSA 文献做出了重要贡献，其结果为 SSA 广告商的关键字管理提供了重要的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合关键词选择与匹配类型优化，解决赞助搜索广告中因历史数据不完整和环境不确定性导致的关键词定位难题，以最大化预期收益。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效应对赞助搜索广告中历史表现指标不完整及高不确定性问题，导致关键词定位策略不够精准，影响广告收益。
AI.method: 构建数据分布估计模型并应用马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛方法推断未观测指标；提出结合选择与匹配的随机关键词定位模型（BB-KSM），并开发包含随机模拟的分支定界算法。
AI.result: BB-KSM在利润上优于七种基线方法，预算增加时表现更优；数据分布估计方法有效解决三类匹配类型的不完整指标问题，显著提升关键词定位效果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为赞助搜索广告领域提供了重要理论支持，提出的策略和方法为广告商优化关键词管理提供了关键见解。

search_text: Keyword Targeting Optimization in Sponsored Search Advertising: Combining Selection and Matching 赞助搜索广告中的关键词定位优化：选择与匹配相结合 In sponsored search advertising (SSA), advertisers need to select keywords and determine matching types for selected keywords simultaneously, i.e., keyword targeting. An optimal keyword targeting strategy guarantees reaching the right population effectively. This paper aims to address the keyword targeting problem, which is a challenging task because of the incomplete information of historical advertising performance indices and the high uncertainty in SSA environments. First, we construct a data distribution estimation model and apply a Markov Chain Monte Carlo method to make inference about unobserved indices (i.e., impression and click-through rate) over three keyword matching types (i.e., broad, phrase and exact). Second, we formulate a stochastic keyword targeting model (BB-KSM) combining operations of keyword selection and keyword matching to maximize the expected profit under the chance constraint of the budget, and develop a branch-and-bound algorithm incorporating a stochastic simulation process for our keyword targeting model. Finally, based on a realworld dataset collected from field reports and logs of past SSA campaigns, computational experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our keyword targeting strategy. Experimental results show that, (a) BB-KSM outperforms seven baselines in terms of profit; (b) BB-KSM shows its superiority as the budget increases, especially in situations with more keywords and keyword combinations; (c) the proposed data distribution estimation approach can effectively address the problem of incomplete performance indices over the three matching types and in turn significantly promotes the performance of keyword targeting decisions. This research makes important contributions to the SSA literature and the results offer critical insights into keyword management for SSA advertisers. 在赞助搜索广告（SSA）中，广告主需要选择关键词并同时确定所选关键词的匹配类型，即关键词定位。最佳的关键词定位策略可以保证有效地到达正确的人群。本文旨在解决关键词定位问题，由于历史广告效果指数的信息不完整以及SSA环境的高度不确定性，关键词定位问题是一项具有挑战性的任务。首先，我们构建了一个数据分布估计模型，并应用马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗方法来推断三种关键词匹配类型（即广泛、短语和精确）的未观察指标（即印象和点击率）。其次，我们制定了一个随机关键词定位模型（BB-KSM），结合了关键词选择和关键词匹配的操作，以在预算的机会约束下最大化预期利润，并为我们的关键词定位模型开发了一种结合随机模拟过程的分支定界算法。最后，根据从现场报告和过去 SSA 活动日志收集的真实数据集，进行计算实验来评估我们的关键字定位策略的性能。实验结果表明，(a) BB-KSM 在利润方面优于七个基线； (b)随着预算的增加，BB-KSM显示出其优越性，特别是在关键词和关键词组合较多的情况下； (c)所提出的数据分布估计方法可以有效解决三种匹配类型的性能指标不完整的问题，从而显着提高关键词定位决策的性能。这项研究对 SSA 文献做出了重要贡献，其结果为 SSA 广告商的关键字管理提供了重要的见解。 本文旨在通过结合关键词选择与匹配类型优化，解决赞助搜索广告中因历史数据不完整和环境不确定性导致的关键词定位难题，以最大化预期收益。 Huiran Li,Yanwu Yang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Hengwei Zhao,Yanfei Zhong,Xinyu Wang,Hong Shu
title: One-Class Risk Estimation for One-Class Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 一类高光谱图像分类的一类风险估计
abstract: Hyperspectral imagery (HSI) one-class classification is aimed at identifying a single target class from the HSI by using only knowing positive data, which can significantly reduce the requirements for annotation. However, when one-class classification meets HSI, it is difficult for classifiers to find a balance between the overfitting and underfitting of positive data due to the problems of distribution overlap and distribution imbalance. Although deep learning-based methods are currently the mainstream to overcome distribution overlap in HSI multiclassification, few studies focus on deep learning-based HSI one-class classification. In this article, a weakly supervised deep HSI one-class classifier, namely, HOneCls, is proposed, where a risk estimator,the one-class risk estimator, is particularly introduced to make the fully convolutional neural network (FCN) with the ability of one class classification in the case of distribution imbalance. Extensive experiments (20 tasks in total) were conducted to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed classifier.
summary: Hyperspectral imagery (HSI) one-class classification is aimed at identifying a single target class from the HSI by using only knowing positive data, which can significantly reduce the requirements for annotation. However, when one-class classification meets HSI, it is difficult for classifiers to find a balance between the overfitting and underfitting of positive data due to the problems of distribution overlap and distribution imbalance. Although deep learning-based methods are currently the mainstream to overcome distribution overlap in HSI multiclassification, few studies focus on deep learning-based HSI one-class classification. In this article, a weakly supervised deep HSI one-class classifier, namely, HOneCls, is proposed, where a risk estimator,the one-class risk estimator, is particularly introduced to make the fully convolutional neural network (FCN) with the ability of one class classification in the case of distribution imbalance. Extensive experiments (20 tasks in total) were conducted to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed classifier.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像（HSI）一类分类旨在仅使用已知的阳性数据从 HSI 中识别单个目标类别，这可以显着降低注释的要求。然而，当一类分类遇到HSI时，由于分布重叠和分布不平衡的问题，分类器很难在正数据的过拟合和欠拟合之间找到平衡。虽然基于深度学习的方法是目前克服 HSI 多分类中分布重叠的主流方法，但很少有研究关注基于深度学习的 HSI 一类分类。本文提出了一种弱监督的深度HSI一类分类器HOneCls，其中特别引入了风险估计器一类风险估计器，使全卷积神经网络（FCN）在分布不平衡的情况下具有一类分类的能力。进行了大量的实验（总共 20 个任务）来证明所提出的分类器的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督深度学习方法HOneCls，用于解决高光谱图像单类分类中的分布重叠与不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统单类分类方法在高光谱图像中易出现过拟合/欠拟合问题，且现有深度学习方法多针对多分类任务，单类分类研究不足。
AI.method: 设计包含单类风险估计器的全卷积网络（HOneCls），通过风险估计机制增强模型在分布不平衡场景下的单类分类能力。
AI.result: 在20个分类任务中验证了HOneCls相比现有方法的优越性，证明其能有效平衡正样本分布并提升分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高光谱图像单类分类提供了新思路，通过风险估计机制解决了分布不平衡的核心挑战。

authors_text: Mo Yu,Yi Gu,Xiaoxiao Guo,Yufei Feng,Xiaodan Zhu,Michael Greenspan,Murray Campbell,Chuang Gan
title: JECC: Commonsense Reasoning Tasks Derived from Interactive Fictions
title_zh: JECC：源自互动小说的常识推理任务
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.09788
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.09788
abstract: Commonsense reasoning simulates the human ability to make presumptions about our physical world, and it is an essential cornerstone in building general AI systems. We propose a new commonsense reasoning dataset based on human's Interactive Fiction (IF) gameplay walkthroughs as human players demonstrate plentiful and diverse commonsense reasoning. The new dataset provides a natural mixture of various reasoning types and requires multi-hop reasoning. Moreover, the IF game-based construction procedure requires much less human interventions than previous ones. Different from existing benchmarks, our dataset focuses on the assessment of functional commonsense knowledge rules rather than factual knowledge. Hence, in order to achieve higher performance on our tasks, models need to effectively utilize such functional knowledge to infer the outcomes of actions, rather than relying solely on memorizing facts. Experiments show that the introduced dataset is challenging to previous machine reading models as well as the new large language models with a significant 20% performance gap compared to human experts.
summary: Commonsense reasoning simulates the human ability to make presumptions about our physical world, and it is an essential cornerstone in building general AI systems. We propose a new commonsense reasoning dataset based on human's Interactive Fiction (IF) gameplay walkthroughs as human players demonstrate plentiful and diverse commonsense reasoning. The new dataset provides a natural mixture of various reasoning types and requires multi-hop reasoning. Moreover, the IF game-based construction procedure requires much less human interventions than previous ones. Different from existing benchmarks, our dataset focuses on the assessment of functional commonsense knowledge rules rather than factual knowledge. Hence, in order to achieve higher performance on our tasks, models need to effectively utilize such functional knowledge to infer the outcomes of actions, rather than relying solely on memorizing facts. Experiments show that the introduced dataset is challenging to previous machine reading models as well as the new large language models with a significant 20% performance gap compared to human experts.
abstract_zh: 常识推理模拟了人类对物理世界做出假设的能力，它是构建通用人工智能系统的重要基石。我们提出了一个基于人类互动小说（IF）游戏演练的新常识推理数据集，因为人类玩家展示了丰富多样的常识推理。新数据集提供了各种推理类型的自然混合，并且需要多跳推理。此外，基于 IF 游戏的构建过程比以前需要更少的人工干预。与现有基准不同，我们的数据集侧重于功能常识知识规则的评估，而不是事实知识。因此，为了在任务中获得更高的性能，模型需要有效地利用这些功能知识来推断行动的结果，而不是仅仅依赖于记忆事实。实验表明，引入的数据集对以前的机器阅读模型以及新的大型语言模型具有挑战性，与人类专家相比，性能差距显着，达到 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于互动小说游戏玩法的常识推理数据集JECC，用于评估模型对功能性常识知识的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有常识推理基准过度依赖事实性知识，缺乏对功能性常识规则的评估，且构建过程需大量人工干预。
AI.method: 通过分析人类玩家在互动小说中的游戏过程，自动提取包含多跳推理的常识推理任务，减少人工标注依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明，主流机器阅读模型和大语言模型在JECC数据集上较人类专家存在约20%的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: JECC数据集有效检验了模型对功能性常识的推理能力，凸显了单纯记忆事实无法替代规则推理的重要性。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，主流机器阅读模型和大语言模型在JECC数据集上较人类专家存在约20%的性能差距。
ai_content.conclusion: JECC数据集有效检验了模型对功能性常识的推理能力，凸显了单纯记忆事实无法替代规则推理的重要性。

search_text: JECC: Commonsense Reasoning Tasks Derived from Interactive Fictions JECC：源自互动小说的常识推理任务 Commonsense reasoning simulates the human ability to make presumptions about our physical world, and it is an essential cornerstone in building general AI systems. We propose a new commonsense reasoning dataset based on human's Interactive Fiction (IF) gameplay walkthroughs as human players demonstrate plentiful and diverse commonsense reasoning. The new dataset provides a natural mixture of various reasoning types and requires multi-hop reasoning. Moreover, the IF game-based construction procedure requires much less human interventions than previous ones. Different from existing benchmarks, our dataset focuses on the assessment of functional commonsense knowledge rules rather than factual knowledge. Hence, in order to achieve higher performance on our tasks, models need to effectively utilize such functional knowledge to infer the outcomes of actions, rather than relying solely on memorizing facts. Experiments show that the introduced dataset is challenging to previous machine reading models as well as the new large language models with a significant 20% performance gap compared to human experts. 常识推理模拟了人类对物理世界做出假设的能力，它是构建通用人工智能系统的重要基石。我们提出了一个基于人类互动小说（IF）游戏演练的新常识推理数据集，因为人类玩家展示了丰富多样的常识推理。新数据集提供了各种推理类型的自然混合，并且需要多跳推理。此外，基于 IF 游戏的构建过程比以前需要更少的人工干预。与现有基准不同，我们的数据集侧重于功能常识知识规则的评估，而不是事实知识。因此，为了在任务中获得更高的性能，模型需要有效地利用这些功能知识来推断行动的结果，而不是仅仅依赖于记忆事实。实验表明，引入的数据集对以前的机器阅读模型以及新的大型语言模型具有挑战性，与人类专家相比，性能差距显着，达到 20%。 本文提出基于互动小说游戏玩法的常识推理数据集JECC，用于评估模型对功能性常识知识的推理能力。 Mo Yu,Yi Gu,Xiaoxiao Guo,Yufei Feng,Xiaodan Zhu,Michael Greenspan,Murray Campbell,Chuang Gan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Dennis Ulmer,Jes Frellsen,Christian Hardmeier
title: Exploring Predictive Uncertainty and Calibration in NLP: A Study on the Impact of Method & Data Scarcity
title_zh: 探索 NLP 中的预测不确定性和校准：方法和数据稀缺影响的研究
abstract: We investigate the problem of determining the predictive confidence (or, conversely, uncertainty) of a neural classifier through the lens of low-resource languages. By training models on sub-sampled datasets in three different languages, we assess the quality of estimates from a wide array of approaches and their dependence on the amount of available data. We find that while approaches based on pre-trained models and ensembles achieve the best results overall, the quality of uncertainty estimates can surprisingly suffer with more data. We also perform a qualitative analysis of uncertainties on sequences, discovering that a model's total uncertainty seems to be influenced to a large degree by its data uncertainty, not model uncertainty. All model implementations are open-sourced in a software package.
summary: We investigate the problem of determining the predictive confidence (or, conversely, uncertainty) of a neural classifier through the lens of low-resource languages. By training models on sub-sampled datasets in three different languages, we assess the quality of estimates from a wide array of approaches and their dependence on the amount of available data. We find that while approaches based on pre-trained models and ensembles achieve the best results overall, the quality of uncertainty estimates can surprisingly suffer with more data. We also perform a qualitative analysis of uncertainties on sequences, discovering that a model's total uncertainty seems to be influenced to a large degree by its data uncertainty, not model uncertainty. All model implementations are open-sourced in a software package.
abstract_zh: 我们通过低资源语言的视角研究确定神经分类器的预测置信度（或者相反，不确定性）的问题。通过使用三种不同语言在子采样数据集上训练模型，我们评估了各种方法的估计质量及其对可用数据量的依赖性。我们发现，虽然基于预训练模型和集成的方法总体上取得了最佳结果，但随着数据的增多，不确定性估计的质量可能会出人意料地受到影响。我们还对序列的不确定性进行了定性分析，发现模型的总不确定性似乎在很大程度上受到其数据不确定性的影响，而不是模型不确定性。所有模型的实现都是在软件包中开源的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在低资源语言环境下神经网络分类器的预测不确定性评估，分析了不同方法和数据稀缺性对不确定性估计的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法在低资源语言中表现不稳定，需探究不同方法及数据稀缺性对估计质量的影响，并明确不确定性来源。
AI.method: 通过在三种语言的子采样数据集上训练模型，比较多种不确定性估计方法（如预训练模型、集成方法）的效果，并进行序列不确定性定性分析。
AI.result: 预训练模型和集成方法表现最佳，但数据量增加时估计质量下降；模型总不确定性主要受数据不确定性影响，而非模型本身。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更稳健的不确定性估计方法，以适应数据量变化，并强调数据不确定性在低资源场景中的关键作用。

authors_text: Ding Li,Qichao Zhang,Shuai Lu,Yifeng Pan,Dongbin Zhao
title: Conditional Goal-oriented Trajectory Prediction for Interacting Vehicles with Vectorized Representation
title_zh: 具有矢量化表示的交互车辆的条件目标导向轨迹预测
abstract: This paper aims to tackle the interactive behavior prediction task, and proposes a novel Conditional Goal-oriented Trajectory Prediction (CGTP) framework to jointly generate scene-compliant trajectories of two interacting agents. Our CGTP framework is an end to end and interpretable model, including three main stages: context encoding, goal interactive prediction and trajectory interactive prediction. First, a Goals-of-Interest Network (GoINet) is designed to extract the interactive features between agent-to-agent and agent-to-goals using a graph-based vectorized representation. Further, the Conditional Goal Prediction Network (CGPNet) focuses on goal interactive prediction via a combined form of marginal and conditional goal predictors. Finally, the Goaloriented Trajectory Forecasting Network (GTFNet) is proposed to implement trajectory interactive prediction via the conditional goal-oriented predictors, with the predicted future states of the other interacting agent taken as inputs. In addition, a new goal interactive loss is developed to better learn the joint probability distribution over goal candidates between two interacting agents. In the end, the proposed method is conducted on Argoverse motion forecasting dataset, In-house cut-in dataset, and Waymo open motion dataset. The comparative results demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed CGTP model than the mainstream prediction methods.
summary: This paper aims to tackle the interactive behavior prediction task, and proposes a novel Conditional Goal-oriented Trajectory Prediction (CGTP) framework to jointly generate scene-compliant trajectories of two interacting agents. Our CGTP framework is an end to end and interpretable model, including three main stages: context encoding, goal interactive prediction and trajectory interactive prediction. First, a Goals-of-Interest Network (GoINet) is designed to extract the interactive features between agent-to-agent and agent-to-goals using a graph-based vectorized representation. Further, the Conditional Goal Prediction Network (CGPNet) focuses on goal interactive prediction via a combined form of marginal and conditional goal predictors. Finally, the Goaloriented Trajectory Forecasting Network (GTFNet) is proposed to implement trajectory interactive prediction via the conditional goal-oriented predictors, with the predicted future states of the other interacting agent taken as inputs. In addition, a new goal interactive loss is developed to better learn the joint probability distribution over goal candidates between two interacting agents. In the end, the proposed method is conducted on Argoverse motion forecasting dataset, In-house cut-in dataset, and Waymo open motion dataset. The comparative results demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed CGTP model than the mainstream prediction methods.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在解决交互行为预测任务，提出了一种新颖的条件目标导向轨迹预测（CGTP）框架，以共同生成两个交互代理的场景兼容轨迹。我们的CGTP框架是一个端到端且可解释的模型，包括三个主要阶段：上下文编码、目标交互预测和轨迹交互预测。首先，目标兴趣网络（GoINet）旨在使用基于图的矢量化表示来提取智能体到智能体和智能体到目标之间的交互特征。此外，条件目标预测网络（CGPNet）专注于通过边际目标预测器和条件目标预测器的组合形式进行目标交互预测。最后，提出了目标导向轨迹预测网络（GTFNet），通过条件目标导向预测器实现轨迹交互预测，并将其他交互智能体的预测未来状态作为输入。此外，还开发了一种新的目标交互损失，以更好地学习两个交互代理之间目标候选的联合概率分布。最后，该方法在Argoverse运动预测数据集、In-house cut-in数据集和Waymo开放运动数据集上进行。比较结果表明我们提出的 CGTP 模型比主流预测方法具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种条件目标导向的轨迹预测框架（CGTP），用于解决交互车辆的轨迹预测问题，通过联合生成符合场景的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确建模交互车辆间的复杂行为关系，且缺乏对目标联合概率分布的有效学习，需设计可解释的端到端模型以提升预测性能。
AI.method: 框架包含三个阶段：基于图结构向量化的上下文编码（GoINet）、目标交互预测（CGPNet）和轨迹交互预测（GTFNet），并引入新的目标交互损失函数优化联合概率分布学习。
AI.result: 在Argoverse、In-house cut-in和Waymo数据集上实验表明，CGTP模型在预测精度上优于主流方法。
AI.conclusion: CGTP通过显式建模交互目标与轨迹关系，有效提升了多智能体轨迹预测性能，验证了联合概率分布建模的有效性。

The comparative results demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed CGTP model than the mainstream prediction methods. 本文旨在解决交互行为预测任务，提出了一种新颖的条件目标导向轨迹预测（CGTP）框架，以共同生成两个交互代理的场景兼容轨迹。我们的CGTP框架是一个端到端且可解释的模型，包括三个主要阶段：上下文编码、目标交互预测和轨迹交互预测。首先，目标兴趣网络（GoINet）旨在使用基于图的矢量化表示来提取智能体到智能体和智能体到目标之间的交互特征。此外，条件目标预测网络（CGPNet）专注于通过边际目标预测器和条件目标预测器的组合形式进行目标交互预测。最后，提出了目标导向轨迹预测网络（GTFNet），通过条件目标导向预测器实现轨迹交互预测，并将其他交互智能体的预测未来状态作为输入。此外，还开发了一种新的目标交互损失，以更好地学习两个交互代理之间目标候选的联合概率分布。最后，该方法在Argoverse运动预测数据集、In-house cut-in数据集和Waymo开放运动数据集上进行。比较结果表明我们提出的 CGTP 模型比主流预测方法具有优越的性能。 本文提出一种条件目标导向的轨迹预测框架（CGTP），用于解决交互车辆的轨迹预测问题，通过联合生成符合场景的轨迹。 Ding Li,Qichao Zhang,Shuai Lu,Yifeng Pan,Dongbin Zhao cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Takaaki Saeki,Heiga Zen,Zhehuai Chen,Nobuyuki Morioka,Gary Wang,Yu Zhang,Ankur Bapna,Andrew Rosenberg,Bhuvana Ramabhadran
title: Virtuoso: Massive Multilingual Speech-Text Joint Semi-Supervised Learning for Text-To-Speech
title_zh: Virtuoso：用于文本转语音的大规模多语言语音文本联合半监督学习
abstract: This paper proposes Virtuoso, a massively multilingual speech-text joint semi-supervised learning framework for text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) models. Existing multilingual TTS typically supports tens of languages, which are a small fraction of the thousands of languages in the world. One difficulty to scale multilingual TTS to hundreds of languages is collecting high-quality speech-text paired data in low-resource languages. This study extends Maestro, a speech-text joint pretraining framework for automatic speech recognition (ASR), to speech generation tasks. To train a TTS model from various types of speech and text data, different training schemes are designed to handle supervised (paired TTS and ASR data) and unsupervised (untranscribed speech and unspoken text) datasets. Experimental evaluation shows that 1) multilingual TTS models trained on Virtuoso can achieve significantly better naturalness and intelligibility than baseline ones in seen languages, and 2) they can synthesize reasonably intelligible and naturally sounding speech for unseen languages where no high-quality paired TTS data is available.
summary: This paper proposes Virtuoso, a massively multilingual speech-text joint semi-supervised learning framework for text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) models. Existing multilingual TTS typically supports tens of languages, which are a small fraction of the thousands of languages in the world. One difficulty to scale multilingual TTS to hundreds of languages is collecting high-quality speech-text paired data in low-resource languages. This study extends Maestro, a speech-text joint pretraining framework for automatic speech recognition (ASR), to speech generation tasks. To train a TTS model from various types of speech and text data, different training schemes are designed to handle supervised (paired TTS and ASR data) and unsupervised (untranscribed speech and unspoken text) datasets. Experimental evaluation shows that 1) multilingual TTS models trained on Virtuoso can achieve significantly better naturalness and intelligibility than baseline ones in seen languages, and 2) they can synthesize reasonably intelligible and naturally sounding speech for unseen languages where no high-quality paired TTS data is available.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Virtuoso，一种用于文本到语音合成（TTS）模型的大规模多语言语音文本联合半监督学习框架。现有的多语言 TTS 通常支持数十种语言，这只是世界上数千种语言的一小部分。将多语言 TTS 扩展到数百种语言的一个困难是收集资源匮乏的语言的高质量语音文本配对数据。这项研究将 Maestro（一种用于自动语音识别（ASR）的语音-文本联合预训练框架）扩展到语音生成任务。为了从各种类型的语音和文本数据训练 TTS 模型，设计了不同的训练方案来处理有监督（配对的 TTS 和 ASR 数据）和无监督（未转录的语音和无声文本）数据集。实验评估表明：1）在 Virtuoso 上训练的多语言 TTS 模型可以比已见语言中的基线模型实现明显更好的自然度和可理解性，2）它们可以为没有高质量配对 TTS 数据的未见语言合成合理可理解且听起来自然的语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Virtuoso框架，通过半监督学习解决大规模多语言文本到语音合成中低资源语言数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言TTS系统仅支持少量语言，难以覆盖全球数千种语言，低资源语言缺乏高质量语音-文本配对数据是主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 扩展Maestro预训练框架，设计混合训练方案处理监督数据（配对TTS/ASR数据）与非监督数据（未转录语音/未发音文本）。
AI.result: 在已见语言上显著提升自然度和可理解性，且能为无高质量数据的未见语言生成合理可懂的语音。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习有效提升多语言TTS性能，尤其在低资源语言场景下具有显著优势。

authors_text: Peter Vieting,Christoph Lüscher,Julian Dierkes,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney
title: Efficient Utilization of Large Pre-Trained Models for Low Resource ASR
title_zh: 高效利用大型预训练模型实现低资源 ASR
abstract: Unsupervised representation learning has recently helped automatic speech recognition (ASR) to tackle tasks with limited labeled data. Following this, hardware limitations and applications give rise to the question how to take advantage of large pre-trained models efficiently and reduce their complexity. In this work, we study a challenging low resource conversational telephony speech corpus from the medical domain in Vietnamese and German. We show the benefits of using unsupervised techniques beyond simple fine-tuning of large pre-trained models, discuss how to adapt them to a practical telephony task including bandwidth transfer and investigate different data conditions for pre-training and fine-tuning. We outperform the project baselines by 22% relative using pretraining techniques. Further gains of 29% can be achieved by refinements of architecture and training and 6% by adding 0.8 h of in-domain adaptation data.
summary: Unsupervised representation learning has recently helped automatic speech recognition (ASR) to tackle tasks with limited labeled data. Following this, hardware limitations and applications give rise to the question how to take advantage of large pre-trained models efficiently and reduce their complexity. In this work, we study a challenging low resource conversational telephony speech corpus from the medical domain in Vietnamese and German. We show the benefits of using unsupervised techniques beyond simple fine-tuning of large pre-trained models, discuss how to adapt them to a practical telephony task including bandwidth transfer and investigate different data conditions for pre-training and fine-tuning. We outperform the project baselines by 22% relative using pretraining techniques. Further gains of 29% can be achieved by refinements of architecture and training and 6% by adding 0.8 h of in-domain adaptation data.
abstract_zh: 无监督表示学习最近帮助自动语音识别（ASR）解决标记数据有限的任务。在此之后，硬件限制和应用程序提出了如何有效利用大型预训练模型并降低其复杂性的问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了来自医学领域的越南语和德语的具有挑战性的低资源会话电话语音语料库。我们展示了使用无监督技术的好处，不仅仅是对大型预训练模型进行简单的微调，讨论如何使它们适应实际的电话任务，包括带宽传输，并研究预训练和微调的不同数据条件。使用预训练技术，我们的表现相对于项目基线高出 22%。通过改进架构和训练可以进一步提高 29%，通过添加 0.8 小时的域内适应数据可以进一步提高 6%。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何在低资源场景下高效利用大预训练模型提升自动语音识别（ASR）性能，特别是在医疗领域的电话对话任务中。
AI.motivation: 硬件限制和实际应用场景要求减少大模型复杂度，同时低资源数据下的语音识别效果亟待提升，尤其是在医疗等特定领域。
AI.method: 采用无监督表示学习技术，结合预训练与微调策略，优化模型架构及训练流程，并引入少量领域适应数据进行改进。
AI.result: 通过预训练技术相对提升22%，架构与训练优化再获29%提升，添加0.8小时领域数据额外提升6%。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型结合无监督技术、架构优化及少量领域数据可显著提升低资源ASR性能，为实际应用提供有效方案。

In this work, we study a challenging low resource conversational telephony speech corpus from the medical domain in Vietnamese and German. authors_text: Anna Silnova,Niko Brümmer,Albert Swart,Lukáš Burget
title: Toroidal Probabilistic Spherical Discriminant Analysis
title_zh: 环形概率球面判别分析
abstract: In speaker recognition, where speech segments are mapped to embeddings on the unit hypersphere, two scoring back-ends are commonly used, namely cosine scoring and PLDA. We have recently proposed PSDA, an analog to PLDA that uses Von Mises-Fisher distributions instead of Gaussians. In this paper, we present toroidal PSDA (T-PSDA). It extends PSDA with the ability to model within and between-speaker variabilities in toroidal submanifolds of the hypersphere. Like PLDA and PSDA, the model allows closed-form scoring and closed-form EM updates for training. On VoxCeleb, we find T-PSDA accuracy on par with cosine scoring, while PLDA accuracy is inferior. On NIST SRE'21 we find that T-PSDA gives large accuracy gains compared to both cosine scoring and PLDA.
summary: In speaker recognition, where speech segments are mapped to embeddings on the unit hypersphere, two scoring back-ends are commonly used, namely cosine scoring and PLDA. We have recently proposed PSDA, an analog to PLDA that uses Von Mises-Fisher distributions instead of Gaussians. In this paper, we present toroidal PSDA (T-PSDA). It extends PSDA with the ability to model within and between-speaker variabilities in toroidal submanifolds of the hypersphere. Like PLDA and PSDA, the model allows closed-form scoring and closed-form EM updates for training. On VoxCeleb, we find T-PSDA accuracy on par with cosine scoring, while PLDA accuracy is inferior. On NIST SRE'21 we find that T-PSDA gives large accuracy gains compared to both cosine scoring and PLDA.
abstract_zh: 在说话人识别中，语音片段被映射到单位超球面上的嵌入，通常使用两种评分后端，即余弦评分和 PLDA。我们最近提出了 PSDA，它是 PLDA 的模拟，它使用 Von Mises-Fisher 分布而不是高斯分布。在本文中，我们提出了环形 PSDA (T-PSDA)。它扩展了 PSDA，能够对超球面的环形子流形中的扬声器内部和扬声器之间的变化进行建模。与 PLDA 和 PSDA 一样，该模型允许对训练进行封闭式评分和封闭式 EM 更新。在 VoxCeleb 上，我们发现 T-PSDA 的准确度与余弦评分相当，而 PLDA 的准确度较差。在 NIST SRE'21 上，我们发现与余弦评分和 PLDA 相比，T-PSDA 提供了很大的准确度增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的说话人识别方法——环面概率球面判别分析（T-PSDA），用于改进基于嵌入向量的说话人识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如余弦相似度和PLDA在建模高维球面嵌入空间中的类内类间差异时存在局限性，需探索更有效的概率模型以提升识别准确率。
AI.method: 将PSDA扩展至环面子流形，采用冯·米塞斯-费舍尔分布建模类内/类间变化，并保留闭式得分计算与EM训练更新的优势。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb数据集上与余弦得分相当，在NIST SRE'21数据集上显著优于余弦得分和PLDA方法。
AI.conclusion: T-PSDA通过引入环面结构有效捕捉嵌入空间中的复杂变化模式，为说话人识别提供了更优的概率建模方案。

search_text: Toroidal Probabilistic Spherical Discriminant Analysis 环形概率球面判别分析 In speaker recognition, where speech segments are mapped to embeddings on the unit hypersphere, two scoring back-ends are commonly used, namely cosine scoring and PLDA. We have recently proposed PSDA, an analog to PLDA that uses Von Mises-Fisher distributions instead of Gaussians. In this paper, we present toroidal PSDA (T-PSDA). It extends PSDA with the ability to model within and between-speaker variabilities in toroidal submanifolds of the hypersphere. Like PLDA and PSDA, the model allows closed-form scoring and closed-form EM updates for training. On VoxCeleb, we find T-PSDA accuracy on par with cosine scoring, while PLDA accuracy is inferior. On NIST SRE'21 we find that T-PSDA gives large accuracy gains compared to both cosine scoring and PLDA. 在说话人识别中，语音片段被映射到单位超球面上的嵌入，通常使用两种评分后端，即余弦评分和 PLDA。我们最近提出了 PSDA，它是 PLDA 的模拟，它使用 Von Mises-Fisher 分布而不是高斯分布。在本文中，我们提出了环形 PSDA (T-PSDA)。它扩展了 PSDA，能够对超球面的环形子流形中的扬声器内部和扬声器之间的变化进行建模。与 PLDA 和 PSDA 一样，该模型允许对训练进行封闭式评分和封闭式 EM 更新。在 VoxCeleb 上，我们发现 T-PSDA 的准确度与余弦评分相当，而 PLDA 的准确度较差。在 NIST SRE'21 上，我们发现与余弦评分和 PLDA 相比，T-PSDA 提供了很大的准确度增益。 本文提出了一种新的说话人识别方法——环面概率球面判别分析（T-PSDA），用于改进基于嵌入向量的说话人识别性能。 Anna Silnova,Niko Brümmer,Albert Swart,Lukáš Burget cs.SD,eess.AS,stat.ML

authors_text: Alexander Edmonds,Aleksandar Nikolov,Toniann Pitassi
title: Learning versus Refutation in Noninteractive Local Differential Privacy
title_zh: 非交互式本地差分隐私中的学习与反驳
abstract: We study two basic statistical tasks in non-interactive local differential privacy (LDP): learning and refutation. Learning requires finding a concept that best fits an unknown target function (from labelled samples drawn from a distribution), whereas refutation requires distinguishing between data distributions that are well-correlated with some concept in the class, versus distributions where the labels are random. Our main result is a complete characterization of the sample complexity of agnostic PAC learning for non-interactive LDP protocols. We show that the optimal sample complexity for any concept class is captured by the approximate $γ_2$~norm of a natural matrix associated with the class. Combined with previous work [Edmonds, Nikolov and Ullman, 2019] this gives an equivalence between learning and refutation in the agnostic setting.
summary: We study two basic statistical tasks in non-interactive local differential privacy (LDP): learning and refutation. Learning requires finding a concept that best fits an unknown target function (from labelled samples drawn from a distribution), whereas refutation requires distinguishing between data distributions that are well-correlated with some concept in the class, versus distributions where the labels are random. Our main result is a complete characterization of the sample complexity of agnostic PAC learning for non-interactive LDP protocols. We show that the optimal sample complexity for any concept class is captured by the approximate $γ_2$~norm of a natural matrix associated with the class. Combined with previous work [Edmonds, Nikolov and Ullman, 2019] this gives an equivalence between learning and refutation in the agnostic setting.
abstract_zh: 我们研究非交互式本地差分隐私（LDP）中的两个基本统计任务：学习和反驳。学习需要找到最适合未知目标函数的概念（从分布中抽取的标记样本），而反驳则需要区分与类中某些概念良好相关的数据分布和标签随机的分布。我们的主要结果是对非交互式 LDP 协议的不可知 PAC 学习的样本复杂性的完整表征。我们表明，任何概念类的最佳样本复杂度都可以通过与该类相关的自然矩阵的近似 $γ_2$~norm 来捕获。结合之前的工作 [Edmonds、Nikolov 和 Ullman，2019]，这给出了不可知论环境中学习和反驳之间的等价性。

AI.tldr: 研究非交互式本地差分隐私下的学习与反驳任务，揭示其样本复杂度的理论边界。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私保护下，需明确统计学习任务的样本复杂度界限，尤其在非交互式本地隐私模型中学习与反驳的关联性尚不清晰。
AI.method: 通过分析概念类对应的矩阵近似γ₂范数，结合前人工作建立学习与反驳的等价性理论框架。
AI.result: 证明无监督PAC学习的最优样本复杂度由γ₂范数决定，并在非交互式LDP中实现学习与反驳任务的等价性转换。
AI.conclusion: 为非交互式本地差分隐私协议提供理论支撑，揭示统计学习与分布反驳的内在联系，指导隐私保护下的高效学习算法设计。

authors_text: Yuri Kanno,Muneki Yasuda
title: Multi-layered Discriminative Restricted Boltzmann Machine with Untrained Probabilistic Layer
title_zh: 具有未经训练的概率层的多层判别受限玻尔兹曼机
abstract: An extreme learning machine (ELM) is a three-layered feed-forward neural network having untrained parameters, which are randomly determined before training. Inspired by the idea of ELM, a probabilistic untrained layer called a probabilistic-ELM (PELM) layer is proposed, and it is combined with a discriminative restricted Boltzmann machine (DRBM), which is a probabilistic three-layered neural network for solving classification problems. The proposed model is obtained by stacking DRBM on the PELM layer. The resultant model (i.e., multi-layered DRBM (MDRBM)) forms a probabilistic four-layered neural network. In MDRBM, the parameters in the PELM layer can be determined using Gaussian-Bernoulli restricted Boltzmann machine. Owing to the PELM layer, MDRBM obtains a strong immunity against noise in inputs, which is one of the most important advantages of MDRBM. Numerical experiments using some benchmark datasets, MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, Urban Land Cover, and CIFAR-10, demonstrate that MDRBM is superior to other existing models, particularly, in terms of the noise-robustness property (or, in other words, the generalization property).
summary: An extreme learning machine (ELM) is a three-layered feed-forward neural network having untrained parameters, which are randomly determined before training. Inspired by the idea of ELM, a probabilistic untrained layer called a probabilistic-ELM (PELM) layer is proposed, and it is combined with a discriminative restricted Boltzmann machine (DRBM), which is a probabilistic three-layered neural network for solving classification problems. The proposed model is obtained by stacking DRBM on the PELM layer. The resultant model (i.e., multi-layered DRBM (MDRBM)) forms a probabilistic four-layered neural network. In MDRBM, the parameters in the PELM layer can be determined using Gaussian-Bernoulli restricted Boltzmann machine. Owing to the PELM layer, MDRBM obtains a strong immunity against noise in inputs, which is one of the most important advantages of MDRBM. Numerical experiments using some benchmark datasets, MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, Urban Land Cover, and CIFAR-10, demonstrate that MDRBM is superior to other existing models, particularly, in terms of the noise-robustness property (or, in other words, the generalization property).
abstract_zh: 极限学习机（ELM）是一种三层前馈神经网络，具有未经训练的参数，这些参数在训练前随机确定。受 ELM 思想的启发，提出了一种称为概率 ELM（PELM）层的概率未训练层，并将其与判别受限玻尔兹曼机（DRBM）相结合，DRBM 是一种用于解决分类问题的概率三层神经网络。所提出的模型是通过在 PELM 层上堆叠 DRBM 获得的。由此产生的模型（即多层 DRBM (MDRBM)）形成概率四层神经网络。在MDRBM中，PELM层中的参数可以使用高斯-伯努利受限玻尔兹曼机来确定。由于PELM层，MDRBM对输入中的噪声具有很强的免疫力，这是MDRBM最重要的优势之一。使用一些基准数据集（MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、Urban Land Cover 和 CIFAR-10）进行的数值实验表明，MDRBM 优于其他现有模型，特别是在噪声鲁棒性（或者换句话说，泛化性）方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合概率未训练层（PELM）与判别受限玻尔兹曼机（DRBM）的多层神经网络模型MDRBM，用于增强分类任务的噪声鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 受极限学习机（ELM）中未训练参数随机确定思想的启发，旨在解决传统DRBM在噪声输入下的性能不足，提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过堆叠PELM层（参数由高斯-伯努利RBM确定）与DRBM，构建四层概率神经网络MDRBM，利用PELM层的随机性增强噪声免疫能力。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST等数据集上的实验表明，MDRBM在噪声鲁棒性和分类准确率上优于现有模型，尤其在噪声环境下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: MDRBM通过引入PELM层有效提升了模型对输入噪声的鲁棒性，验证了其在分类任务中的优越性与泛化能力。

In MDRBM, the parameters in the PELM layer can be determined using Gaussian-Bernoulli restricted Boltzmann machine. Owing to the PELM layer, MDRBM obtains a strong immunity against noise in inputs, which is one of the most important advantages of MDRBM. Numerical experiments using some benchmark datasets, MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, Urban Land Cover, and CIFAR-10, demonstrate that MDRBM is superior to other existing models, particularly, in terms of the noise-robustness property (or, in other words, the generalization property). 极限学习机（ELM）是一种三层前馈神经网络，具有未经训练的参数，这些参数在训练前随机确定。受 ELM 思想的启发，提出了一种称为概率 ELM（PELM）层的概率未训练层，并将其与判别受限玻尔兹曼机（DRBM）相结合，DRBM 是一种用于解决分类问题的概率三层神经网络。所提出的模型是通过在 PELM 层上堆叠 DRBM 获得的。由此产生的模型（即多层 DRBM (MDRBM)）形成概率四层神经网络。在MDRBM中，PELM层中的参数可以使用高斯-伯努利受限玻尔兹曼机来确定。由于PELM层，MDRBM对输入中的噪声具有很强的免疫力，这是MDRBM最重要的优势之一。使用一些基准数据集（MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、Urban Land Cover 和 CIFAR-10）进行的数值实验表明，MDRBM 优于其他现有模型，特别是在噪声鲁棒性（或者换句话说，泛化性）方面。 本文提出一种结合概率未训练层（PELM）与判别受限玻尔兹曼机（DRBM）的多层神经网络模型MDRBM，用于增强分类任务的噪声鲁棒性。 Yuri Kanno,Muneki Yasuda cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Varun Mandalapu,Lujie Karen Chen,Sushruta Shetty,Zhiyuan Chen,Jiaqi Gong
title: Student-centric Model of Learning Management System Activity and Academic Performance: from Correlation to Causation
title_zh: 以学生为中心的学习管理系统活动和学业成绩模型：从相关性到因果关系
abstract: In recent years, there is a lot of interest in modeling students' digital traces in Learning Management System (LMS) to understand students' learning behavior patterns including aspects of meta-cognition and self-regulation, with the ultimate goal to turn those insights into actionable information to support students to improve their learning outcomes. In achieving this goal, however, there are two main issues that need to be addressed given the existing literature. Firstly, most of the current work is course-centered (i.e. models are built from data for a specific course) rather than student-centered; secondly, a vast majority of the models are correlational rather than causal. Those issues make it challenging to identify the most promising actionable factors for intervention at the student level where most of the campus-wide academic support is designed for. In this paper, we explored a student-centric analytical framework for LMS activity data that can provide not only correlational but causal insights mined from observational data. We demonstrated this approach using a dataset of 1651 computing major students at a public university in the US during one semester in the Fall of 2019. This dataset includes students' fine-grained LMS interaction logs and administrative data, e.g. demographics and academic performance. In addition, we expand the repository of LMS behavior indicators to include those that can characterize the time-of-the-day of login (e.g. chronotype). Our analysis showed that student login volume, compared with other login behavior indicators, is both strongly correlated and causally linked to student academic performance, especially among students with low academic performance. We envision that those insights will provide convincing evidence for college student support groups to launch student-centered and targeted interventions that are effective and scalable.

In achieving this goal, however, there are two main issues that need to be addressed given the existing literature. Firstly, most of the current work is course-centered (i.e. models are built from data for a specific course) rather than student-centered; secondly, a vast majority of the models are correlational rather than causal. Those issues make it challenging to identify the most promising actionable factors for intervention at the student level where most of the campus-wide academic support is designed for. In this paper, we explored a student-centric analytical framework for LMS activity data that can provide not only correlational but causal insights mined from observational data. We demonstrated this approach using a dataset of 1651 computing major students at a public university in the US during one semester in the Fall of 2019. This dataset includes students' fine-grained LMS interaction logs and administrative data, e.g. demographics and academic performance. In addition, we expand the repository of LMS behavior indicators to include those that can characterize the time-of-the-day of login (e.g. chronotype). Our analysis showed that student login volume, compared with other login behavior indicators, is both strongly correlated and causally linked to student academic performance, especially among students with low academic performance. We envision that those insights will provide convincing evidence for college student support groups to launch student-centered and targeted interventions that are effective and scalable.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对在学习管理系统（LMS）中对学生的数字痕迹进行建模以了解学生的学习行为模式（包括元认知和自我调节方面）产生了很大的兴趣，最终目标是将这些见解转化为可操作的信息，以支持学生提高学习成果。然而，在实现这一目标的过程中，鉴于现有文献，有两个主要问题需要解决。首先，目前的大部分工作都是以课程为中心（即根据特定课程的数据构建模型）而不是以学生为中心；其次，绝大多数模型是相关的而不是因果的。这些问题使得确定最有希望的可操作因素在学生层面进行干预变得具有挑战性，而学生层面是大多数校园学术支持的目的。在本文中，我们探索了一个以学生为中心的 LMS 活动数据分析框架，该框架不仅可以提供从观察数据中挖掘的相关性见解，还可以提供因果见解。我们使用美国一所公立大学 2019 年秋季一个学期的 1651 名计算机专业学生的数据集演示了这种方法。该数据集包括学生的细粒度 LMS 交互日志和管理数据，例如人口统计和学业成绩。此外，我们还扩展了 LMS 行为指标存储库，以包含那些可以表征登录时间的指标（例如时间类型）。我们的分析表明，与其他登录行为指标相比，学生登录量与学生的学业成绩密切相关且存在因果关系，尤其是在学业成绩较低的学生中。我们预计这些见解将为大学生支持团体提供令人信服的证据，以启动以学生为中心、有针对性的有效且可扩展的干预措施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以学生为中心的学习管理系统（LMS）活动分析框架，旨在从相关性研究转向因果性分析，以识别影响学术表现的关键因素并支持个性化干预。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于课程为中心的模型且侧重相关性分析，难以识别针对学生个体的可操作性干预因素，尤其对低绩效学生缺乏有效支持策略。
AI.method: 基于1651名计算机专业学生的LMS细粒度交互日志及行政数据（如人口统计学和学业成绩），扩展了LMS行为指标（如登录时间类型），构建学生为中心的分析框架，通过观察性数据挖掘相关性与因果性关系。
AI.result: 发现学生登录量（而非其他登录行为指标）与学业表现存在强相关性及因果关联，尤其对低绩效学生影响显著。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为高校学术支持团队提供了基于因果证据的学生中心化、可扩展干预策略，可有效提升学业支持的精准性。
